11102342:
Power Delay Profile
Power Delay Profile (PDP) estimation algorithm output is used as an input to Channel Smoother selection algorithm (5G\_UP\_ALG\_863\_replaced([11102348](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kng0tvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for Loner, Loki, Thor **and Thor (Radio 7-2e)** **L1 HW (cf. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_830\_replaced([11102015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndxZPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_832\_replaced([11102025](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndxZvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

The simulation report is available at "[[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a blurry, close-up, low-angle shot of a Microsoft PowerPoint file icon. The icon is predominantly orange and white. The left side of the icon features a large, solid orange rectangle with a white letter "P" inside it. To the right of the rectangle, there is a white document icon with a smaller orange shape that resembles a pie chart or a curved arrow. The overall impression is that of a digital file representation.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/HTML\_m22dng\_5G\_UP\_Algorithms\_file\_1834.001.png[/image\_path][/image-0] Performance comparison between combined and per Rx smoother indicator.pptx](https://nokia.sharepoint.com/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/CFAMs/5GC1800-5GC1999/5GC001981%20-%20L1%20algorithm%20changes%20-%205G19B/Simulation%20Reports/Performance%20comparison%20between%20combined%20and%20per%20Rx%20smoother%20indicator.pptx)"

Here are the inputs and the outputs that DU or Radio shall handle for Adaptive PDP length determination **algorithm for PUSCH,**  
[PR825660] for all paired UEs in MU-MIMO receiver in the slot.[End PR825660]:

**Inputs:**

* **[Before PR825660] [CB008235-A] NRBTS/NRCELL/NRULMUMIMO/ulMaxMuMimoLayer** [End CB008235-A] [End PR825660]\*\*\*\*
* NRBTS\NRCELL\numberOfRxBeamforming
* \*\*[PR825660] For the FDMed virtual UEs in the slot (for "virtual UE" concept please refer to PUSCH Front-loaded DM-RS Configuration as per [11145665](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksBhQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9), i.e.
* single-symbol as per [11349378](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubej8_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)  
  - or double-symbol as per [11349390](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubej9fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)  
  **[End PR825660]**\*\*
* **[CB008235-B] *rdUlTdFdPDPMixture (5G\_UP\_ALG\_28108\_replaced([11110534](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpFiCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) \*\*[End CB008235-B]***\*\*
* Raw Channel Estimates (5G\_UP\_ALG\_28097\_replaced([11102250](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knfmmPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) post-processed samples after layer separation with:
* Frequency Domain "Layer Separation" if 'single-symbol' front-loaded DM-RS (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_792\_replaced([11101692](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knauFPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
* **[CB008235-A] Time Domain "Layer Separation" before Frequency Domain "Layer Separation" if 'double-symbol' front-loaded DM-RS, i.e. ulMaxMuMimoLayer > 4 (refer to 5G\_UP\_12820\_replaced([11349390](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubej9fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) ( [11349390](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubej9fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_792\_replaced([11101692](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knauFPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).** [End CB008235-A]\*\*\*\*

**Algorithm:**

 DU or Radio shall compute PDP length **[Before CB008235-B] in Time Domain** [End CB008235-B]   
- after TO estimation (5G\_UP\_ALG\_872\_replaced([11102411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kniC0PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),  
- before Channel Smoothing (5G\_UP\_ALG\_863\_replaced([11102348](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kng0tvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and Equalization (5G\_UP\_ALG\_931\_replaced([11102839](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knoJgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) steps.\*\*\*\*

 DU (for Loner L1HW) shall: **- compare signal power of the second half** of CP length to noise power out of CP length\*\*\*\*

 DU (for Loki and Thor **L1** HW) and Radio (for Thor 7-2e L1 HW) shall: **- a. Define several additional sub sections within the CP length  
- b. Compare signal power to noise power among different CP sub sections**\*\*\*\*

 DU or Radio shall support Adaptive per RX PDP estimation length determination

**[CB008235-B]   
If NRBTS\NRCELL\numberOfRxBeamforming=16RX and** [Before PR825660] NRBTS\NRCELL\NRULMUMIMO\ulMaxMuMimoLayer **= 8**\*\*\*\*

[PR825660] and rdUlTdFdPDPMixture is true   
and PUSCH Front-loaded DM-RS Configuration is 'double-symbol' for at least one of the FDMed Virtual UEs in the slot.    
[End PR825660]

* **Radio (for Thor 7-2e) shall support PDP estimation mixture in (TD) Time Domain and (FD) Frequency Domain (TD-PDP and FD-PDP) and shall compute:**
* TD-PDP length estimation in Time Domain (TD-PDP) on the user’s own beams
* FD-PDP length estimation in Frequency Domain (FD-PDP) for the other beams: after layer separation, after TD de-OCC and based on Raw Channel estimates limited to 180 samples (30 PRBs for DMRS configuration type 1), as specified in 5GMax New Radio Algorithm Specification document (5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))**.**

Else **[End CB008235-B]**

 **DU (for Loki and Thor** L1 **HW) or** Radio (for Thor 7-2e) shall compute the TD-PDP length estimation in Time Domain (TD-PDP).***\****\*

Please refer to details in 5GMax New Radio Algorithm Specification document (5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))::

 for Time Domain in section "2.3.4.4 Adaptive PDP length determination"

 for **[CB008235-B] Frequency Domain in section "2.3.1.4 Adaptive Frequency Domain PDP Length Determination (FD-PDP)**

 **[Before PR825660] Radio (for Thor 7-2e) shall support rad parameter *rdUlTdFdPDPMixture (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_28108\_replaced([11110534](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpFiCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to trigger PDP estimation mixture for all UEs on cell base, as follows. If \*rdUlTdFdPDPMixture is set to:***\*

* True, the Radio shall use TD/FD-PDP estimation **mixture algorithm as described above .**
* False, the Radio shall use the legacy algorithm: TD-PDP estimation only for all beams.

The *rdUlTdFdPDPMixture on cell base could be used with value True (TD/FD-PDP Mixture) or False (no estimation mixture, TD-PDP estimation only) only when   
NRBTS\NRCELL\NRULMUMIMO\ulMaxMuMimoLayer = 8   
[End PR825660]*

**[End CB008235-B]**

**Outputs:**

 For DU (for Loner L1HW): Short or Long PDP length,

 For DU (for Loki and Thor **L1** HW) or **Radio (for Thor 7-2e L1 HW):  Short, Middle or Long PDP length.**\*\*\*\*

**[CB008235-B] NOTE: To further reduce the complexity, for UEs using more than 1 layer, the PDP length indicator for each RX is only measured on the first layer, and the indicator is used for all layers.** [End CB008235-B]\*\*\*\*

---

##### 2.4.2.4.2.5 Channel smoothing

###### 2.4.2.4.2.5.0-1 Channel smoothing Channel Smoothing for Loner, Loki and Thor L1 HW (ID: 11102348)

**2.4.2.4.2.5.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `11102364`)

Channel smoothing
Channel smoothing block is depicted in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_830\_replaced([11102015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndxZPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_832\_replaced([11102025](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndxZvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For Loner **adaptive smoother length shall be used for channel estimation. Adaptive filter length (5, 11 or 23) depends from SNR and PDP length (short, long). Please see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_861\_replaced([11102322](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kngNrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

The simulation report is available at “[Performance comparison between CE smoother with fixed and adaptive filter length.pptx](https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:p:/r/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/CFAMs/5GC1800-5GC1999/5GC001981%20-%20L1%20algorithm%20changes%20-%205G19B/Simulation%20Reports/Performance%20comparison%20between%20adaptive%20and%20fixed%20PDP%20length.pptx?d=w4916c890a96f49bd9446989567af0575&csf=1)”.

For Loki and Thor L1 and Thor (Radio 7-2e) **HW, variable filter length ( up to 23 ) depends from SNR and PDP length (short, mid, long). Please see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_861\_replaced([11102322](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kngNrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

Simulation report is :

<https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:p:/r/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/CFAMs/CNI%20Features/CNI-70548%20NR%20PUSCH%20channel%20smoothening%20filter%20complexity%20reduction/PUSCH%20CE%20simplification%20with%20SNR%20depende>nt%20filter%20length%20and%20new%20PDP%20determination.pptx?d=w854f3d1156b641b8a8bab872387ac36e&csf=1&web=1&e=hlFCYm

For PUSCH with Release16 "Low-PAPR DMRS Type2" (5G\_UP\_10530\_replaced([11360966](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucyLjfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) Sequence generation based,  in order to mitigate negative impacts of DMRS Type2 Sequence on System Performance and improve Channel Estimation (CE) accuracy, the DU (for Loki and Thor L1HW) **[CB009936-F] and Radio (for Thor 7-2e)** [End CB009936-F] shall support SINR capping operation to 0dB in CE smoother selection. For L1 Algorithm impact on Noise Measurements (as referred by 5GMax algorithm specifications in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), §2.3.1.17 chapter) refer to 5G\_UP\_13354\_replaced([11361085](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucyymvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).\*\*\*\*

**[CB008235-B] For Thor 7-2e HW and NRBTS\NRCELL\numberOfRxBeamforming=16RX and NRBTS\NRCELL\NRULMUMIMO\ulMaxMuMimoLayer** = 8, Radio shall support Channel smoothing algorithm based PDP estimation in (TD) Time Domain and (FD) Frequency Domain (TD-PDP and FD-PDP) **mixture (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_861\_replaced([11102322](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kngNrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**[End CB008235-B]***\****\*

Please see section "MMSE smoothing" Section in 5Gmax algorithm specification (see [11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

###### 2.4.2.4.2.5.0-2 Channel smoothing Channel Smoothing for vDU L1 HW (ID: 11102368)

**2.4.2.4.2.5.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11102375`)

Channel smoothing
[Before CNI-103796-M] Channel smoothing block is depicted in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_834\_replaced([11102096](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kneYcfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For vDU L1 HW, fixed  smoother length (5) shall be used for channel estimation (cf.5G\_UP\_ALG\_834\_replaced([11102096](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kneYcfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). PRB-wise processing is used for smoothing. Smoother selection shall depend on the modulation and not on SNR.

Please see section "2.3.1.3 MMSE smoothing" in 5Gmax algorithm specification (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CNI-103796-M]

---

###### 2.4.2.4.2.5.0-3 Channel smoothing Channel Smoothing for GPU L1 HW (ID: 13335892)

**2.4.2.4.2.5.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `13335893`)

Channel smoothing
DU for GPU L1 HW shall perform Channel smoothing operation based on fixed smoother length (cf. [13335589](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_GyT60ddxEfCkssdSu47EKw)).

Please see section "MMSE smoothing" Section in 5Gmax algorithm specification (see [11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.2.4.2.6 Noise Power

###### 2.4.2.4.2.6.0-1 Noise Power Noise Power Estimation and Compensation for Loner, Loki and Thor L1 HW (ID: 11102380)

**2.4.2.4.2.6.0-1.0-6**  (ID: `11102400`)

Noise Power
Noise Power Estimation block depicted in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_830\_replaced([11102015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndxZPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_832\_replaced([11102025](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndxZvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) regroups section "2.3.1.6 Noise Power Estimation","2.3.1.7 Noise Power Compensation", "2.3.5 Interference Power Estimation"of the 5Gmax algorithm specification (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

DU (for Loki and Thor L1HW) and Radio (for Thor 7-2e) shall use the Raw Channel estimation of the first DMRS symbol (after layer separation) for Noise Power Estimation (NPE). The noise is estimated on the used resource elements.

When the DMRS ports are in the same CDM group (i.e. separated by an Orthogonal Cover Code - OCC ), layer separation causes an underestimation of noise power estimation: a correction factor depending on the number of allocated PRB is introduced.

When the DMRS ports are in the same CDM group, the noise power estimation is completed by an estimation of the interference on the unused resource elements.

DU (for Loki, Thor L1HW  [CB009936-F] and Radio (for Thor 7-2e) [End CB009936-F]) shall support Noise Power Estimation with Release16 "Low-PAPR DMRS Type2" (5G\_UP\_ALG\_24738\_replaced([11101677](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knaHDfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_10530\_replaced([11360966](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucyLjfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) Pilot Sequence generation, with Raw Channel (5G\_UP\_ALG\_29400\_replaced([11102236](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knfmlfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and Noise Estimation Algorithm enhancements, needed to mitigate negative impacts of DMRS Type2 Sequence on System Performance. For L1 Algorithm impact on Noise Measurements (as referred by 5GMax algorithm specifications in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), §2.3.1.17 chapter) refer to 5G\_UP\_13354\_replaced([11361085](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucyymvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).  Refer to NR5GMAX L1 Algorithm change simulations: <https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:p:/r/sites/ASCOP/AS%20Documents/FS1TAs-CFAMs/CB/CB007000%20-%20CB007199/CFAMs/CB007103%20Low%20PAPR%20DMRS%20for%20DFT-S-OFDM%20Pi2%20BPSK/CFAM/NPE%20optimization%20on%20Rel16%20low-PAPR%20DMRS%20sequence%20type%202%203.pptx?d=w24d793c8e01045b695cefa818e030e99&csf=1&web=1&e=lL0KBo>

---

###### 2.4.2.4.2.6.0-2 Noise Power Noise Power Estimation for vDU L1 HW (ID: 11102402)

**2.4.2.4.2.6.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11102409`)

Noise Power
[Before CNI-103796-M] For vDU L1 HW, the noise is computed after the MMSE smoother and before frequency domain interpolation (cf. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_834\_replaced([11102096](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kneYcfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The computation includes both used and unused resource elements.

Noise Power Estimation block depicted in  5G\_UP\_ALG\_834\_replaced([11102096](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kneYcfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is described in section "2.3.5 Interference Power Estimation"of the 5Gmax algorithm specification (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CNI-103796-M]

---

###### 2.4.2.4.2.6.0-3 Noise Power Noise Power Estimation for GPU L1 HW (ID: 13335903)

**2.4.2.4.2.6.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `13335904`)

Noise Power
DU for GPU L1 HW shall estimate the noise power:  
- before frequency domain interpolation (cf.  [13335589](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_GyT60ddxEfCkssdSu47EKw) )   
- and after the MMSE smoothing operation, including both used and unused resource elements.

Noise Power Estimation block depicted in [13335589](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_GyT60ddxEfCkssdSu47EKw) is described in section "Interference Power Estimation"of the 5Gmax algorithm specification (see [11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 2.4.2.4.3 TO estimation and compensation

##### 2.4.2.4.3.0-1 TO estimation and compensation TO compensation for Loner L1 HW (ID: 11102414)

**2.4.2.4.3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11102418`)

TO estimation and compensation
Timing offset compensation: timing offset introduces a rotation of the channel in the frequency domain. In between TA corrections triggered by MAC CE command, the current estimated timing offset must be compensated at the PUSCH receiver.

For Loner L1 HW, the time offset compensation (TOC) is moved to front end, it is performed before frequency offset compensation for PUSCH DMRS and data symbols ( cf. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_824\_replaced([11101925](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndKU_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The time offset compensation algorithm on PUSCH is described in section "2.3.2 Time Offset Compensation" of the 5GMax algorithm specification (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

##### 2.4.2.4.3.0-2 TO estimation and compensation TO compensation for Loki L1 HW (ID: 11102420)

**2.4.2.4.3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11102423`)

TO estimation and compensation
For Loki L1 HW,

For CPRI,

The time offset compensation (TOC) is moved to front end, it is performed before frequency offset compensation for PUSCH DMRS symbols ( cf. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_826\_replaced([11101933](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndKVfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

For eCPRI,

The time offset compensation (TOC) is moved to front end, it is performed after frequency offset compensation for PUSCH DMRS symbols ( cf. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_826\_replaced([11101933](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndKVfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The time offset compensation algorithm on PUSCH is described in section "2.3.2 Time Offset Compensation" of the 5GMax algorithm specification (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

##### 2.4.2.4.3.0-3 TO estimation and compensation TO compensation for Thor L1 HW (ID: 11102427)

**2.4.2.4.3.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `11102436`)

TO estimation and compensation
For Thor L1 and Thor (Radio 7-2e) HW the time offset compensation (TOC) is moved to front end, it is performed after Intra-symbol frequency offset compensation for PUSCH DMRS symbols ( cf. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8109\_replaced([11101947](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndKV_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[CB008235-B] For Thor 7-2e HW and NRBTS\NRCELL\numberOfRxBeamforming=16RX and NRBTS\NRCELL\NRULMUMIMO\ulMaxMuMimoLayer = 8, with TD/FD-PDP estimation mixture (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_861\_replaced([11102322](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kngNrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) introduced for L1 implementation efficiency, Radio shall support Time Offset Compensation algorithm as specified by $2.3.2 section in of 5GMax algorithm specification (5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CB008235-B]

The time offset compensation algorithm on PUSCH is described in section "2.3.2 Time Offset Compensation" of the 5GMax algorithm specification (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

##### 2.4.2.4.3.0-4 TO estimation and compensation TO compensation for vDU L1 HW (ID: 11102439)

**2.4.2.4.3.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `11102445`)

TO estimation and compensation
[Before CNI-103796-M] For vDU L1 HW, the time offset compensation (TOC) is moved to front end, it is performed before frequency offset compensation for PUSCH DMRS symbols.

It is performed after the equalizer for data symbols (please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_840\_replaced([11102122](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kneYd_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The time offset compensation algorithm on PUSCH is described in section "2.3.2 Time Offset Compensation" of the 5GMax algorithm specification (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CNI-103796-M]

---

##### 2.4.2.4.3.0-5 TO estimation and compensation TO compensation for GPU L1 HW (ID: 13335906)

**2.4.2.4.3.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `13335907`)

TO estimation and compensation
DU for GPU L1 HW shall perform the time offset compensation (TOC) at front end stage,   
before frequency offset compensation for PUSCH DMRS symbols ([13335729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_KeMZ4Nd1EfCkssdSu47EKw)).

The time offset compensation algorithm on PUSCH is described in section "Time Offset Compensation" of the 5GMax algorithm specification (see [11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.2.4.3.0-6 TO estimation and compensation Timing Offset Estimation for Loner, Loki and Thor L1 HW (ID: 11102448)

**2.4.2.4.3.0-6.0-5**  (ID: `11102462`)

TO estimation and compensation
For Loner, Loki and Thor L1 and Thor (Radio 7-2e) HWs, TO estimation is performed in Time Domain after IFFT (cf. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_830\_replaced([11102015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndxZPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_832\_replaced([11102025](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndxZvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The IFFT size used in TO estimation (64, 128,256) depends the DMRS RE number.

The search window length for time offset estimation is changed to 2/3 CP length, and the search window range is also changed to be symmetric.

[CB008235-B] For Thor 7-2e HW and NRBTS\NRCELL\numberOfRxBeamforming=16RX and NRBTS\NRCELL\NRULMUMIMO\ulMaxMuMimoLayer = 8, with TD/FD-PDP estimation mixture (refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_861\_replaced([11102322](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kngNrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) introduced for L1 implementation efficiency, Radio shall support Time Offset Estimation algorithm in Time Domain after IFFT but Time offset estimation now uses layer-separated channel estimates instead of raw CEs (cf. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_832\_replaced([11102025](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndxZvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CB008235-B]

The timing offset estimation algorithm for PUSCH is described in section "2.3.4.1 TO Estimation in Time Domain" of the 5GMax algorithm specification (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

##### 2.4.2.4.3.0-7 TO estimation and compensation Timing Offset Estimation for vDU L1 HW (ID: 11102464)

**2.4.2.4.3.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `11102469`)

TO estimation and compensation
[Before CNI-103796-M] For vDU L1 HW, TO estimation is performed in Frequency Domain  (cf. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_834\_replaced([11102096](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kneYcfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Angle of the cross correlation is computed per PRB and averaged over the bandwidth and the antenna.

The timing offset estimation algorithm for vDU is described in section "2.3.4.5 ACF TO Estimation" of the 5GMax algorithm specification (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CNI-103796-M]

---

##### 2.4.2.4.3.0-8 TO estimation and compensation Timing Offset Estimation for GPU L1 HW (ID: 13335909)

**2.4.2.4.3.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `13335910`)

TO estimation and compensation
DU for GPU L1 HW shall perform TO estimation in Frequency Domain (cf. [13335589](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_GyT60ddxEfCkssdSu47EKw)).  
Angle of the cross correlation is computed per PRB and averaged over the bandwidth and the antenna.

The timing offset estimation algorithm for GPU is described in section "ACF TO Estimation" of the 5GMax algorithm specification (see [11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 2.4.2.4.4 CFO estimation and compensation

##### 2.4.2.4.4.0-1 CFO estimation and compensation Algorithm for CFO estimation and compensation (ID: 11102474)

**2.4.2.4.4.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11102480`)

CFO estimation and compensation
The CFO estimation and compensation algorithms on PUSCH are described in section 2.3.3 of the 5GMax algorithm specification  (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The derivation of a CFO estimate from the associated metric is also described in the same section.

[CB007595-B]

This requirement shall be also supported by Radio (L1) for eCPRI 7-2e.

[End CB007595-B]

---

##### 2.4.2.4.4.1 CFO estimation

###### 2.4.2.4.4.1.0-1 CFO estimation CFO estimation inputs for vDU L1 HW : DMRS or PTRS selection (ID: 11102484)

**2.4.2.4.4.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11102489`)

CFO estimation
[Before CNI-103796-M] For vDU L1 HW, CFO estimation is based on DMRS, PTRS is not supported.

For vDU L1 HW, when transform precoding is enabled(DFT-s-OFDM), CFO estimation is same as when transform precoding is disabled(CP-OFDM), and still based on DMRS as PTRS is not supported. [End CNI-103796-M]

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.1.0-2 CFO estimation CFO estimation inputs for GPU L1 HW (ID: 13335918)

**2.4.2.4.4.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13335919`)

CFO estimation
DU for GPU L1 HW shall perform CFO estimation based on DMRS signal input.

DU for GPU L1 HW shall expect to be programmed to receive PUSCH configured without PTRS that is not supported.

~~For GPU DU L1 HW, when transform precoding is enabled(DFT-s-OFDM), CFO estimation is same as when transform precoding is disabled(CP-OFDM), and still based on DMRS as PTRS is not supported.~~

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.1.0-3 CFO estimation CFO estimation inputs for Loner, Loki and Thor L1 HW : DMRS or PTRS selection (ID: 11102493)

**2.4.2.4.4.1.0-3.0-4**  (ID: `13374620`)

CFO estimation
DU**or Radio shall choose the appropriate method to estimate the CFO according to the following algorithm for Loner, Loki, Thor**[CB016066-C] and GPU  **[End CB016066-C] L1HW and Thor (Radio 7-2e)** HW. Sections quoted are relative to [11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).***\****\*

DU**or Radio determines the number of DMRS symbols per slot that might be used by CFO estimation  in 38.211 Tables 6.4.1.1.3-3 and 6.4.1.1.3-4 assuming frequency hopping is always disabled.**

Note: DU for Loner L1HW shall use raw channel estimates (as shown in [11102015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndxZPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) ) as inputs of FOE.  
DU for Loki, Thor **[CB016066-C] and GPU**[End CB016066-C] L1HW, Radio for Thor (eCPRI 7.2e) shall use smoothed channel estimates (as shown in [11102025](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndxZvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) as inputs of FOE.\*\*\*\*

Differences of performances can be seen below:

<https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:w:/r/sites/5GSystemEngineering/User_Plane_Solution_Domain/L1/Shared%20Documents/Miscellaneous%20documents/FOE%20results%2020210827%20(1).docx?d=w327f5efb2a1843e6a9d3b1a0a007ce26&csf=1&web=1&e=qObDQN>

<https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:p:/r/sites/5GSystemEngineering/User_Plane_Solution_Domain/L1/Shared%20Documents/Miscellaneous%20documents/DMRS%20vs%20PTRS%20based%20ST%20FOE.pptx?d=w2439c67fd1ab43559c32752625fe33ab&csf=1&web=1&e=c11dbW>

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.1.0-4 CFO estimation DMRS or PTRS selection details (ID: 11102503)

**2.4.2.4.4.1.0-4.0-6**  (ID: `13335943`)

CFO estimation
When FOE is not skipped, DU and Radio shall perform FOE with DMRS or PTRS signal input as follows for each L1 HW:

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Wave-form** | **Number of OFDM Symbols** | **PTRS** | **FOE** | **Loner** | **Loki** | **Thor** | **Thor** **(Radio 7-2e)** | **GPU** |
| CP-OFDM | >= 2 DMRS symbols | OFF | DU shall compute this estimate on DMRS channel estimates after CFO compensation (5GMAX section 2.3.3.2) | Supported | Supported | Supported | Supported | Supported |
| ON | Supported | Supported | Supported | - | - |  |  |  |
| 1DMRS symbol | OFF | FOE is skipped, ST-FOE=0 | Supported | Supported | Supported | Supported | Supported |  |
| ON | DU shall compute this estimate on PTRS channel (5GMAX section 2.3.3.1) | Supported | Supported | Supported | - | - |  |  |
| DFT-s-OFDM | >= 2 DMRS symbols | OFF | DU shall compute this estimate on DMRS channel estimates after CFO compensation (5GMAX section 2.3.3.8.2) | Supported | Supported | Supported | Supported | - |
| ON | Supported | Supported | Supported | - | - |  |  |  |
| 1DMRS symbol | OFF | FOE is skipped, ST-FOE=0 | Supported | Supported | Supported | Supported | - |  |
| ON | DU shall compute ST CFO estimate after IDFT (after equalizer) 5GMAX section 2.3.3.8.1 | Supported | Supported | Supported | - | - |  |  |
| First Feature |  |  |  |  |  | CB007487-B, CB007487-C, CB007487-D |  | CB016066-C |

Note1: The 5GMAX algorithm specification version see [11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)

Note2: CP-OFDM refers to Transform precoding disabled. DFT-s-OFDM refers to Transform Precoding enabled.

Note3: For eCPRI 7-2e, PTRS are not in scope in Radio.

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.1.0-5 CFO estimation DMRS or PTRS selection details for HST - Loki and Thor L1 HW (ID: 11102523)

**2.4.2.4.4.1.0-5.0-3**  (ID: `11102532`)

CFO estimation
For Loki and Thor [CB010708-I] and Thor (Radio 7-2e)  [End CB010708-I] L1HW (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18\_replaced([11094261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kmaoifvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), when NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actHighSpeedCell is enabled (5G\_UP\_389\_replaced([11349354](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubd86_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and PTRS [CB010708-I] (**) [End CB010708-I] is configured (see 5G\_UP\_382\_replaced([11349281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubdV4vvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then DMRS or [CB010708-I] PTRS (**) [End CB010708-I] shall be configured at  5G-L1-UL  DU [CB010708-I] and Radio [End CB010708-I] as follows to perform FOE:

[CB010708-I] (\*\*) PTRS not in scope for eCPRI 7-2e (NRBTS/NRCELL/actEcpri72e enabled). [End CB010708-I]

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Number of OFDM Symbols | Waveform | PTRS | FOE |
| 2 symbols DMRS | CP-OFDM | ON | 5G-L1-UL DU shall, after CFO compensation, compute this estimate on both DMRS and PTRS channel estimates or on PTRS only. This choice shall depend on rdUlCfoEstimationHstMethod defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9762\_replaced([11110283](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpCesfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). (Section 2.3.3.3) |
| 3 symbols DMRS | CP-OFDM | ON | 5G-L1-UL DU shall compute this estimate on DMRS channel estimates after CFO compensation (Section 2.3.3.3) |
| 2 or 3 symbols DMRS | CP-OFDM | OFF | 5G-L1-UL DU  [CB010708-I] or Radio (L1) [End CB010708-I] shall compute this estimate on DMRS estimates after CFO compensation (Section 2.3.3.3) |
| 3 symbols DMRS | DFT-s-OFDM | ON [CB010708-I] (\*\*) [End CB010708-I] or OFF | 5G-L1-UL DU [CB010708-I] or Radio (eCPRI 7-2e) [End CB010708-I] shall compute this estimate on DMRS channel estimates after CFO compensation (section 2.3.3.8.2) |

(\*)When DFT-s-OFDM is selected, DMRS shall be configured to UE (despite NIDD configuration) so that 5G-L1-UL DU  [CB010708-I] or Radio [End CB010708-I] always receives DFT-s-OFDM with 3 DMRS

Simulation results for CP-OFDM are available here: <https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:p:/r/sites/ASCOP/AS%20Documents/FS1TAs-CFAMs/CB/CB008500%20-%20CB008999/CFAM/CB008792%20High%20speed%20UE%20support%20in%20FR1%20TDD%20cells/CP2/Link_Level_simulations/FOE%20using%20PTRS%20and%20DMRS%20in%20HST_v1.pptx?d=wa06f8eb8d26d4869860d6dc7a91ca315&csf=1&web=1&e=HP0Lsx>

Simulation results for DFT-s-OFDM are available here: <https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:p:/r/sites/ASCOP/AS%20Documents/FS1TAs-CFAMs/CB/CB008500%20-%20CB008999/CFAM/CB008792%20High%20speed%20UE%20support%20in%20FR1%20TDD%20cells/CP2/Link_Level_simulations/DFT-s-OFDM_FR1_TP1_HST.pptx?d=wb9eb42492bbd4d9991288f212841f882&csf=1&web=1&e=1JwvMo>

Note1: section indicated in 5GMAX algorithm specification (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), version depends on the feature introducing the functionality)

Note2: CP-OFDM refers to Transform precoding disabled. DFT-s-OFDM refers to Transform Precoding enabled.

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.1.0-6 CFO estimation Time interval in short term correlation used for FOE computation (ID: 11102535)

**2.4.2.4.4.1.0-6.0-4**  (ID: `13374625`)

CFO estimation
DU for Loner, Loki, Thor [CB016066-C] and GPU [End CB016066-C] L1 HW and Radio for Thor (7-2e) L1 HWs, shall compute a complex short-term correlation between different DMRS symbols and/or different PTRS symbols, in order to compute the frequency offset estimation (FOE).

In order to combine the correlations (DMRS, PTRS) during long term averaging at L2, DU or Radio shall adjust the time interval by taking into account *Itv. This paremeter is the symbol interval between two symbols involved in a short term correlation computation.*

*Itv is set to 4.*

After this adjustement, DU or Radio shall report to L2 the computed metric as rrmInstCfo for long term averaging. Please refer to [11150688](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksVDQ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

For more details, please refer “2.3.3 Frequency Offset estimation and compensation” of 5GMax algorithm specification (see [11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

For DU with [CB016066-C] GPU L1 HW [End CB016066-C] and eCPRI 7-2e, PTRS based FOE is not in scope.

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.1.0-7 CFO estimation Noise for CFO estimation based on DMRS - Loner, Loki and Thor L1 HW (ID: 11102546)

**2.4.2.4.4.1.0-7.0-3**  (ID: `11102555`)

CFO estimation
For Loner, Loki and Thor L1 [CB007595-B] and Thor (Radio 7-2e) [End CB007595-B] HWs, the noise power used in frequency offset estimation (FOE) based on DMRS is DMRS based noise, as described in section “2.3.3.2 Frequency Offset Estimation based on DMRS” of 5GMax algorithm specification.

The DMRS based noise estimation is described in section “2.3.1.4 Noise Power Estimation” of 5GMax algorithm specification (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.1.0-8 CFO estimation Noise for CFO estimation based on DMRS - vDU L1 HW (ID: 11102557)

**2.4.2.4.4.1.0-8.0-2**  (ID: `11102563`)

CFO estimation
[Before CNI-103796-M] For vDU L1 HW, 5G-L1-UL shall estimate the noise and interference power, used in frequency offset estimation (FOE), together based on the diagonals of the Rdd matrix, as described in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (chapter 2.3.5.1 of 5GMax algorithm specification). This estimation is performed on the PRB-wise basis.

These estimates are used for FOE, which is also performed PRB-wise. [End CNI-103796-M]

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.1.0-9 CFO estimation Noise for CFO estimation based on DMRS - GPU L1 HW (ID: 13335932)

**2.4.2.4.4.1.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `13335933`)

CFO estimation
DU for GPU L1 HW shall estimate the noise and interference power, used in frequency offset estimation (FOE), as described in [11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) (refer to section "Interference Power and Signal Power Estimation").   
~~DU for GPU L1 HW shall perform the~~~~noise power estimation on the PRB-wise,based on the Rdd averaged over 1PRB, which incorporates RE with and without DMRS transmission. Specifically, with input from Rdd matrix diagonal elements. These estimates are used for FOE, which is also performed PRB-wise.~~

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.1.0-10 CFO estimation CFO estimation based on PTRS (ID: 11102566)

**2.4.2.4.4.1.0-10.0-2**  (ID: `11102571`)

CFO estimation
For Loner L1 HW, Loki [CB008325-5G-AA,CB008325-5G-BA] and Thor [End CB008325-5G-AA,CB008325-5G-BA] L1 HW, if process FOE on PTRS, the channel estimation for PTRS is used in short term correlation calculation.

The frequency offset estimation algorithm is described in section "2.3.3.3 Frequency Offset Estimation" of 5GMax algorithm specification (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The noise power used in frequency offset estimation (FOE) based on PTRS is compensated DMRS based noise, as described in section “2.3.3.1 Frequency Offset Estimation based on PTRS” of 5GMax algorithm specification.

The compensated DMRS based noise estimation is described in section “2.3.1.5 Noise Power Estimation Compensation” of 5GMax algorithm specification (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.1.0-11 CFO estimation CFO estimation based DMRS for HST - Loki and Thor L1 HW (ID: 11102573)

**2.4.2.4.4.1.0-11.0-3**  (ID: `11102582`)

CFO estimation
For Loki  and Thor  [CB010708-I] and Thor (Radio 7-2e)  [End CB010708-I] L1 HW, when NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actHighSpeedCell is enabled, FOE is estimated based on DMRS (in case more than 2 DMRS), FOE shall be estimated based on second and third DMRS instead of two first DMRS.

Rationale behind this update is to have constant DMRS distance whatever first DMRS position for type A. Otherwise first DMRS position 2 would reduce the FO range for high speed UES compared to first DMRS position 3. For receiver simplicity, type B is aligned to type A.

Please see <https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:p:/r/sites/ASCOP/AS%20Documents/FS1TAs-CFAMs/CB/CB008500%20-%20CB008999/CFAM/CB008792%20High%20speed%20UE%20support%20in%20FR1%20TDD%20cells/CP2/Link_Level_simulations/Max%20speed.pptx?d=waf21bf88695d43c985fc4398022b6499&csf=1&web=1&e=DPLCqD>

---

##### 2.4.2.4.4.2 CFO compensation

###### 2.4.2.4.4.2.1 CFO compensation for SU receiver

###### 2.4.2.4.4.2.1.0-1 CFO compensation for SU receiver CFO compensation block for vDU L1 HW (ID: 11102590)

**2.4.2.4.4.2.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11102595`)

CFO compensation for SU receiver
[Before CNI-103796-M]  For vDU L1 HW, 5G-L1-UL shall support inter- and intrasymbol FOC, and this does not depends on the setting of the R&D parameter rdFocEnabledFlag (5G\_UP\_ALG\_11352\_replaced([11110293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpCetfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CNI-103796-M]

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.2.1.0-2 CFO compensation for SU receiver CFO compensation block for GPU L1 HW**** (ID: 13335936)

**2.4.2.4.4.2.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13335937`)

CFO compensation for SU receiver
DU for GPU L1 HW shall support inter and intra-symbol FOC (refer to [11110293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpCetfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for PUSCH MSG3 and PUSCH programmed to Receiver when UE granted by PDCCH DCI\_0\_0.

~~. and this does not depends on the setting of the R&D parameter~~ ~~*rdFocEnabledFlag*~~ ~~(~~[11110293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpCetfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.2.1.0-3 CFO compensation for SU receiver CFO compensation block disabled for Loner (ID: 11102598)

**2.4.2.4.4.2.1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11102600`)

CFO compensation for SU receiver
CFO compensation depends on the setting of the R&D parameter rdFocEnabledFlag (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11352\_replaced([11110293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpCetfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

For Loner , when the CFO compensation is disabled, 5G-L1-UL ignores any input relative to long term CFO from 5G-L2-PS and does not perform CFO compensation.

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.2.1.0-4 CFO compensation for SU receiver CFO compensation block enabled for Loner, Loki and Thor L1 HW (ID: 11102603)

**2.4.2.4.4.2.1.0-4.0-5**  (ID: `13423974`)

CFO compensation for SU receiver
When CFO compensation is enabled, DU for Loner, Loki**, Thor and GPU and Radio for Thor (Radio 7-2e) L1 HWs, DU or Radio**shall carry out a CFO operation in frequency domain (post-FFT) for both data and DMRS.\*\*\*\*

For each UE, L1 shall compensate the FO on received PUSCH based on Long Term CFO metric as per 5G-L2-PS LT averaging ([CB010737-B] see [11150556](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksUcNvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and [End CB010737-B] [11151025](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksW4cvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Summary is as follows **for Loner, Loki and Thor and Thor (Radio 7-2e) and GPU**L1 HW:\*\*\*\*

|  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  | **Loner** | **Loki** | **Thor** | **Thor (Radio 7-2e)** | **GPU** |
| First Feature |  |  |  |  | **CB016066-A** |
| [rdFocEnabledFlag (11110293)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpCetfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | Used for FOC enabling | Not used |  |  |  |
| **FOC when foeValid = FALSE** | skip FOC | skip FOC for intra symbols, and use short term FOE for inter-symbols FOC |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |
| **FOC when foeValid = TRUE** | Perform FOC with LT FOE |  |  |  |  |

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.2.1.0-5 CFO compensation for SU receiver Inter symbol FOC for Loner, Loki L1 HW (ID: 11102614)

**2.4.2.4.4.2.1.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11102616`)

CFO compensation for SU receiver
For Loner and Loki L1 HWs (CPRI), the inter symbol FOC is merged into upconversion and intra symbol FOC.

The frequency offset compensation algorithm is described in section "2.3.3.6 Frequency Offset Compensation" of 5GMax algorithm specification (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.2.2 CFO compensation for MU receiver

###### 2.4.2.4.4.2.2.0-1 CFO compensation for MU receiver CFO compensation block (intra / inter symbol FOC) (ID: 11102621)

**2.4.2.4.4.2.2.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `13106181`)

CFO compensation for MU receiver
\* DU for Loki **and Thor L1 HWs shall skip both intra and inter symbol FOC in frequency domain (post-FFT) for both data and DMRS before the equalizer (cf. [11101922](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndKUvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**
\* For each paired UE, DU **[CB010708-C] or Radio** [End CB010708-C] shall:***\*
\* compensate the CFO on received PUSCH based on per UE long term FOE (cf. [11151021](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksW4cfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
\* apply inter symbol FOC on the channel estimates of data symbols and on data REs before performing equalization (cf.*\*[11102109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kneYdPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**
\* **perform for Thor L1 HW only, the intra-FOC after equalization.**

NOTE: DU **[CB010708-C] and Radio** [End CB010708-C] has the following limitation: for each paired UE, L1 HW in DU **[CB010708-C] and Radio** [End CB010708-C] shall be programmed with Valid FOE (foeValid shall be TRUE).

Please refer to description in section "2.3.3.5 Frequency Offset Compensation" of 5GMax algorithm specification (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).***\****\*

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.2.3 FOC filter length

###### 2.4.2.4.4.2.3.0-1 FOC filter length (ID: 11102631)

**2.4.2.4.4.2.3.0-1.0-8**  (ID: `13430182`)

FOC filter length
DU (for Loner, Loki, Thor and GPU L1 HWs) and Radio (for Thor 7-2e L1 HW) shall support FOC filter length as described in section "2.3.3.6 Frequency Offset Compensation" of 5GMax algorithm specification (see [11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ):

* When MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actHighSpeedCell is disabled:
* For Loner, Loki, Thor and GPU L1 HW and Thor (Radio 7-2e)  L1 HWs, the filter length is equal to 5
* When NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actHighSpeedCell  is enabled:
* For Loki, Thor and Thor (Radio 7-2e) L1 HWs, the filter length shall be equal to 11.

For simulation results, please refer to <https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/sites/ASCOP/AS%20Documents/FS1TAs-CFAMs/CB/CB008500%20-%20CB008999/CFAM/CB008792%20High%20speed%20UE%20support%20in%20FR1%20TDD%20cells/CP2/Link_Level_simulations/FOC%20results_FdFocReal.xlsx?d=w5e5af06efdd9485c88a06d4f5e6ec68b&csf=1&web=1&e=VuYnsu>.

Therefore values supported can be summarized as follow**:**

|  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| FOC filter length | Loner | Loki | Thor | Thor (Radio 7-2e) | GPU |
| TDD FR1 | 5 | 5, 11 | 5, 11 | 5, 11 | 5 |
| FDD FR1 | 5 | 5, **11** | 5, 11 | **-** | [CB016406-A] 5  [End CB016406-A] |
| TDD FR2 | 5 | 5 | 5 ~~11~~ | - | - |
| **First Feature** |  |  | CB007487-B, CB007487-C, CB007487-D | CB007595-B | CB016066-C |

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.2.4 FOC optimization method

###### 2.4.2.4.4.2.4.0-1 FOC optimization method (ID: 11102653)

**2.4.2.4.4.2.4.0-1.0-8**  (ID: `13429056`)

FOC optimization method
The FOC optimization method when set to ON, considers TO impact in FOC coefficients  depending position of TOC before/after FOC, as described in section "2.3.3.6 Frequency Offset Compensation" of 5GMax algorithm specification (see [11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For Loki, Thor, Thor (Radio 7-2e) L1 HW, when NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actHighSpeedCell is enabled, the FOC optimization method shall be set ON.

For Loki CPRI L1 HW, DU shall consider TO impact in FOC (TOC before FOC).

FOC optimization method support is as follow:

|  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| FOC optimization method | Loner | Loki | Thor | Thor (Radio 7-2e) | GPU L1 HW |
| TDD FR1 | OFF | OFF, ON (\*) | REAL or ON (\*) for DMRS symbols, ON for Data symbols | REAL or ON (\*) for DMRS symbols, ON for Data symbols | OFF |
| FDD FR1 | OFF | OFF, **ON (\*)** | REAL or ON (\*) for DMRS symbols, ON for Data symbols | **-** | **[CB016406-A] OFF** [End CB016406-A]\*\*\*\* |
| TDD FR2 | OFF | OFF | REAL for DMRS symbols, ON for Data symbols | - | - |
| **First Feature** |  |  | CB007487-B, CB007487-C, CB007487-D | CB007595-B | CB016066-C |

(\*) with NIDD MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actHighSpeedCell enabled.

Note: For Thor **and Thor (Radio 7-2e)  L1 HW, FOC optimization Method "REAL" means: do not consider TOC impact, but remove common phase, only real part.**

Existing simulation results are available here : <https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/sites/ASCOP/AS%20Documents/FS1TAs-CFAMs/CB/CB008500%20-%20CB008999/CFAM/CB008792%20High%20speed%20UE%20support%20in%20FR1%20TDD%20cells/CP2/Link_Level_simulations/FOC%20results_FdFocReal.xlsx?d=w5e5af06efdd9485c88a06d4f5e6ec68b&csf=1&web=1&e=VuYnsu.>

---

##### 2.4.2.4.4.3 Antenna wise CFO

###### 2.4.2.4.4.3.0-1 Antenna wise CFO Antenna wise CFO estimation and compensation for SU receiver (ID: 11102672)

**2.4.2.4.4.3.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `13335946`)

Antenna wise CFO
DU for Loner, Loki, and Thor, Thor (Radio 7-2e) **[CB016066-C] and GPU**[End CB016066-C] L1 HWs, shall perform the antenna-wise estimate used to compensate the CFO on PUSCH received on the appropriate spatial stream (expected at the SFN and NR-slot). The relationship between the elements of long term CFO metric per antenna and the spatial streams is given in [11102694](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knltPvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).\*\*\*\*

Additionally DU or Radio shall perform antennas-wise ST FOE and report it to 5G-L2-PS for LT averaging. The mapping of each element of the antenna wise ST FOE to the spatial stream is provided in [11102694](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knltPvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

For Loki and Loner **and Thor** L1 HW, when FOE is PTRS based with DFT-s-OFDM, DU shall report same ST FOE for each antenna. Rationale: PTRS post processing is performed after equalizer stage (cf. [11102191](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kne_ifvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) and [11102182](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kne_h_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) and [11102199](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kne_i_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and cannot be antenna-wise.\*\*\*\*

For eCPRI 7-2e: PTRS based FOE with DFT-s-OFDM is not in scope.

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.3.0-2 Antenna wise CFO Antenna wise CFO estimation for HST and compensation for SU receiver (ID: 11102684)

**2.4.2.4.4.3.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11102692`)

Antenna wise CFO
The antenna-wise estimate shall be used to compensate the CFO on PUSCH received on the appropriate spatial stream (expected at the SFN and NR-slot). The relationship between the elements of long term Cfo metric per antenna and the spatial streams is given in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_920\_replaced([11102694](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knltPvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Additionally 5G-L1-UL shall perform antennas-wise ST FOE and report it to 5G-L2-PS for LT averaging.

For Loki, Thor  [CB010708-I] and Thor (Radio 7-2e) [End CB010708-I] L1 HW, when NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actHighSpeedCell is enabled, when FOE is estimated based on both DMRS and PTRS (cf. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6680\_replaced([11102523](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knjQ-PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) the antenna-wise ST FOE shall be computed as follows :

* L1 shall compute per antenna ST\_FOE\_PTRS\_ant\_i and ST\_FOE\_DMRS\_ant\_i, i=0…Nb\_RXantenna-1
* For each beam ID k=0...(Nb\_RXantenna/2)-1, L1 shall combine the respective antenna-wise measurements for each PTRS and DMRS as per the following formula :

a. ST\_FOE\_PTRS\_beam\_k  =  ST\_FOE\_PTRS\_ant\_2k + ST\_FOE\_PTRS\_ant\_(2k+1)

b. ST\_FOE\_DMRS\_beam\_k =  ST\_FOE\_DMRS\_ant\_2k + ST\_FOE\_DMRS\_ant\_(2k+1)

* For each beam ID k=0...(Nb\_RXantenna/2)-1, a phase correction factor is derived on the phase difference between ST\_FOE\_PTRS\_beam\_k and ST\_FOE\_DMRS\_beam\_k and can be called phase\_correction\_diff\_angle\_DMRS\_PTRS\_beam\_k.

-Then the value reported for each antenna  i=0…Nb\_RXantenna-1 where i = 2k,2k+1 and k=0...(Nb\_RXantenna/2)-1

a. ST\_FOE\_DMRS\_reported\_ant\_2k = ST\_FOE\_DMRS\_ant\_2k \* exp( phase\_correction\_diff\_angle\_DMRS\_PTRS\_beam\_k)

b. ST\_FOE\_DMRS\_reported\_ant\_2k+1 =  ST\_FOE\_DMRS\_ant\_(2k+1) \* exp( phase\_correction\_diff\_angle\_DMRS\_PTRS\_beam\_k)

[CB010708-I] NOTE: PTRS is not supported in eCPRI 7-2e, with NRBTS/NRCELL/actEcpri72e enabled. [End CB010708-I]

For more details, please refer to section 2.3.3.3 in 5GMAX algorithm specification (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), version depends on the feature introducing the functionality).

The mapping of each element of the antenna wise ST FOE to the spatial stream is provided in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_920\_replaced([11102694](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knltPvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.3.0-3 Antenna wise CFO Mapping of antenna wise ST/LT CFO to spatial streams for SU receiver (ID: 11102694)

**2.4.2.4.4.3.0-3.0-12**  (ID: `13356789`)

Antenna wise CFO
DU or Radio (eCPRI 7-2e) shall estimate an antenna-wise ST FOE (see [11102672](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knltNPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The mapping of each element of the per antenna ST FOE to the spatial stream depends on CPRI and eCPRI configuration as below. The same mapping shall be considered for the LT FOE estimate received from 5G-L2-PS.

**Mapping between antenna-wise ST FOE/LT FOE and spatial stream for (e)CPRI**

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Subcell Type | ST FOE for antenna i | LT FOE for antenna i | (e)CPRI spatial stream | **First feature** |
| A2 or C2 | short term CFO metric antenna 0 | long term CFO metric antenna 0 | (ce)AxC0 |  |
| short term CFO metric antenna 1 | long term CFO metric antenna 1 | (ce)AxC1 |  |  |
| A4 or C4 | short term CFO metric antenna 0 | long term CFO metric antenna 0 | (ce)AxC0 |  |
| short term CFO metric antenna 1 | long term CFO metric antenna 1 | (ce)AxC1 |  |  |
| short term CFO metric antenna 2 | long term CFO metric antenna 2 | (ce)AxC2 |  |  |
| short term CFO metric antenna 3 | long term CFO metric antenna 3 | (ce)AxC3 |  |  |
| A8 or C8 | short term CFO metric antenna 0 | long term CFO metric antenna 0 | ceAxC0 | CB009363-A |
| short term CFO metric antenna 1 | long term CFO metric antenna 1 | ceAxC1 |  |  |
| short term CFO metric antenna j | long term CFO metric antenna j | ceAxCj |  |  |
| short term CFO metric antenna 7 | long term CFO metric antenna 7 | ceAxC7 |  |  |
| C16'2 (Radio) | short term CFO metric antenna 0 | long term CFO metric antenna 0 | ceAxC0 | CB010708-A |
| short term CFO metric antenna 1 | long term CFO metric antenna 1 | ceAxC1 |  |  |
| short term CFO metric antenna j | long term CFO metric antenna j | ceAxC7 |  |  |
| short term CFO metric antenna 7 or 15 | long term CFO metric antenna 7 or 15 | ceAxC7 or ceAxC15 |  |  |

Note 1: For L1 Loner L1 HW, CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx beamforming is not supported. Thus antenna-wise ST-FOE and FOC for PUSCH is not designed to support CPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx beamforming. Reason behind is that, in CPRI 4Rx beamforming cells, beam pattern Id mapping to AxC Id is not specified. 5G-L2-PS doesn’t know beam pattern Id’s mapping to AxC stream, and thus can’t perform beam specific FO handling.

Note 2: although antenna-wise ST-FOE and FOC is introduced for FR1 TDD Rx beamforming cells with eCPRI RU,  
DU (for Loner, Loki , Thor and GPU L1 HW) or Radio (for Thor 7-2e) shall have same behaviour as per above table regardless ~~among~~:

1. FH configuration (i.e. CPRI, eCPRI 7-2a, eCPRI 7-2e)
2. Beamforming configuration (i.e. with or without beamforming)
3. Technology and receiver order, see [11103001](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knp-p_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

**[Before CB014128-A] Note 2: although antenna-wise ST-FOE and FOC is introduced for FR1 TDD Rx beamforming cells with eCPRI RU,  
DU or Radio shall have same L1's behaviour among:**

- CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 2RX beamforming; CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 2RX non beamforming

- CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx beamforming; CPRI or eCPRI FR1 TDD 4Rx non beamforming

- CPRI FR1 FDD 2RX non beamforming; CPRI FR1 FDD 4Rx non beamforming

- For Loki L1 HW, eCPRI **FR1 FDD 4Rx non beamforming; For Loki L1 HW, eCPRI** FR1 FDD 2RX non beamforming\*\*\*\*

- FR2 TDD 2Rx

-   For Thor L1 HW, eCPRI FR1 TDD 8RX beamforming; For Thor L1 HW, eCPRI **FR1 FDD 4Rx non beamforming**

**-     For Thor L1 HW, eCPRI** FR1 FDD 2Rx non beamforming\*\*\*\*

**- For Thor L1 HW, eCPRI FR1 FDD 8RX beamforming**

NOTE: The "Note2" text invalidation aims improving readability and current NOTE has only editorial change scope, to be kept for current release only.

**[End CB014128-A]**

If eCPRI 7-2e is activated via NIDD parameter **NRCELL.actEcpri72e, C16’2 supported in Radio, ST FOE is implemented at Radio. ceAxC0~ceAxC15 are internal spatial stream ID's used in Radio(L1).**

Note4: For Thor ~~and Thor (Radio 7-2e)~~ L1 HWs, antenna-wise ST-FOE and FOC is supported for eCPRI FR1 TDD, CPRI FR1 TDD, ~~eCPRI 7-2e FR1 TDD~~ and CPRI FDD.

Note5: For Thor (Radio 7-2e) L1 HWs, antenna-wise ST-FOE and FOC is supported for eCPRI 7-2e FR1 TDD**.**

Subcell type support is as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6\_replaced([11094165](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kmaBcPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.3.0-4 Antenna wise CFO Antenna wise CFO estimation and compensation for MU receiver (ID: 11102725)

**2.4.2.4.4.3.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `13397692`)

Antenna wise CFO
DU for Loki, Thor **[CB016061-B2] and GPU**[End CB016061-B2] **L1 HW, for each paired UE :**\*\*\*\*

* shall use the antenna-wise estimate for inter symbol CFO compensation on PUSCH. The relationship between the elements of long term Cfo metric per antenna and the spatial streams is given in [11102733](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knmUTvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).
* Additionally, shall perform antennas-wise ST FOE and report it to 5G-L2-PS for LT averaging (cf. [11151021](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksW4cfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) . The mapping of each element of the antenna wise ST FOE to the spatial stream is provided in [11102733](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knmUTvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.3.0-5 Antenna wise CFO Mapping of antenna wise ST/LT CFO to spatial streams for MU receiver (ID: 11102733)

**2.4.2.4.4.3.0-5.0-4**  (ID: `11102745`)

Antenna wise CFO
DU or Radio (7-2e) shall estimate an antenna-wise ST FOE (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_8991\_replaced([11102725](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knmUS_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The mapping of each element of the per antenna ST FOE to the spatial stream depends eCPRI configuration as below. The same mapping shall be considered for the LT FOE estimate received from 5G-L2-PS.

Mapping between antenna-wise ST FOE/LT FOE and spatial stream for eCPRI

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Subcell Type | Short Term FOE for antenna i and UE j (j=0,1) | Long Term FOE for antenna i and UE j (j=0,1) | eCPRI spatial stream | First feature |
| C4 | ST CFO metric antenna 0 for UEj | LT CFO metric antenna 0 for UEj | ceAxC0 | CB008360-A |
| ST CFO metric antenna 1 for UEj | LT CFO metric antenna 1 for UEj | ceAxC1 |  |  |
| ST CFO metric antenna 2 for UEj | LT CFO metric antenna 2 for UEj | ceAxC2 |  |  |
| ST CFO metric antenna 3 for UEj | LT CFO metric antenna 3 for UEj | ceAxC3 |  |  |
| Subcell Type | Short Term FOE for antenna i and UE j (j=0,1,2,3) | Long Term FOE for antenna i and UE j (j=0,1,2,3) | eCPRI spatial stream | First feature |
| C8 | ST CFO metric antenna 0 for UEj | LT CFO metric antenna 0 for UEj | ceAxC0 | CB009363-F |
| ST CFO metric antenna 1 for UEj | LT CFO metric antenna 1 for UEj | ceAxC1 |  |  |
| ST CFO metric antenna i for UEj | LT CFO metric antenna i for UEj | ceAxC i        (i=2..5) |  |  |
| ST CFO metric antenna 6 for UEj | LT CFO metric antenna 6 for UEj | ceAxC6 |  |  |
| ST CFO metric antenna 7 for UEj | LT CFO metric antenna 7 for UEj | ceAxC7 |  |  |
| C16’4 | short term CFO metric antenna 0 | short term CFO metric antenna 0 | ceAxC0 | CB010708-C |
|  | short term CFO metric antenna 1 | short term CFO metric antenna 1 | ceAxC1 |  |
|  | short term CFO metric antenna  j | short term CFO metric antenna  j | ceAxCj |  |
|  | short term CFO metric antenna 15 | short term CFO metric antenna 15 | ceAxC 15 |  |

Please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_11081\_replaced([11104129](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn5PMPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for 4Rx MU receiver inputs vs outputs.

Please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19619\_replaced([11104193](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn52R_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for 8Rx for MU receiver inputs vs outputs. ST values shall be set to invalid for beams of other UEs, in such case the corresponding long term values shall be equal one single LT CFO (cf. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_20557\_replaced([11151124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksXfgfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Note : For i=0, 1 ...N-1 with N=NRCELL\numberOfRxBeamforming  LT CFO metric antenna i of UE j shall be be filled with same information (cf. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_6911\_replaced([11151021](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksW4cfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for long term average in L2-PS).

If eCPRI 7-2e is activated via NIDD parameter [Before CB009514-L] NRBTS.actEcpri72e [CB009514-L] NRCELL.actEcpri72e [End CB009514-L], C16’4 is supported in Radio, ST FOE is implemented at Radio. ceAxC0~ceAxC15 are internal spatial stream ID's used in Radio.

---

##### 2.4.2.4.4.4 CFO validation

###### 2.4.2.4.4.4.0-1 CFO validation LT CFO validation for value 0 (ID: 11102750)

**2.4.2.4.4.4.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `13335948`)

CFO validation
When overall LT CFO (see [11150515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksT1LvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is 0 (i.e. 0+j0):

DU (for Loner, Loki, Thor [CB016066-C] and GPU [End CB016066-C]) and Radio (for Thor (Radio 7-2e)) shall assume frequency offset is 0Hz.

When the antenna wise LT CFO (see [11150515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksT1LvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is 0 (i.e. 0+j0) for some or all antennas:

DU or Radio shall assume frequency offset is 0Hz for the corresponding antennas.

---

###### 2.4.2.4.4.4.0-2 CFO validation ST CFO Protection (ID: 11102760)

**2.4.2.4.4.4.0-2.0-7**  (ID: `13486870`)

CFO validation
For TDD FR1 DU (for Loki , Thor,**and GPU  L1 HW) and Radio (for Thor (Radio 7-2e)) L1 HWs,  
for FDD DU (for Loki, Thor**[CB016062-AD] and GPU **[End CB016062-AD]  L1HW), for all UEs in the cell, here are the inputs and the outputs that DU or Radio shall handle**for PUSCH ST CFO Protection based on [11151348](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksYtqPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ):***\****\*

**Inputs:**

 NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actDisableFoeProtection (or rrmLargestFoeGap) as per [11151348](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksYtqPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)

 "rrmLargestFoeGap" as defined in [11151348](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksYtqPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)

 rad parameter **rdUlStFoeScaler (see [11110529](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpFiB_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**

**Algorithm:**

 DU or Radio**shall perform the Max value protection for the total FOE as described in section “2.3.3.3" in 5GMax algorithm specification (see [11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**

**Outputs:**

 *shortTermCfoMetric and* shortTermCfoMetricOfAnt values as per [11150775](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksVDTfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).\*\*

**[Before CB016062-AD] NOTE: for FDD in DU with GPU L1 HW, the ST CFO Protection method is not supported**[End CB016062-AD]\*\*\*\*

---

#### 2.4.2.4.5 Phase noise estimation and compensation

##### 2.4.2.4.5.1 Phase noise compensation overview

###### 2.4.2.4.5.1.0-1 Phase noise compensation overview (ID: 11102776)

**2.4.2.4.5.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11102781`)

Phase noise compensation overview
According to number of allocated RBGs, UL PTRS activation and LT FOE validity (long term frequency offset estimation from 5G-L2-PS cf. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_3333\_replaced([11151157](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksXfhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), either LT FOE  or L1 ST PNE ( short term phase noise estimate) or L1 ST DMRS based FOE shall be selected to perform PNC (Phase Noise Compensation) on PUSCH at DU(L1) [CB007595-B] or Radio(L1) [End CB007595-B].

The information needed for the selection (i.e. MCS index, # of allocated PRBs and CFO validity) are sent by 5G-L2-PS.

DU(L1) shall compare #allocated RBGs to a threshold. The thresholds depend on the number of layers, number of Rx antennas, MCS index for the supported tables (cf. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1004\_replaced([11103430](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knveNPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and frequency range (FR1 or FR2).

Please refer to details for L1 HW in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_21523\_replaced([11102784](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knniYPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB007595-B]

Note:

-"5G-L1-UL" is changed to "DU(L1)" since this version as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_20317\_replaced([11094116](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kmZaYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). (Note kept only in this version)

- For eCPRI 7-2e, PTRS based PNE/PNC and FR2 are not in scope.

[End CB007595-B]

---

##### 2.4.2.4.5.2 Phase noise compensation per L1 HW

###### 2.4.2.4.5.2.0-1 Phase noise compensation per L1 HW Input for phase noise compensation for Loner L1 HW in FR1 and FR2 (ID: 11102786)

**2.4.2.4.5.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11102789`)

Phase noise compensation per L1 HW
For Loner L1 HW:

As explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_923\_replaced([11102776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knm7YPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), parameters needed are sent from 5G-L2-PS.

For PUSCH scheduled by RAR UL grant, no PTRS is available but multiple DM-RS are sent .When 3 DMRS, the PNC shall be processed with Short Term FOE (ST FOE).

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Valid LT FO estimate (5G\_UP\_ALG\_3333\_replaced([11151157](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksXfhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) | PTRS is enabled | Allocated RBGs higher than threshold\* (for given MCS) | Num DMRS symbols | Decision |
| Yes | Yes | No | - | (a) Skip PNE, PNC |
| Yes | Yes | Yes | - | (b) Compute PNE and use it for PNC |
| Yes | No | - | - | (a) Skip PNE, PNC |
| No | Yes | - | - | (b) Compute PNE and use it for PNC |
| No | No | - | 3 | (c) Compute ST FOE based DMRS and use it for PNC |
| No | No | - | 1,2 | (a) Skip PNE, PNC |

Note1: the ST CFO estimate (or ST FOE) is computed at 5G-L1-UL by using multiple DMRS in PUSCH scheduled by RAR UL grant, as stated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_883\_replaced([11102472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knip5vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note2: (a),(b),(c), are illustrated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_836\_replaced([11102113](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kneYdfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

More details about the PNC handling at L1 are given in "2.3.9.4 Implementation steps for PNE and PNC" of the 5GMax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

(\*) Threshold tables (5G\_UP\_ALG\_923\_replaced([11102776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knm7YPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) used are specified in section 2.3.9.5.3 of the 5GMax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

###### 2.4.2.4.5.2.0-2 Phase noise compensation per L1 HW Input for phase noise compensation for Loki in FR1 TDD**** (ID: 11102792)

**2.4.2.4.5.2.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11102799`)

Phase noise compensation per L1 HW
For Loki [Before CB008325-5G-AA,CB008325-5G-BA]  and Thor [End CB008325-5G-AA,CB008325-5G-BA] L1 HWs:

As explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_923\_replaced([11102776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knm7YPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), parameters needed are sent from 5G-L2-PS.

For PUSCH scheduled by RAR UL grant, no PTRS is available but multiple DM-RS are sent. When 2,3 DMRS, the PNC shall be processed with Short Term FOE (ST FOE).

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Valid LT FO estimate (5G\_UP\_ALG\_3333\_replaced([11151157](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksXfhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) | PTRS is enabled | Allocated RBGs higher than threshold\* (for given MCS) | Num DMRS symbols | Decision |
| Yes | Yes | No | 1 | (d) Compute PNC based on LT FOE |
| Yes | Yes | Yes | 1 | (b) Compute PNE and use it for PNC |
| Yes | Yes | - | 2,3 | (d) Compute PNC based on LT FOE |
| Yes | No | - | - | (d) Compute PNC based on LT FOE |
| No | Yes | - | 1 | (b) Compute PNE and use it for PNC |
| No | Yes | - | 2,3 | (c) Compute ST FOE based DMRS and use it for PNC |
| No | No | - | 1 | (a) Skip PNE and PNC |
| No | No | - | 2,3 | (c) Compute ST FOE based DMRS and use it for PNC |

Note1: the ST CFO estimate (or ST FOE) is computed at 5G-L1-UL by using multiple DMRS in PUSCH scheduled by RAR UL grant, as stated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_883\_replaced([11102472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knip5vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note2: (a),(b),(c), (d) are illustrated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_840\_replaced([11102122](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kneYd_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[Before CB008325-5G-AA,CB008325-5G-BA] Note2: For Thor L1 HW, PTRS is not enabled, reference is 5G\_UP\_ALG\_14952\_replaced([11102129](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kneYefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CB008325-5G-AA,CB008325-5G-BA]

More details about the PNC handling at L1 are given in "2.3.9.4 Implementation steps for PNE and PNC" of the 5GMax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

(\*) Threshold tables (5G\_UP\_ALG\_923\_replaced([11102776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knm7YPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) used are specified in section 2.3.9 of the 5GMax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[CB008325-5G-AA,CB008325-5G-BA] For Thor L1 HW please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_10645\_replaced([11102802](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knniZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).  [End CB008325-5G-AA,CB008325-5G-BA]

---

###### 2.4.2.4.5.2.0-3 Phase noise compensation per L1 HW Input for phase noise compensation for Thor L1 HW in FR1 (ID: 11102802)

**2.4.2.4.5.2.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11102807`)

Phase noise compensation per L1 HW
For Thor [CB007595-B] and Thor (Radio 7-2e)  [End CB007595-B] L1 HW:

As explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_923\_replaced([11102776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knm7YPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), parameters needed are sent from 5G-L2-PS.

For PUSCH scheduled by RAR UL grant, no PTRS is available but multiple DM-RS are sent. When 2,3 DMRS, the PNC shall be processed with Short Term FOE (ST FOE).

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Valid LT FO estimate (5G\_UP\_ALG\_3333\_replaced([11151157](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksXfhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) | PTRS is enabled | Allocated RBGs higher than threshold\* (for given MCS) | Num DMRS symbols | Decision |
| Yes | Yes | No | 1 | (d) Perform PNC based on LT FOE |
| Yes | Yes | Yes | 1 | (b) Compute PNE and use it for PNC |
| Yes | Yes | - | 2,3 | (d) Perform PNC based on LT FOE |
| Yes | No | - | - | (d) Perform PNC based on LT FOE |
| No | Yes | - | 1 | (b) Compute PNE and use it for PNC |
| No | Yes | - | 2,3 | (c) Compute ST FOE based DMRS and use it for PNC |
| No | No | - | 1 | (a) Skip PNE, PNC |
| No | No | - | 2,3 | (c) Compute ST FOE based DMRS and use it for PNC |

Note1: the ST CFO estimate (or ST FOE) is computed at DU(L1) [CB007595-B] or Radio(L1) [End CB007595-B] by using multiple DMRS in PUSCH scheduled by RAR UL grant, as stated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_883\_replaced([11102472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knip5vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note2: (a),(b),(c),(d) are illustrated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_14952\_replaced([11102129](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kneYefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note3: (d) Compute PNC based on LT FOE means use LT FOE to do inter-symbol FOC

[CB007595-B]

Note4: For eCPRI 7-2e, PTRS based PNC/PNE is not in scope.

Note5: "5G-L1-UL" is changed to "DU(L1)" since this version as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_20317\_replaced([11094116](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kmZaYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). (Note kept only in this version)

[End CB007595-B]

More details about the PNC handling at L1 are given in "2.3.9.4 Implementation steps for PNE and PNC" of the 5GMax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

(\*) Threshold tables (5G\_UP\_ALG\_923\_replaced([11102776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knm7YPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) used are specified in section 2.3.9 of the 5GMax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

###### 2.4.2.4.5.2.0-4 Phase noise compensation per L1 HW Input for phase noise compensation for Loki L1 HW in FR1 for HST (ID: 11102810)

**2.4.2.4.5.2.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11102813`)

Phase noise compensation per L1 HW
When NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actHighSpeedCell is enabled (5G\_UP\_389\_replaced([11349354](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubd86_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and PTRS is configured (see 5G\_UP\_382\_replaced([11349281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubdV4vvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then DMRS or PTRS shall be configured at 5G-L1-UL and PNE,PNC is performed as follows:

As explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_923\_replaced([11102776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knm7YPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), parameters needed are sent from 5G-L2-PS.

For PUSCH scheduled by RAR UL grant, no PTRS is available but multiple DM-RS are sent. When 2,3 DMRS, the PNC shall be processed with Short Term FOE (ST FOE)

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Valid LT FO estimate (5G\_UP\_ALG\_3333\_replaced([11151157](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksXfhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) |  | PTRS |  | Waveform |  | Allocated RBGs higher than threshold\* (for given MCS) |  | Num DMRS symbols |  | Decision |  |
| Yes |  | Yes/No |  | CP-OFDM |  | - |  | 2,3 |  | Skip PNE, PNC |  |
| Yes |  | Yes/No |  | DFT-s-OFDM(\*) |  | - |  | 3 |  | Skip PNE, PNC |  |
|  | No |  | Yes |  | CP-OFDM |  | - |  | 2 |  | Compute ST FOE based DMRS and PTRS or on PTRS only. This choice shall depend on rdUlCfoEstimationHstMethod defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9762\_replaced([11110283](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpCesfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Resulting ST FOE is used for PNC |
|  | No |  | Yes |  | CP-OFDM |  | - |  | 3 |  | Compute ST FOE based DMRS and use it for PNC |
|  | No |  | No |  | CP-OFDM |  | - |  | 2,3 |  | Compute ST FOE based DMRS and use it for PNC |
|  | No |  | Yes/No |  | DFT-s-OFDM(\*) |  | - |  | 3 |  | Compute ST FOE based DMRS and use it for PNC |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |

(\*)When DFT-s-OFDM is selected, DMRS shall be configured to UE (despite NIDD configuration) so that 5G-L1-UL always receives DFT-s-OFDM with 3 DMRS.

(\*) Threshold tables (5G\_UP\_ALG\_923\_replaced([11102776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knm7YPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) used are specified in section 2.3.9 of the 5GMax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

###### 2.4.2.4.5.2.0-5 Phase noise compensation per L1 HW Input for phase noise compensation for Thor L1 HW in FR1 for HST (ID: 11102816)

**2.4.2.4.5.2.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `11102820`)

Phase noise compensation per L1 HW
For Thor [CB010708-I] and Thor (Radio 7-2e) [End CB010708-I] L1 HW, when NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/actHighSpeedCell is enabled (5G\_UP\_389\_replaced([11349354](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubd86_vkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and PTRS [CB010708-I] (**)  [End CB010708-I]  is configured (see 5G\_UP\_382\_replaced([11349281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubdV4vvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), then DMRS or PTRS  [CB010708-I] (**)  [End CB010708-I] shall be configured at 5G-L1-UL and PNE, PNC is performed as follows:

As explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_923\_replaced([11102776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knm7YPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), parameters needed are sent from 5G-L2-PS.

For PUSCH scheduled by RAR UL grant, no PTRS is available but multiple DM-RS are sent. When 2,3 DMRS, the PNC shall be processed with Short Term FOE (ST FOE).

[CB010708-I] (\*\*) PTRS is not supported in eCPRI 7-2e, with NRBTS/NRCELL/actEcpri72e enabled. [End CB010708-I]

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Valid LT FO estimate (5G\_UP\_ALG\_3333\_replaced([11151157](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksXfhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) |  | PTRS [CB010708-I] (\*\*)  [End CB010708-I] | Waveform | Allocated RBGs higher than threshold\* (for given MCS) |  | Num DMRS symbols |  | Decision |
| Yes |  | Yes/No | CP-OFDM | - |  | 2,3 |  | Compute PNC based on LT FOE |
| Yes |  | Yes / No | DFT-s-OFDM(\*) | - |  | 3 |  | Compute PNC based on LT FOE |
|  | No | Yes | CP-OFDM |  | - |  | 2 | Compute ST FOE based DMRS and PTRS or on PTRS only. This choice shall depend on rdUlCfoEstimationHstMethod defined in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_9762\_replaced([11110283](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpCesfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Resulting ST FOE is used for PNC |
|  | No | Yes | CP-OFDM |  | - |  | 3 | Compute ST FOE based DMRS and use it for PNC |
|  | No | No | CP-OFDM |  | - |  | 2,3 | Compute ST FOE based DMRS and use it for PNC |
|  | No | Yes / No | DFT-s-OFDM(\*) |  | - |  | 3 | Compute ST FOE based DMRS and use it for PNC |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |

(\*)When DFT-s-OFDM is selected, DMRS shall be configured to UE (despite NIDD configuration) so that 5G-L1-UL always receives DFT-s-OFDM with 3 DMRS

(\*) Threshold tables (5G\_UP\_ALG\_923\_replaced([11102776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knm7YPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) used are specified in section 2.3.9 of the 5GMax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

###### 2.4.2.4.5.2.0-6 Phase noise compensation per L1 HW Input for phase noise compensation for Loki and Thor L1 HW in FR2 (ID: 11102823)

**2.4.2.4.5.2.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `11102829`)

Phase noise compensation per L1 HW
For Loki and **[CB010576-A] Thor** [End CB010576-A] L1 HW:\*\*\*\*

As explained in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_923\_replaced([11102776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knm7YPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), parameters needed are sent from 5G-L2-PS.

For PUSCH scheduled by RAR UL grant, no PTRS is available but multiple DM-RS are sent .When 3 DMRS, the PNC shall be processed with Short Term FOE (ST FOE).

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Valid LT FO estimate (5G\_UP\_ALG\_3333\_replaced([11151157](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksXfhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) | PTRS is enabled | Allocated RBGs higher than threshold\* (for given MCS) | Num DMRS symbols | Decision |
| Yes | Yes | No | - | (a) Skip PNE, PNC |
| Yes | Yes | Yes | - | (b) Compute PNE and use it for PNC |
| Yes | No | - | - | (a) Skip PNE, PNC |
| No | Yes | - | - | (b) Compute PNE and use it for PNC |
| No | No | - | 1 | (a) Skip PNE, PNC |
| No | No | - | 2,3 | (c) Compute ST FOE based DMRS and use it for PNC |

Note1: the ST CFO estimate (or ST FOE) is computed at 5G-L1-UL by using multiple DMRS in PUSCH scheduled by RAR UL grant, as stated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_883\_replaced([11102472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knip5vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note2: (a),(b),(c), are illustrated in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_840\_replaced([11102122](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kneYd_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

More details about the PNC handling at L1 are given in "2.3.9.4 Implementation steps for PNE and PNC" of the 5GMax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

(\*) Threshold tables (5G\_UP\_ALG\_923\_replaced([11102776](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knm7YPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) used are specified in section 2.3.9 of the 5GMax algorithm specifications (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
