#### 2.4.2.14.3 DMRS related information

##### 2.4.2.14.3.0-1 DMRS related information DMRS Ports allocation for UL MU MIMO for single-symbol DMRS (ID: 11104363)

**2.4.2.14.3.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `13313671`)

DMRS related information
The 5G-L1-UL shall handle PUSCH reception with DMRS port allocation as described in table in case of MU pairing. Table below corresponds to a same scrambling ID among paired UEs.

Please refer to :

- [11103188](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kntB8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) for MU receiver Antenna Ports supported configuration.

- 3gpp 38.212 Tables 7.3.1.1.2-8~11 for CDM group supported configurations and corresponding DCI antenna ports.

- [CB008148-C] [13313026](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_bQoZTs6WEfCVOOJMfwsFiw) DMRS waveform within CDM group [End CB008148-C]

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Description | 1st C16'4 subcell**or C16'2 (\*)** |  |  |  |  | First feature |
| UE allocation | DMRS antenna ports |  |  |  |  |  |
| UE0 | UE1 | UE2 | UE3 |  |  |  |
| No pairing | 1 UE rank 1 | 0 | NA | NA | NA |  |
| No pairing | 1 UE rank 2 | (0,1) | NA | NA | NA |  |
| **2 UEs paired** | 2 UE rank 1 | 0 | 2 | NA | NA | CB010708-E-UPD001 |
| 2 UEs paired | 2 UE rank 2 | (0,1) | (2,3) | NA | NA | CB010708-C |
| 2 UEs paired | 1 UE rank 2 +  1 UE rank1 | (0,1) | 2 | NA | NA | CB010708-E |
| 2 UEs paired | 1 UE rank 1 +  1 UE rank2 | 0 | (2,3) | NA | NA | CB010708-E |
| 3 UEs paired | 1 UEs rank2 +   2 UEs rank 1 | (0,1) | 2 | 3 | NA | CB010708-E |
| 3 UEs paired | 2 UEs rank1 + 1 UEs rank 2 | 0 | 1 | (2,3) | NA | CB010708-E |
| 3 UEs paired | 3 UEs rank 1 | 0 | 1 | 2 | NA | CB010708-E |
| 4 UEs paired | 4 UEs rank1 | 0 | 1 | 2 | 3 | CB010708-E |

(\*) Only case supported for C16'2 subcell is 2 rank1 UEs.

Please refer to [11147413](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksGZyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) for PUSCH reception DMRS ports allocation .

For SU vs MU receiver illustration, please refer to [11104259](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn6dX_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

For MU receiver support regarding L1 HW, please refer to [11103056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knrMwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

---

##### 2.4.2.14.3.0-2 DMRS related information DMRS Ports allocation for UL MU MIMO for double-symbol DMRS (ID: 11104374)

**2.4.2.14.3.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `13313673`)

DMRS related information
The Radio for Thor L1 HW with eCPRI 7-2e shall handle PUSCH reception with DMRS port allocation as described in table in case of MU pairing. Table below corresponds to a same scrambling ID among paired UEs.

Please refer to:

* ([11103216](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kntB-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for MU receiverAntenna Ports supported configuration.
* 3gpp 38.212 tables 7.3.1.1.2-12 and 7.3.1.1.2-13 CDM group supported configurations and corresponding DCI antenna ports.

- [CB008148-C] [13313026](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_bQoZTs6WEfCVOOJMfwsFiw) DMRS waveform within CDM group [End CB008148-C]

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Description | 1st C16'8 subcell |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  | First feature |
| UE allocation | DMRS antenna ports |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| UE0 | UE1 | UE2 | UE3 | UE4 | UE5 | UE6 | UE7 |  |  |  |
| 4 UEs paired | 4 UEs rank2 | (0,1) | (2,3) | (4,5) | (6,7) | NA | NA | NA | NA | CB008235-A |
| 8 UEs paired | 8 UEs rank1 | 0 | 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | 7 | CB008235-A |

Please refer to [11147413](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksGZyPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) for PUSCH reception DMRS ports allocation .

For SU vs MU receiver illustration, please refer to [11104259](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn6dX_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

For MU receiver support regarding L1 HW, please refer to [11103056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knrMwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

---

### 2.4.2.15 UL Slot Aggregation (SAg)

#### 2.4.2.15.1 Overview

##### 2.4.2.15.1.0-1 Overview (ID: 11104383)

**2.4.2.15.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11104386`)

Overview
5G-L1-UL shall receive a PUSCH bundle in slot aggregation mode (PUSCH repetition type A) when indicated by 5G-L2-PS according to conditions detailed in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18906\_replaced([11204759](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwlRLvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

L1 HW support for PUSCH repetition type A is as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19458\_replaced([11104407](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn8Sj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Number of repetitions (or K in 38214 section 6.1.2.1) supported per L1 HW is as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19461\_replaced([11104417](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn8Sk_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The number of repetition is variable depending on radio conditions, please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18904\_replaced([11204726](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwlRKfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19294\_replaced([11205395](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwo7i_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

5G-L1-UL shall perform DTX computation (5G\_UP\_ALG\_1717\_replaced([11109147](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko0cQPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) using method (according to L1 HW) as per 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19466\_replaced([11109190](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko0cTvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

5G-L1-UL shall send Invalid DTX (5G\_UP\_ALG\_19773\_replaced([11109752](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko7xBvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for any intermediate repetitions.

5G-L1-UL shall wait for the end the bundle before sending valid DTX result (either 0 or 1) to 5G-L2-PS in the last repetition.

5G-L1-UL shall send Invalid CRC (5G\_UP\_ALG\_19850\_replaced([11109760](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko7xCfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for any intermediate repetitions.

Redundancy version is specified in 3GPP 38214 Table 6.1.2.1-2.

5G-L1-UL shall combine the receptions of the whole bundle (independant of DTX) before sending valid CRC result (either 0 or 1) to 5G-L2-PS in the last repetition.

Except DTX and CRC, 5G-L1-UL shall report all measurements (see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1606\_replaced([11107878](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_koj9k_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for each repetition.

Note : Invalid DTX (5G\_UP\_ALG\_19773\_replaced([11109752](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko7xBvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is used for intermediate repetitions to allow L2 averaging to continue (e.g. Frequency Offset, Timing offset) as per 5GMAX recommendation ( resp. section 5.1 and 5.2 in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Only DTXed measurements are ignored at 5G-L2-PS.

---

#### 2.4.2.15.2 UL Rank and UL NR waveforms

##### 2.4.2.15.2.0-1 UL Rank and UL NR waveforms UL rank and UL NR waveforms (ID: 11104394)

**2.4.2.15.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11104396`)

UL Rank and UL NR waveforms
5G-L1-UL shall not expect to receive PUSCH repetition type A with more than one layer according to 3GPP 38214 section 6.1.2.1.

5G-L1-UL shall not expect to receive PUSCH repetition type A with CP-OFDM waveform as per gNB design : please refer to transitions related to SAg and Transform Precoder state detailed in 5G\_UP\_ALG\_18906\_replaced([11204759](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwlRLvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 2.4.2.15.3 CFO estimation and compensation

##### 2.4.2.15.3.0-1 CFO estimation and compensation CFO estimatiom and compensation (ID: 11104401)

**2.4.2.15.3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11104404`)

CFO estimation and compensation
5G-L1-UL shall expect to use long term FO averaged at 5G-L2-PS to perform FOC in the reception of each repetition as specificed in section 5.1 of 5GMAX specification (5G\_UP\_ALG\_695\_replaced([11101310](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knWcovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Rules for CFO estimation and compensation are following 5G\_UP\_ALG\_883\_replaced([11102472](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knip5vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

#### 2.4.2.15.4 UL SAg support per L1 HW

##### 2.4.2.15.4.0-1 UL SAg support per L1 HW UL slot aggregation support (ID: 11104408)

**2.4.2.15.4.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `12574791`)

UL SAg support per L1 HW
UL slot aggregation support ([11104383](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn8SgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) is as follow :

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **L1 HW** | **FR1 TDD** | **FR1 FDD** | **FR2 TDD** | **First Feature** |
| Loner L1 HW | - | supported | - | CB008236-A |
| Loki L1 HW | supported | supported  [CB013204-A] (\*)  [End CB013204-A] | - | CB008236-A |
| VDU L1 HW | - | - | - | **-** |
| Thor L1 HW | - | supported [CB013204-A] (\*)  [End CB013204-A] | - | **CB010776-5G-A** |

[CB013204-A] (\*) When NRBTS\NRCELL\actOptPuschPrbAlloc = true , Slot Aggregation Mode is supported with UE granted with more than PRBs number defined in [11205080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwnGV_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and [11209207](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwyFfPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). Refer to [11104383](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn8SgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). [End CB013204-A]

---

#### 2.4.2.15.5 Supported number of repetitions

##### 2.4.2.15.5.0-1 Supported number of repetitions Supported number of repetitions values for PUSCH in FR1 FDD (ID: 11104420)

**2.4.2.15.5.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11104425`)

Supported number of repetitions
As introduced in [11104383](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn8SgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9), the supported number of repetitions (or K in 38214 section 6.1.2.1) are as follow:

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **Number of repetitions** | **2** | **4** | **8** | **First Feature** |
| Loner L1 HW | supported | supported | - | CB008236-A |
| Loki L1 HW | supported | supported | - | CB008236-A |
| VDU L1 HW | - | - | - | **-** |
| Thor L1 HW | supported | supported | - | **CB010776-5G-A** |

Important note: This number of repetition is number of consecutive UL slots, not always equal to the value RRC configured to UE, which includes intermediate DL slots.

---

##### 2.4.2.15.5.0-2 Supported number of repetitions Supported number of repetitions values for PUSCH in FR1 TDD (ID: 11104428)

**2.4.2.15.5.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11104430`)

Supported number of repetitions
Supported number of repetitions (or K in 38214 section 6.1.2.1) are as follow :

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Number of repetitions | 2 | 4 | 8 | First Feature |
| Loner L1 HW | - | - | - | - |
| Loki L1 HW | supported | supported | - | CB011118-A |
| VDU L1 HW | - | - | - | - |
| Thor L1 HW | - | - | - | - |

Important note: This number of repetition is number of consecutive UL slots, not always equal to the value RRC configured to UE, which includes intermediate DL slots.

---

#### 2.4.2.15.6 UCI on PUSCH in SAg

##### 2.4.2.15.6.0-1 UCI on PUSCH in SAg UCI request during slot aggregation (ID: 11104435)

**2.4.2.15.6.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11104438`)

UCI on PUSCH in SAg
5G-L1-UL shall receive UCI on PUSCH (cf. 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19296\_replaced([11205407](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwo7jfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) on a given repetition when reception on slot aggregation mode is ongoing.

Please refer to 5G\_UP\_ALG\_19458\_replaced([11104407](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn8Sj_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to L1 HW support.

Note: Current assumption is that methods are same as legacy for 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1720\_replaced([11109204](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko1DVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1723\_replaced([11109249](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko1qY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G\_UP\_ALG\_1726\_replaced([11109283](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ko1qbvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

### 2.4.2.16 UL Coordinated Multi-Point (CoMP) for PUSCH

#### 2.4.2.16.1 Overview

##### 2.4.2.16.1.0-1 Overview UL CoMP processing for joint reception (ID: 12746790)

**2.4.2.16.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12746793`)

Overview
In ~~CPRI~~ non-beamforming deployment, DU shall support UL coordinated multi-point (CoMP) joint reception by using the data received on the serving cell and helper cell antennas (see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) for the definition of serving cell and helper cell concept).

DU shall support the co-existence of UEs configured for UL CoMP joint reception and non-UL CoMP reception in the same cell and slot.

inputs:

* UL CoMP activation status (NIDD parameter NRCELL.actNrUlComp) of the serving cell (see [12763065)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)
* Sub-cell type (see [11094230](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kmaogfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))
* Serving cell ID of the current UE (cell instance where PUSCH reception is executed)
* Joint reception request for the current UE (see [12742863](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6OPBknyfEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))
* Helper cell ID for the current UE (see [12742863](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6OPBknyfEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))
* PUSCH configuration of the UE on the serving cell (see [12774299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_VasUHopPEfCrqOdGJPoCRA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

Algorithm:

When:

* NRCELL.actNrUlComp is set to BASIC and
* the UE is selected for UL CoMP joint reception (see [12740825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G7GPo3v5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))

DU shall:

* Fetch data from the receiving antennas of the serving cell and the helper cell
* Perform front-end processing, RS processing and data processing from serving cell and helper cell data, using PUSCH configuration of the UE on the serving cell.
* When sub-cell type is 'A4'
* DU shall perform joint reception using 8Rx receiver algorithm

Output:

* PUSCH decoded data
* PUSCH measurements
* Pre-equalized SINR measurement from serving and helper cells (see [12748020](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9USZoH9qEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

---

##### 2.4.2.16.1.0-2 Overview UL CoMP processing for candidate cell SINR measurement (ID: 12746791)

**2.4.2.16.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12746864`)

Overview
In ~~CPRI~~ non-beamforming deployment, DU shall perform channel estimation on candidate cells for UL coordinate multi-point (CoMP), in order to provided post-equalized SINR measurement. (see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

Input:

* UL CoMP activation status (NIDD parameter NRCELL.actNrUlComp) of the serving cell
* Sub-cell type (see [11094230](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kmaogfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))
* Serving cell ID of the current UE (cell instance where PUSCH reception is executed)
* UL CoMP SINR measurement request for the current UE (see [12742863](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6OPBknyfEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))
* List of candidate cell IDs for the current UE (see [12742863](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6OPBknyfEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)),
* PUSCH configuration of the UE on the serving cell (see [12774299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_VasUHopPEfCrqOdGJPoCRA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

Algorithm:

When NRCELL.actNrUlComp is set to BASIC and the UE is selected for UL CoMP basic SINR measurements from candidate cells (see [12742860](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_pHagAHyeEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))

DU shall perform PUSCH reception (front-end processing, RS processing and data processing) for the serving cell (see [12740728](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_YybVAXviEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))

For each candidate cell (see [12740728](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_YybVAXviEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall:

* Fetch data from the receiving antennas of the candidate cell
* Perform front-end processing ([11101922](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndKUvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) and RS processing ([11102011](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndxY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) using PUSCH configuration of the UE on the serving cell, while skipping the following blocks:
* timing offset estimation
* frequency offset estimation
* phase noise estimation and compensation
* rank and TPMI computation.
* Skip data processing.

Output:

* PUSCH decoded data and measurements from serving cell
* Pre-equalized SINR measurement from serving and candidate cells (see [12748020](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9USZoH9qEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

---

#### 2.4.2.16.2 PUSCH configuration

##### 2.4.2.16.2.0-1 PUSCH configuration PUSCH configuration for UL CoMP (ID: 12774299)

**2.4.2.16.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12767061`)

PUSCH configuration
When basic Ul CoMP is activated (NRCELL.actNrUlComp = 'basic' - see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall support PUSCH configuration as summarized below. This configuration applies to PUSCH reception on serving, helper and all candidate cells (see [12763061](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_gSJKEIOREfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

* Resource allocation as described [11101400](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knXDuvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9),
* DMRS configuration as described in [11101674](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knaHDPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9),
* PTRS configuration as described in [11101850](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kncjQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9),
* Spatial configuration as described in [11103104](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knrz0vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9),
* Precoding matrix configuration as described in [11103323](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knuQHvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9),
* Decoder configuration as described in [11103430](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knveNPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

---

#### 2.4.2.16.3 Channel estimation

##### 2.4.2.16.3.0-1 Channel estimation (ID: 12774315)

**2.4.2.16.3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12767081`)

Channel estimation
In non-beamforming deployment, when UL CoMP is activated (NRCELL.actNrUlComp = 'Basic'), DU shall support channel estimation algorithms (raw channel estimation, time domain interpolation, power delay profile estimation, channel smoothing and noise power estimation) as described in [11102229](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knfmk_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

* When the UE is configured for joint reception (see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall perform channel estimation algorithms on the serving and the helper cell.
* When the UE is configured for SINR measurements on candidate cell (see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall perform channel estimation algorithms on the serving cell and all selected candidate cells.

---

#### 2.4.2.16.4 Timing offset estimation and compensation

##### 2.4.2.16.4.0-1 Timing offset estimation and compensation TO compensation for UL CoMP (ID: 12774384)

**2.4.2.16.4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12767260`)

Timing offset estimation and compensation
In non-beamforming deployment, when UL CoMP is activated (NRCELL.actNrUlComp = 'Basic' - see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall perform timing offset compensation as described in [11102427](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kniC1fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

* When the UE is configured for joint reception (see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall perform time offset compensation on serving and helper cell.
* When the UE is configured for SINR measurements on candidate cells (see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall perform time offset compensation on the serving cell and all selected candidate cells.

---

##### 2.4.2.16.4.0-2 Timing offset estimation and compensation TO estimation for UL CoMP (ID: 12774435)

**2.4.2.16.4.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12746995`)

Timing offset estimation and compensation
In non-beamforming deployment, when UL CoMP is activated (NRCELL.actNrUlComp = 'Basic' - see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall support timing offset estimation as described in [11102448](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kniC3PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

* When the UE is configured for joint reception (see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall perform timing offset estimation on serving and helper cell..
* If the UE is configured for SINR measurements on candidate cells (see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall perform timing offset estimation on the serving cell and skip TO estimation on candidate cells.

Rationale:

* TO estimation from serving and helper cell is used for joint reception.
* TO estimation for candidate cells is not used.

---

#### 2.4.2.16.5 CFO and phase noise estimation and compensation

##### 2.4.2.16.5.0-1 CFO and phase noise estimation and compensation CFO estimation and compensation for UL CoMP (ID: 12770027)

**2.4.2.16.5.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12770028`)

CFO and phase noise estimation and compensation
In non-beamforming deployment, when UlCoMP is activated, DU shall perform CFO estimation and compensation as follows:

Inputs:

* UL CoMP activation status (NIDD parameter NRCELL.actNrUlComp) of the serving cell
* Joint reception request for the current UE (see [12742863](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6OPBknyfEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))
* Long-term FOE validity flag for the serving cell
* Long-term FOE metric (see [11151025](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksW4cvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the serving cell

Algorithm:

When NRCELL.actNrUlComp is set to 'basic'

When the UE is selected for UL CoMP joint reception (see [12740825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G7GPo3v5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))

DU shall perform CFO compensation on both serving and helper cell (see [12763061](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_gSJKEIOREfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) based on long-term CFO validity and metric from the serving cell, as described in [11102603](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knkfF_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

DU shall perform CFO estimation on both serving and helper cell (see [12763061](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_gSJKEIOREfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), based on long-term CFO validity and metric of the serving cell, as described in [11102482](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knip6vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

Else when the UE is selected for SINR measurements on candidate cells

DU shall perform CFO compensation on the serving cell and all candidate cells, based on long-term CFO validity and metric of the serving cell, as described in [11102603](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knkfF_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

DU shall perform CFO estimation on the serving cell, as described in [11102482](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knip6vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

DU shall skip CFO estimation on candidate cells (\*).

Output:

* Short-term CFO estimation
* CFO-compensated data
* Rationale: Short-term CFO estimation on candidate cell is not used.

---

##### 2.4.2.16.5.0-2 CFO and phase noise estimation and compensation Antenna-wise CFO estimation and compensation for UL CoMP (ID: 12770073)

**2.4.2.16.5.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12770091`)

CFO and phase noise estimation and compensation
In non-beamforming deployment, when UL CoMP is activated (NRCELL.actNrUlComp = 'Basic' - see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall support antenna-wise CFO estimation and compensation.

Inputs:

* UL CoMP activation status (NIDD parameter NRCELL.actNrUlComp) of the serving cell
* Joint reception request for the current UE (see [12742863](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6OPBknyfEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))
* Long-term FOE validity flag for the serving cell
* Antenna-wise long-term FOE metric (see [11151025](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksW4cvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the serving cell

Algorithm:

When NRCELL.actNrUlComp is set to 'basic'

When the UE is selected for UL CoMP joint reception (see [12740825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_G7GPo3v5EfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))

DU shall perform CFO estimation and compensation on both serving and helper cell (see [12763061](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_gSJKEIOREfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), as described in [11102672](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knltNPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9), by using long-term CFO validity and antenna-wise long-term CFO metric of the serving cell. The mapping of antenna-wise ST/LT CFO to serving and helper cell streams is shown in [12774531](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_vZCN8IpmEfCrqOdGJPoCRA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

Else when the UE is selected for SINR measurements on candidate cells

DU shall perform antenna-wise CFO compensation on the serving cell and all candidate cells, (see [12763061](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_gSJKEIOREfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), as described in [11102672](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knltNPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9), by using long-term CFO validity and antenna-wise long-term CFO metric of the serving cell,

DU shall perform antenna-wise CFO estimation as described in [11102672](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knltNPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

DU shall skip antenna-wise CFO estimation on candidate cells (\*).

Output:

* Antenna-wise short-term CFO estimation
* CFO-compensated data

---

##### 2.4.2.16.5.0-3 CFO and phase noise estimation and compensation Mapping of antenna-wise CFO estimation for UL CoMP (ID: 12774531)

**2.4.2.16.5.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12774533`)

CFO and phase noise estimation and compensation
Mapping of antenna-wise ST/LT CFO to spatial streams of the serving and helper cell for UL CoMP joint reception.

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Subbcell Type | Cell | Spatial stream | Output short-term FOE | Input long-term FOE of serving cell |
| A4 | Serving | 0 | ST CFO metric antenna 0 | LT CFO metric antenna 0 |
| 1 | ST CFO metric antenna 1 | LT CFO metric antenna 1 |  |  |
| 2 | ST CFO metric antenna 2 | LT CFO metric antenna 2 |  |  |
| 3 | ST CFO metric antenna 3 | LT CFO metric antenna 3 |  |  |
| Helper | 0 | ST CFO metric antenna 4 | LT CFO metric antenna 0 |  |
| 1 | ST CFO metric antenna 5 | LT CFO metric antenna 1 |  |  |
| 2 | ST CFO metric antenna 6 | LT CFO metric antenna 2 |  |  |
| 3 | ST CFO metric antenna 7 | LT CFO metric antenna 3 |  |  |

---

##### 2.4.2.16.5.0-4 CFO and phase noise estimation and compensation Phase noise estimation for UL CoMP (ID: 12774511)

**2.4.2.16.5.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `12767098`)

CFO and phase noise estimation and compensation
In non-beamforming deployment, when UL CoMP is activated (NRCELL.actNrUlComp = 'Basic' - see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall support phase noise estimation and compensation as follows:

* When the UE is configured for joint reception (see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall perform phase noise estimation and compensation as described in [11102772](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knm7XvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9), on serving and helper cell.
* If the UE is configured for candidate cell SINR measurements (see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall perform phase noise estimation and compensation on the serving cell only.

---

#### 2.4.2.16.6 Rank and TPMI computation

##### 2.4.2.16.6.0-1 Rank and TPMI computation Rank and TPMI computation for UL CoMP (ID: 12774551)

**2.4.2.16.6.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12767259`)

Rank and TPMI computation
In non-beamforming deployment, when UL CoMP is activated (NRCELL.actNrUlComp = 'Basic'), DU shall perform rank and TPMI computation as described in [11103651](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knyhivvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9):

* When the UE is configured for joint reception (see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall perform rank and TPMI computation from receiving spatial streams of the serving and the helper cell.
* When the UE is configured for candidate cell SINR measurements (see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall perform rank and TPMI computation on the serving cell only (\*).
* Rationale: Rank and TPMI are not needed for pre-equalized SINR computation.

---

#### 2.4.2.16.7 Equalization

##### 2.4.2.16.7.0-1 Equalization IRC receiver for joint reception for FR1 FDD on Thow L1 HW (ID: 12774562)

**2.4.2.16.7.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12774563`)

Equalization
In FDD non beamforming deployment, when UL CoMP is activated (NRCELL.actNrUlComp = 'basic') and UE is configured for joint reception (see [12763065](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dTd9AIOSEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), DU shall perform IRC receiver algorithm by using data and channel estimation output from serving and helper cell.:

When subcell type is 'A4'

* DU shall perform 8Rx IRC receiver algorithm as described in [11102901](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knpXlPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9),
* DU shall perform Rdd debiasing ([11102962](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knpXnPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9), Rdd averaging ([11102978](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knp-oPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) and Rdd group scaling ([11102986](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knp-ovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) algorithms

---

#### 2.4.2.16.8 UL CoMP Support

##### 2.4.2.16.8.0-1 UL CoMP Support FR1 FDD (ID: 12746894)

**2.4.2.16.8.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12746896`)

UL CoMP Support
DU shall support the following UL CoMP algorithm in FR1 FDD.

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Algorithm | Loner L1 HW | Loki L1 HW | Thor L1 HW | vDU L1 HW |
| UL CoMP 4RX+4RX joint reception ([11102011](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kndxY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) | - | - | Supported | - |
| Candidate cell SINR measurement 4RX ([12746791](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_YgrXgH5wEfCiUemk-K-C4g?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) | - | - | Supported | - |
| First feature |  |  | CB008465-A |  |

---

## 2.4.3 PUCCH Reception

### 2.4.3.0-1 PUCCH Reception Document Owner Rosalia Parello (Nokia) (ID: 11104442)

### 2.4.3.1 Resource allocation

#### 2.4.3.1.0-1 Resource allocation Introduction (ID: 11104448)

**2.4.3.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11104450`)

Resource allocation
5G-L1-UL shall determine the time and frequency domain locations for each received PUCCH resource. The supported configurations per technology and per L1 HW are described in the next requirements.

---

#### 2.4.3.1.1 Time domain resource allocation

##### 2.4.3.1.1.1 TDD FR1

###### 2.4.3.1.1.1.0-1 TDD FR1 TDD FR1- PUCCH Format0 (ID: 11104457)

**2.4.3.1.1.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11104463`)

TDD FR1
Below table gives the supported configurations for:

* Number of symbols per resource, NPUCCHsymb from 38.211 §6.3.2.1
* Starting symbol index per resource, startingSymbolIndex from 38.213 §9.2.1

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| TDD FR1 | Loner |  | Loki |  | vDU\*\* |  |
| Starting symbol | Number of symbols | Starting symbol | Number of symbols | Starting symbol | Number of symbols |  |
| 12, 13 | 1 | 12, 13 | 1 | [Before CNI-103796-M] 12, 13 [End CNI-103796-M] | [Before CNI-103796-M] 1 [End CNI-103796-M] |  |
|  | 12 | 2, with FH disabled/enabled\* | 12 | 2, with FH disabled/enabled\* | [Before CNI-103796-M] 12 [End CNI-103796-M] | [Before CNI-103796-M] 2, with FH disabled/enabled\* [End CNI-103796-M] |
| First feature |  |  |  |  | CB007289-D |  |

\*Intra-slot FH (Frequency Hopping) enabled is supported for conformance tests and for Msg4 in SA mode; otherwise FH disabled is supported from E2E perspective

[CNI-103796-M] \*\*vDU L1 HW is no more supported [End CNI-103796-M]

---

###### 2.4.3.1.1.1.0-2 TDD FR1 TDD FR1- PUCCH Format1 (ID: 11104466)

**2.4.3.1.1.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11104469`)

TDD FR1
Symbol Position and duration

---

**2.4.3.1.1.1.0-2.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `13398586`)

TDD FR1
DU shall support Below configurations for different L1 HWs:

* Number of symbols per resource, NPUCCHsymb from 38.211 §6.3.2.1. Intra-slot FH is supported, see [11496350](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tSFDN_v1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ).
* Starting symbol index per resource, startingSymbolIndex from 38.213 §9.2.1

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **TDD FR1** | **Loner** |  | **LoKi** |  | Thor |  | GPU |  |
| **Starting symbol** | **Number of symbols** | **Starting symbol** | **Number of symbols** | **Starting symbol** | **Number of symbols** | **Starting symbol** | **Number of symbols** |  |
| 0 | 14, with FH disabled/enabled\* | 0 | 14, with FH disabled/enabled\* | 0 | **14, with FH enabled** | 0 | 14, with FH enabled |  |
| **First Feature** |  |  | CB007950-A |  | CB007487-B CB007487-C |  | CB016066-C |  |

\*Intra-slot FH configuration is controlled in the higher layer via this R&D parameter rdLongPucchWithoutFrequencyHopping in 5G\_L3\_4715. It means all the UEs in the same cell are configured similarly for intra-slot FH. When Intra-slot FH is enabled, the start PRB index of the first and the second hop are configured as described in [1599656](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Y3QbdvwOEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). The offset between the 2hops depends on the control information sent on PUCCH (see [11311435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TrZGQvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note: When NRBTS/NRCELL.actDynUlResAlloc='true', DU with Loner Loki, Thor **[CB016061-F] and GPU** [End CB016061-F] **L1 HWs, shall support Intra-slot FH always enabled  
i.e. setting of rdLongPucchWithoutFrequencyHopping = 'true' is not supported.**\*\*\*\*

Note: In case of multiplexing scenarios and intra slot frequency hopping enabled, DU shall process the received PUCCH F1 signal below:

* DU for Loner, Loki, Thor and GPU L1 HW shall process the signal received on the two hops for all the multiplexed UEs
* ~~Scenario3:~~ When all the multiplexed UEs transmitting PUCCH F1 with the same secondHopPrb (secondHopPrb=startPrb of the second hop)) but with different startPrbs in the 1st hop, DU for Loner, Loki, Thor and GPU shall process the signal received on the two hops while considering all the UEs sending control data in the same PRB as multiplexed UEs

For Conformance Tests with number of symbols greater than 1, FH (Frequency Hopping) is always enabled.  
**[Before CB016061-J] Conformance Testing is not in scope of GPU L1 HW**[End CB016061-J]\*\*\*\*

---

**2.4.3.1.1.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11104479`)

TDD FR1
Time domain orthogonal cover codes (OCC)

---

**2.4.3.1.1.1.0-2.0-2.0-7**  (ID: `13398587`)

TDD FR1
DU shall support below configurations for time domain orthogonal cover codes see 38.211 §6.3.2.4.1-2

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **TDD FR1** | **Loner** | **LoKi** | **Thor** | GPU |
| **OCC** | 0 | {0,1,2} | {0,1,2} | {0 **[CB016061-E] 1,2}**[End CB016061-E]\*\*\*\* |
| **First Feature** |  |  | CB007487-B | **CB016066-C** |

When NRBTS/NRCELL/actLongPucchResourceOpt =True, DU for Loki, Thor **[CB016061-E] and GPU** [End CB016061-E]  L1 HW shall support:  
- up to 3 OCCs as configured by NIDD NRBTS/NRCELL/pucchF1ResOccConf,  
- and up to 3*6 UEs multiplexed in the same F1 PRB in the same slot*\*\*\*

with following {OCC, CS} System E2E Configurations:

1 OCC case for each F1 PRB within one cell:

 OCC index=0: CS 0/2/4/6/8/10 or,

 OCC index=0: CS 1/3/5/7/9/11 or,

 OCC index=1: CS 0/2/4/6/8/10 or,

 OCC index=1: CS 1/3/5/7/9/11 or,

 OCC index=2: CS 0/2/4/6/8/10 or,

 OCC index=2: CS 1/3/5/7/9/11

2 OCC case for each F1 PRB within one cell:

 OCC index=0: CS 0/2/4/6/8/10 and OCC index=1: CS 1/3/5/7/9/11 or,

 OCC index=0: CS 1/3/5/7/9/11 and OCC index=1: CS 0/2/4/6/8/10

3 OCC case for each F1 PRB within one cell:

 OCC index=0: CS 0/2/4/6/8/10, and OCC index=1: CS 1/3/5/7/9/11, and OCC index=2: CS 0/2/4/6/8/10 or,

 OCC index=0: CS 1/3/5/7/9/11, and OCC index=1: CS 0/2/4/6/8/10, and OCC index=2: CS 1/3/5/7/9/11

For more details, see CP OTH Specification ([11599958](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Y3SQrPwOEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and CP OTH Specification ([11599837](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Y3RpkvwOEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Simulation result: Performance evaluation of NR PUCCH format 1 with UE multiplexed by TD-OCC.ppt

<https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:p:/r/sites/ASCOP/_layouts/15/Doc.aspx?sourcedoc=%7BC26253CE-8544-4364-A173-F8B596360FD8%7D&file=performance%20evaluation%20of%20NR%20PUCCH%20F1%20with%20TD%20OCC%20multiplexing.pptx&_DSL=1&action=edit&mobileredirect=true>

Below table gives the supported configurations for:

* Starting symbol index per resource, startingSymbolIndex from 38.213 §9.2.1

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| TDD FR1 | Loner |  | LoKi |  | vDU\*\* |  |
| Starting symbol | Number of symbols | Starting symbol | Number of symbols | Starting symbol | Number of symbols |  |
| 12, 13 | 1 | 12, 13 | 1 | [Before CNI-103796-M] 12, 13 v [End CNI-103796-M] | [Before CNI-103796-M] 1  [End CNI-103796-M] |  |
|  | 12 | 2, with FH disabled/enabled\* | 12 | 2, with FH disabled/enabled\* | [Before CNI-103796-M] 12  [End CNI-103796-M] | [Before CNI-103796-M] 2, with FH disabled/enabled\*  [End CNI-103796-M] |
| First feature |  |  |  |  | CB007289-D |  |

###### 2.4.3.1.1.1.0-4 TDD FR1 TDD FR1- PUCCH Format3 (ID: 11104504)

**2.4.3.1.1.1.0-4.0-5**  (ID: `13398588`)

TDD FR1
DU shall support below configurations for different L1 HWs:

* Number of symbols per resource, NPUCCHsymb from 38.211 §6.3.2.1. Intra-slot FH is supported, see [11496350](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tSFDN_v1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ).
* Starting symbol index per resource, startingSymbolIndex from 38.213 §9.2.1

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **TDD FR1** | **Loner** |  | **LoKi** |  | Thor |  | **GPU** |  |
| **Starting symbol** | **Number of symbols** | **Starting symbol** | **Number of symbols** | **Starting symbol** | **Number of symbols** | **Starting symbol** | **Number of symbols** |  |
| 0 | For conformance tests only: 4 with FH enabled | 0 | For conformance tests only: 4 with FH enabled | 0 | For conformance tests only: 4 with FH enabled | - | **[CB016061-J]  For conformance tests only: 4 with FH enabled** [End CB016061-J]\*\*\*\* |  |
| 0 | 14, with FH disabled/enabled\* | 0 | 14, with FH disabled/enabled | 0 | 14, with FH enabled | 0 | 14, with FH enabled |  |
| **First Feature** |  |  |  |  | CB007487-B CB007487-C |  | CB016066-C |  |

\*Intra-slot FH configuration is controlled in the higher layer via R&D parameter rdLongPucchWithoutFrequencyHopping as defined in 5G\_L3\_4715 [11016709](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_A-vaz__KEe-D3seUwaI0tg).

It means all the UEs in the same cell are configured similarly for intra-slot FH.  
When Intra-slot FH is enabled, the start PRB index of the first and the second hop are configured as described in CP OTH Specification [11599656](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Y3QbdvwOEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

The offset between the 2hops depends on the control information sent on PUCCH (see CP Architecture Specifications [11311435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TrZGQvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note: When NRBTS/NRCELL.actDynUlResAlloc='true', DU with Loner Loki, Thor **[CB016061-F] and GPU** [End CB016061-F] **L1 HWs, shall support Intra-slot FH always enabled i.e. setting of rdLongPucchWithoutFrequencyHopping = 'true' is not supported.**\*\*\*\*

For Conformance tests with number of symbols greater than 1, FH (Frequency Hopping) is always enabled.

**[Before CB016061-J] Conformance Testing is not in scope of GPU L1 HW**[End CB016061-J]\*\*\*\*

##### 2.4.3.1.1.3 FDD

###### 2.4.3.1.1.3.0-1 FDD FDD FR1- PUCCH Format0 (ID: 11104534)

**2.4.3.1.1.3.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11104542`)

FDD
Below table gives the supported configurations for:

* Number of symbols per resource, NPUCCHsymb from 38.211 §6.3.2.1
* Starting symbol index per resource, startingSymbolIndex from 38.213 §9.2.1

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| FDD FR1 | Loner |  | vDU\*\* |  |
| Starting symbol | Number of symbols | Starting symbol | Number of symbols |  |
| 12, 13 | 1 | [Before CNI-103796-M] 12, 13  [End CNI-103796-M] | [Before CNI-103796-M] 1  [End CNI-103796-M] |  |
|  | 12 | 2, with FH disabled/enabled\* | - | - |

[CNI-103796-M] \*\*vDU L1 HW is no more supported [End CNI-103796-M]

Short PUCCH would not be applied on FDD and Loki L1 HW as NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/pucchModeSelect is restricted to ‘longPucch’ in this case.

Short PUCCH is ony applied on FDD and Loner L1 HW as NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/pucchModeSelect restricted to ‘longPucch’ for other L1 HWs.

\*Intra-slot FH (Frequency Hopping) enabled is supported for conformance tests and for Msg4 in SA mode; otherwise FH disabled is supported from E2E perspective

---

###### 2.4.3.1.1.3.0-2 FDD FDD FR1- PUCCH Format1 (ID: 11104544)

**2.4.3.1.1.3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11104546`)

FDD
Symbol Position and duration

---

**2.4.3.1.1.3.0-2.0-1.0-7**  (ID: `13467631`)

FDD
The DU shall support the configurations in the below table for:

* Number of symbols per resource, NPUCCHsymb from 38.211 §6.3.2.1. Intra-slot FH is supported, see ([11496350](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tSFDN_v1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* Starting symbol index per resource, startingSymbolIndex from 38.213 §9.2.1

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **FDD FR1** | **Loner** |  | **Loki** |  | **Thor** |  | **GPU** |  |
| **Starting symbol** | **Number of symbols**\* | **Starting symbol** | **Number of symbols**\* | **Starting symbol** | **Number of symbols** | **Starting symbol** | **Number of symbols** |  |
| 0 | 14 | 0 | 14 | 0 | 14, with FH    enabled | 0 | 14, with FH    enabled |  |
| 4 | 7 | 4 | 7 | 4 | 7 | [CB016062-BD] 4 [End CB016062-BD] | [CB016062-BD] 7 [End CB016062-BD] |  |
| 4 | 6 | 4 | 6 | 4 | 6 | - | - |  |
| **First Feature** |  |  |  |  | CB007487-D |  | CB016406-A |  |

\*Intra-slot FH configuration is controlled in the higher layer via this R&D parameter rdLongPucchWithoutFrequencyHopping in 5G\_L3\_4715. It means all the UEs in the same cell are configured similarly for intra-slot FH. When Intra-slot FH is enabled, the start PRB index of the first and the second hop are configured as described in ([11599656](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Y3QbdvwOEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The offset between the 2hops depends on the control information sent on PUCCH (see ([11311435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TrZGQvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Note: When NRBTS/NRCELL.actDynUlResAlloc='true', DU with Loner, Loki, Thor **[**CB016062-AD**] and GPU** [End **CB016062-AD**] L1 HWs, shall support Intra-slot FH always enabled i.e. setting of rdLongPucchWithoutFrequencyHopping = 'true' is not supported.***\******\***

DU  shall support mixed PUCCH F1 with:  
- S=0 L=14 and S=4 L=7 with Loner, Loki, Thor **[**CB016062-BD**] and GPU** [End **CB016062-BD**] L1 HWs  
- and S=4 L=6 **with Loner, Loki, Thor  
in the same PRB for different UEs in a cell within the same slot.  
Refer to ([11357097](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uca_KfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for more details about the support of PUCCH with NPUCCHsymb  does not equal to 14.*****\******\***

Note: In case of multiplexing scenarios and intra slot frequency hopping enabled, DU shall process the received PUCCH F1 signal below:

* DU for Loner, Loki, Thor **[**CB016062-AD**] and GPU** [End **CB016062-AD**] L1 HW shall process the signal received on the two hops for all the multiplexed UEs***\******\***
* ~~Scenario3:~~ When all the multiplexed UEs transmitting PUCCH F1 with the same secondHopPrb (secondHopPrb=startPrb of the second hop)) but with different startPrbs in the 1st hop, DU for Loner, Loki, Thor **[**CB016062-AD**] and GPU** [End **CB016062-AD**] shall process the signal received on the two hops while considering all the UEs sending control data in the same PRB as multiplexed UEs.***\******\***

[Before CB016062-AD] DU for GPU L1 HW shall expect PUCCH receiver to be programmed with UE PUCCH resource not multiplexed to any other UE. [End CB016062-AD]  
[Before CB016062-H] Conformance Testing is not in scope of GPU L1 HW. [End CB016062-H]

---

**2.4.3.1.1.3.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11104564`)

FDD
Time domain orthogonal cover codes (OCC)

---

**2.4.3.1.1.3.0-2.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `13425673`)

FDD
Below table gives the supported configurations for time domain orthogonal cover codes see 38.211 §6.3.2.4.1-2

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **FDD FR1** | **Loner** | **LoKi** | **Thor** | **GPU** |
| **OCC** | 0 | {0,1,2} | {0,1,2} | 0 |
| **First Feature** |  |  |  | **CB016406-A** |

For Loki and Thor, when NRCELL.actLongPucchResourceOpt=True, L1-UL supports up to 3 OCCs indicating by NIDD NRCELL.pucchF1ResOccConf, and up to 3\*6 UEs multiplexed in the same F1 PRB in the same slot with below {OCC, CS} configuration,

1 OCC case for each F1 PRB within one cell:

· OCC index=0: CS 0/2/4/6/8/10 or,

· OCC index=0: CS 1/3/5/7/9/11 or,

· OCC index=1: CS 0/2/4/6/8/10 or,

· OCC index=1: CS 1/3/5/7/9/11 or,

· OCC index=2: CS 0/2/4/6/8/10 or,

· OCC index=2: CS 1/3/5/7/9/11

2 OCC case for each F1 PRB within one cell:

· OCC index=0: CS 0/2/4/6/8/10 and OCC index=1: CS 1/3/5/7/9/11 or,

· OCC index=0: CS 1/3/5/7/9/11 and OCC index=1: CS 0/2/4/6/8/10

3 OCC case for each F1 PRB within one cell:

· OCC index=0: CS 0/2/4/6/8/10, and OCC index=1: CS 1/3/5/7/9/11, and OCC index=2: CS 0/2/4/6/8/10 or,

· OCC index=0: CS 1/3/5/7/9/11, and OCC index=1: CS 0/2/4/6/8/10, and OCC index=2: CS 1/3/5/7/9/11

For more details, see ([11599958](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Y3SQrPwOEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and ([11599837](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Y3RpkvwOEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

FDD
Below table gives the supported configurations for:

* Starting symbol index per resource, startingSymbolIndex from 38.213 §9.2.1

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| FDD FR1 | Loner |  | vDU\*\* |  |
| Starting symbol | Number of symbols | Starting symbol | Number of symbols |  |
| 12, 13 | 1 | [Before CNI-103796-M] 12, 13   [End CNI-103796-M] | [Before CNI-103796-M] 1 [End CNI-103796-M] |  |
| 12 | 2, with FH disabled/enabled\* | - | - |  |

[CNI-103796-M] \*\*vDU L1 HW is no more supported [End CNI-103796-M]

Short PUCCH would not be applied on FDD and Loki L1 HW as NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/pucchModeSelect restricted to ‘longPucch’ in this case.

Short PUCCH is ony applied on FDD and Loner L1 HW as NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/pucchModeSelect restricted to ‘longPucch’ for other L1 HWs.

###### 2.4.3.1.1.3.0-4 FDD FDD FR1- PUCCH Format3 (ID: 11104579)

**2.4.3.1.1.3.0-4.0-6**  (ID: `13467621`)

FDD
The DU shall support the configurations in the below table gives for:

* Number of symbols per resource, NPUCCHsymb from 38.211 §6.3.2.1. Intra-slot FH is supported, see 5G\_UP\_IF\_276\_replaced([11496350](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tSFDN_v1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* Starting symbol index per resource, startingSymbolIndex from 38.213 §9.2.1

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **FDD FR1** | **Loner** |  | **Loki** |  | **Thor** |  | **GPU** |  |
| **Starting symbol** | **Number of symbols**\* | **Starting symbol** | **Number of symbols**\* | **Starting symbol** | **Number of symbols** | **Starting symbol** | **Number of symbols** |  |
| 0 | 14 | 0 | 14 | 0 | 14, with FH enabled | 0 | 14, with FH enabled |  |
| 0 | For conformance tests only: 4 with FH enabled | 0 | For conformance tests only: 4 with FH enabled | 0 | For conformance tests only: 4 with FH enabled | [CB016062-BD] 0 [End CB016062-BD] | [CB016062-H] For conformance tests only: 4 with FH enabled [End CB016062-H] |  |
| 3\*\* | 8\*\* | 3 | 8 | 3 | 8 | [CB016062-BD] 3 [End CB016062-BD] | [CB016062-BD] 8 [End CB016062-BD] |  |
| 4 | 6 | 4 | 6 | 4 | 6 | - | - |  |
| **First Feature** |  |  |  |  | CB007487-D |  | CB016406-A |  |

\*Intra-slot FH configuration is controlled in the higher layer via this R&D parameter rdLongPucchWithoutFrequencyHopping in 5G\_L3\_4715. It means all the UEs in the same cell are configured similarly for intra-slot FH. When Intra-slot FH is enabled, the start PRB index of the first and the second hop are configured as described in [11599656](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Y3QbdvwOEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The offset between the 2hops depends on the control information sent on PUCCH (see [11311435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TrZGQvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Note: When NRBTS/NRCELL.actDynUlResAlloc='true', DU with Loner, Loki, Thor [CB016062-AD] and GPU [End CB016062-AD] L1 HWs, shall support Intra-slot FH always enabled i.e. setting of rdLongPucchWithoutFrequencyHopping = 'true' is not supported.

DU shall support mixed PUCCH F3 with:  
- S=0 L=14 and S=3 L=8 with Loner and Loki, Thor [CB016062-BD] and GPU [End CB016062-BD] L1 HWs   
- S=4 L=6 with Loner, Loki and Thor L1 HWs   
for different UEs in a cell within the same slot.  
Refer to ([11357097](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uca_KfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for more details about the support of PUCCH with NPUCCHsymb  does not equal to 14.

Note\*\*: When NRBTS/NRCELL/actSupercellSingleSSB is active with Loner L1 HW the DU does not support Starting symbol 3 and Number of symbols 8 with A2 and A4 mixed configuration (Since carrier aggregation is not supported when actSupercellSingleSSB is enabled).

#### 2.4.3.1.2 Frequency domain resource allocation

##### 2.4.3.1.2-1 FDD

**2.4.3.1.2-1.0-6**  (ID: `13479688`)

FDD
For FDD FR1 DU for Loner, Loki, Thor and GPU  L1 HWs shall support below configurations per PUCCH resource Format 1 or Format 3, based on the number of Symbols and the first Symbol:

14-symbol PUCCH resources in a each UL slot:

- #0 to #13

For FDD FR1 DU for Loner, Loki, Thor L1 HWs shall also support below configurations:

Format 1:

7-symbol PUCCH resources in a each UL slot:

- #4 to #10

6-symbol PUCCH resources in a each UL slot:

- #4 to #9

Format 3:

8-symbol PUCCH resources in a each UL slot:

- #3 to #10

6-symbol PUCCH resources in a each UL slot:

- #4 to #9

14-symbol PUCCH resources in a each UL slot:

- #0 to #13

**[CB016062-**BD] For FDD FR1 DU for GPU L1 HW shall also support below configurations:\*\*\*\*

Format 1:

7-symbol PUCCH resources in a each UL slot:

- #4 to #10

Format 3:

8-symbol PUCCH resources in a each UL slot:

- #3 to #10

**[End CB016062-**BD]\*\*\*\*

For conformance test only DU for Loner, Loki, Thor [CB016062-H] and  GPU  [End CB016062-H] L1 HWs shall support: Additional, for PUCCH Format 3:

4-symbol PUCCH resources in each UL slot:

* # 0 to #3

---

##### 2.4.3.1.2-2 FDD

###### 2.4.3.1.2-2.0-5 FDD In TDD FR1 DU for Loner, Loki, Thor and GPU L1 HW shall support the below configurations per PUCCH (Format 1 or Format 3) based on the number of Symbols in each UL slot and first Symbol as follows: 14-symbol PUCCH resources in each UL slot: - #0 to #13 For conformance test, and only for PUCCH Format 3, DU for Loner, Loki, Thor [CB016061-J] and GPU [End CB016061-J] L1 HWs shall support also:**** 4-symbol PUCCH resources in each UL slot: - #0 to #3 (ID: 13479711)

| 0….UL\_BW\_size\* - 1 | 1 | [Before CNI-103796-M] 0….UL\_BW\_size\* - 1 [End CNI-103796-M] | [Before CNI-103796-M] 1 [End CNI-103796-M] |  |

Short PUCCH would not be applied on FDD and Loki L1 HW as NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/pucchModeSelect is restricted to ‘longPucch’ in this case.

* UL\_BW\_size stands for the UL bandwidth size, see 5G\_UP\_ALG\_25\_replaced([11094320](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kmbPmPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[CNI-103796-M] \*\*vDU L1 HW is no more supported [End CNI-103796-M]

The number of allocated PRBs for a pCSI PUCCH resource depends on the modulation scheme (QPSK and PI/2BPSK) and on the F3 coding rate as specified in ([11309733](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TrJ1wvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

| 0….UL\_BW\_size\* - 1 | 1..2   {1, 3} for conformance tests | 0….UL\_BW\_size\* - 1 | 1..2   {1, 3} for conformance tests | 0….UL\_BW\_size\* - 1 | 1..2   {1, 3} for conformance tests | 0….UL\_BW\_size\* - 1 | 1..2 [CB016062-H]  {1, 3} for conformance tests [End CB016062-H] |  |

---

### 2.4.3.2 UCI configuration

#### 2.4.3.2.0-1 UCI configuration Overview for Max UCI Payload with Periodic CSI (P-CSI) (ID: 12763238)

**2.4.3.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12764901`)

UCI configuration
DU shall support Max UCI Payload for Channel State Information (CSI) framework ([11351771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubw32fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) as per 3gpp (refer to "CSI Only" in [11508536](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tTJaM_v1Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for:

* CSI Acquisition to obtain information for scheduling decisions and link adaptation (including selection of MIMO transmission parameters),
* Beam Management (if beam management is based on UE measurement of gNB transmitted physical signals) - to obtain information on optimal UE beam (cf. [11351771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubw32fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

DU shall support Periodic CSI (P-CSI) with Max UCI payload bits for a given UE for Channel Acquisition CSI metrics (cf. [11351817](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubxe5fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), or for Beam Management, or for Multiplexed Channel Acquisition and Beam Management per each Component Carrier (CC). Refer to [11351771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubw32fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

DU shall support P-CSI with Max UCI Payload bits for 1CC with:

* up to max Payload bits for one "CSI Acquisition" report as detailed in [12764792](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_08wlAISvEfCOGMMH109ICw).
* plus up to max Payload bits for one Beam report as detailed in [12764908](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_GGPRp4S0EfCOGMMH109ICw).

DU shall support P-CSI with Max UCI on PUCCH F3 Payload bits for 1CC with:

* up to max Payload bits for one "CSI Acquisition" report and one Beam report as above mentioned
* plus up to 1 SR bit
* plus up to 4 A/N bits or up to 7 A/N bits (NRBTS/NRCELL.actInfTddFrameMuting = True, refer to [11116175](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp1v9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

When SR bit is multiplexed with the CSI, decoded bit is prepended to the bits of the CSI report ([11160013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktNNC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and ([11159969](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktNNA_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The SR, CSI and HARQ A/N, bits are concatenated one after the other, respectively (38.212 6.3.1.1.3).

DU shall support P-CSI with Max UCI on PUCCH F3 Payload bits for several "CSI acquisition" reports of different CCs with CA (Carrier Aggregation) and 1 optional "beam" report. Refer to [11351771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubw32fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

DU shall support Max UCI on PUCCH F3 Payload bits for multiple CC (e.g. nCCs) with:

* up to max Payload bits for CSI Acquisition for 1CC (i.e. max payload from Primary or Secondary Cell, no matter of Primary Cell Technology, e.g. FDD Primary Serving Cell)
* plus up to max Payload bits for Beam Management for 1CC
* plus up to 1 SR bit
* plus up x A/N bits, where "x" is function of CCs number. For the supported CC number and for the "x" value supported by DU L1 HW refer to [11104749](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_koBLC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and to [11104821](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_koCZJfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

Note:  
gNB DU does not support P-CSI bundling for multiple CCs.  
gNB DU does not support SSBs DL reference signals for CSI acquisition (refer to [11351792](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubw33vvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

DU shall support UCI on PUCCH F3 feedback for SSBs DL reference signals when configured for Beam Management, using same CSI framework as for CSI acquisition (refer to [11351792](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubw33vvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

**Note: There is no P-CSI bundling for multiple CCs; CSI report (for channel acquisition, beam management or multiplexing of channel acquisition and beam management) is done per each CC for one UE.**

For Max UCI on PUCCH F3 Payload bits Supported by L1 HW in DU refer to [11104749](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_koBLC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and to [11104821](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_koCZJfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

---

UCI configuration
DU shall support Max UCI on PUCCH F3 Payload for CSI framework (cf. [11351771](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubw32fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for CSI Acquisitionwith 1CC for each of CSI metrics (cf. [11351817](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubxe5fvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) as detailed below.

| System Inputs | 3gpp 38.214 Table 5.2.2.2.1-2 |  |  | 3gpp 38.331 (higher layer IEs configured to UE) |  | 3gpp 38.212 Table 6.3.1.1.2-1 (codebookMode=1) |  |  |  |  | 38.212 Table 6.3.1.1.2-7 |  |  |  |  | P-CSI PUCCH F3 |  |

| 4x4 or 4x2 Close Loop (dlMimoMode =40), actEnhCtrlChannelTrans = True && NRCELL.enhCtrlChannelTransMode = 5 or 6 | 4 | (2,1) | (4,1) | = 'typeI-SinglePanel' | = 'two-one-TypeI-SinglePanel-Restriction' | Rank = 1 with >2 CSI-RS ports, N2 =1 | 3 | 0 | 0 | 2 | 2 | 2 | 4 | 0 | 1 | 13 bits = 5 (PMI) + 2 (RI) + 2 (LI) + 4 (CQI) + 0 (CRI) | CB013440-B |
| 8x4 Close Loop (dlMimoMode = 70) with actBeamforming = true | 8 | (2,2) | (4,4) | = 'typeI-SinglePanel' | = 'two-two-TypeI-SinglePanel-Restriction' | Rank=3 or 4, with 8 or 12 CSIRS ports | 3 | 3 | 2 | 1 | 2 | 2 | 4 | 2 | 4 | 19 bits = 9 (PMI) + 2 (RI) + 2 (LI) + 4 (CQI) + 2 (CRI) | 5GC002200 |

UCI configuration

| **Information type** | **A/N bits** | \*\*Total UCI bits \*\*\* | **Information type** | **A/N bits** | \*\*Total UCI bits \*\*\* | **Information type** | **A/N bits** | \*\*Total UCI bits \*\*\* |  | **Information type** | **A/N bits** | \*\*Total UCI bits \*\*\* |  |  |
| A/N only CSI only SR + CSI A/N + CSI A/N + SR +CSI | [0...17][1]// PRACH and PUCCH can be FDMEd | [3..39] \*\* | A/N only CSI only SR + CSI A/N + CSI A/N + SR +CSI | [0...23][1] // PRACH and PUCCH can be FDMEd | [3...64] | A/N only CSI only SR + CSI A/N + CSI A/N + SR +CSI | [0...23][1] | [3...64] |  | A/N only CSI only SR + CSI A/N + CSI A/N + SR +CSI | [0...23][1] // PRACH and PUCCH can be FDMEd | [3... **[Before CB016062-BD**]  ... 55]***\** \*[CB016062-BD**]  ... 64] **[End CB016062-BD**]***\****\* |  |  |
| // PRACH and PUCCH can be FDMEd |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| **First Feature** |  |  |  | CB007950-A |  |  | CB007487-B |  |  |  | CB016066-C |  |  |  |

Note[1]: The indicated A/N bit length range has System End-to-End informative scope, as detailed in [12763238](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6rUdo4PbEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). The maximum bit length is limited by the UCI length on PUSCH see [11103916](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn2L6fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

**Note*: From End-to-End perspective DU for Loki, Thor  **[CB016062-BD**] and GPU **[End CB016062-BD**]  L1 HW shall support up to 64 bits of UCI with 6CCs (Extended Inter band DL TDD + FDD FR1 CA up to 6CCs (TDD as PCell) ) with x= 23 HARQ A/N bits, refer to details as in [12763238](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6rUdo4PbEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).******\****

**[Before CB016062-BD**] **Note*: From End-to-End perspective DU for GPU  L1 HW shall support up to 55 bits of UCI with 4CCs ( 3CCs TDD PCell + 1CC FDD SCell ) with x = 14 bits HARQ A/N bits, refer to details as in [12763238](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6rUdo4PbEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). **[End CB016062-BD**]******\****

**Note** : From End-to-End perspective DU for Loner L1 HW only, the UCI bundling is descoped, so DU for Loner L1 HW only shall support up to 39 bits of UCI with 4CCs (3CCs TDD + 1CC FDD) with x= 17 HARQ A/N bits, refer to details as in [12763238](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6rUdo4PbEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). But this configuration is kept for future CA evolution.\*\*

DU for Loki and Thor L1 HW shall support *NRCELL.actEnhCtrlChannelTrans = TRUE and, when*NRCELL.enhCtrlChannelTransMode =5 or 6**,**\*\*

DU for Loki and Thor L1 HW shall support Length Indicator (LI) IE bits as detailed in [12763238](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6rUdo4PbEfCOGMMH109ICw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

TDD FR2

| Information type | A/N bits | Total UCI bits\* | Information type | A/N bits | Total UCI bits\* | Information type | A/N bits | Total UCI bits\* | Information type | A/N bits | Total UCI bits\* |  |
| A/N + SR SR only A/N only | [0..2] | [0..2] | A/N + SR SR only A/N only | [0..2] | [0..2] | A/N + SR SR only A/N only | [0..2] | [0..2] | - | - | - |  |

##### 2.4.3.2.2.0-2 TDD FR2 TDD FR2- PUCCH Format2 (ID: 11104783)

**2.4.3.2.2.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `11104792`)

TDD FR2

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| TDD FR2 | Loner |  |  | LoKi |  |  | Thor |  |  | vDU |  |  |
| Information type | A/N bits | Total UCI bits | Information type | A/N bits | Total UCI bits | Information type | A/N bits | Total UCI bits | Information type | A/N bits | Total UCI bits |  |
| A/N + SR SR + CSI | [0.. 50] | [3.. 50] | A/N + SR SR + CSI | [0..50] | [Before CB012734-G] [0..52] [CB012734-G] [0..78] [End CB012734-G] | A/N + SR SR + CSI | [0...50] | [Before CB012734-G] [0...52] [End CB012734-G] [CB012734-G] [0..78] [End CB012734-G] | - | - | - |  |
| First Feature |  |  |  |  |  |  | CB010576-A |  |  |  |  |  |

Note:

* Channel coding is for small block length is used when number of UCI bits <= 11. Polar coding is used when number of UCI bits > 11.
* DU supports two PUCCH format2 symbols per slot with up to 50 bits for Loner and up to [Before CB012734-G]52 [CB012734-G]78 [End CB012734-G] bits for Loki and Thor for each one.
* [CB012734-G] Note: The DU shall ensure the nrofPRBs  does not exceed the range in the above table by configuring properly the maxCode Rate for PUCCH Format2 taking into acount other parameters (eg. modulation scheme, #UCI bits, etc), see 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_830\_replaced([11313423](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TrqMDfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CB012734-G]
* The content and size of the UCI bits for CSI report can refer to 5G\_CP\_ARC\_ALG\_803\_replaced([11313944](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TrudevvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

#### 2.4.3.2.3 FDD FR1

FDD FR1

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| FDD FR1 | Loner |  |  | vDU\*\* |  |  |
| Information type | A/N bits | Total UCI bits\* | Information type | A/N bits | Total UCI bits\* |  |
| A/N + SR SR only A/N only | [0..2] | [0..2] | [Before CNI-103796-M] A/N only A/N + SR  [End CNI-103796-M] | [Before CNI-103796-M] [1..2]  [End CNI-103796-M] | [Before CNI-103796-M] [1..2]   [End CNI-103796-M] |  |

Short PUCCH would not be applied on FDD and Loki L1 HW as NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/pucchModeSelect is restricted to ‘longPucch’ in this case.

\*Total UCI bits refers to the effective bits for HARQ-AN. SR is not sent with a dedicated bit on PUCCH Format0. For more details, please refer to 38.213 section 9.2.5.1

[CNI-103796-M] \*\*vDU L1 HW is no more supported [End CNI-103796-M]

##### 2.4.3.2.3.0-3 FDD FR1 FDD FR1- PUCCH Format2 (ID: 11104814)

FDD FR1

| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **FDD FR1** | **Loner** |  |  | **vDU**\* |  |  |
| **Information type** | **A/N bits** | **Total UCI bits** | **Information type** | **A/N bits** | **Total UCI bits** |  |
| A/N + SR A/N + SR + CSI, SR + CSI | ~~[0..4]~~ [0..numOfUCInfoInBit] | [3..13] [3..22] (for conformance test) | **[Before CNI-103796-M]** SR + CSI**[End CNI-103796-M]** | **[Before CNI-103796-M] 0**[End CNI-103796-M]\*\*\*\* | **[Before CNI-103796-M][3..12]**[End CNI-103796-M]\*\*\*\* |  |

Short PUCCH would not be applied on FDD and Loki L1 HW as NIDD parameter MRBTS/NRBTS/NRCELL/pucchModeSelect is restricted to ‘longPucch’ in this case.

**Note:**

Channel coding is for small block length is used when number of UCI bits <= 11.

FDD FR1
DU shall support UCI on PUCCH F3 payload bits for L1 HW as in below table from End-to-End perspective, as detailed in [12763238](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6rUdo4PbEfCOGMMH109ICw).

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **FDD FR1** | **Loner** |  |  | **Loki** |  |  | **Thor** |  |  | **GPU** |  |  |
| **Information type** | **A/N bits** | **Total UCI bits** | **Information type** | **A/N bits** | **Total UCI bits** | **Information type** | **A/N bits** | **Total UCI bits** | **Information type** | **A/N bits** | **Total UCI bits** |  |
| CSI only SR + CSI A/N + CSI A/N + SR +CSI | [0...11][1] | [3..50] | CSI only SR + CSI A/N + CSI A/N + SR +CSI | [0..11][1] | [3...50] {16} for conformance test only | CSI only SR + CSI A/N + CSI A/N + SR +CSI | [0..11][1] | [3...50] {16} for conformance test only | CSI only SR + CSI A/N + CSI A/N + SR +CSI | [0..11][1] | [3...  **[Before CB016062-BD**]  ..13]  **[End CB016062-BD**]***\*****[CB016062-BD**]  ...50]* *[End CB016062-BD**]****\**** **[CB016062-H**]  {16} for conformance test only  **[End CB016062-H**]***\****\* |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| **First Feature** |  |  |  |  |  |  | CB007487-D |  |  | CB016406-A |  |  |

Note[1]: The indicated A/N bit length range has System End-to-End informative scope, as detailed in [12763238](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6rUdo4PbEfCOGMMH109ICw).   
The maximum bit length is limited by the UCI length on PUSCH see [11103916](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn2L6fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

**Note*: From End-to-End perspective DU shall support for Loner, Loki,  Thor[CB016062-BD**] and GPU**[End CB016062-BD**]  L1 HW up 50** bits of UCI with Extended Inter band DL FDD + TDD FR1 CA up to 6CCs (FDD as PCell) with x = 9 bits HARQ A/N bits, refer to details as in [12763238](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6rUdo4PbEfCOGMMH109ICw).******\****

Note:**If *NRCELL.actEnhCtrlChannelTrans = True and if *NRCELL.enhCtrlChannelTransMode = 5 or 6* \*CSI report for Channel Acquisition increases for 1CC, refer to details as in [12763238](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6rUdo4PbEfCOGMMH109ICw). When NRBTS/NRCELL/dlMimoMode = "Close Loop 8x4 MIMO", the LI IE is already counted in the number of bits for CSI report for Channel Acquisition, otherwise the addition of 2 bits (from LI IE) does not exceed this maximum value, refer to details as in [12763238](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_6rUdo4PbEfCOGMMH109ICw).***\*\*\*

**Note :There is no P-CSI bundling for multiple CCs; CSI report is done for each CC for one UE**
