###### 2.4.5.4.1.1.0-2 SRS BM UE Context and State Machine for UL BM List of the states for UL BM (ID: 13413758)

**2.4.5.4.1.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13413760`)

SRS BM UE Context and State Machine for UL BM
List of the states for UL BM:

* state SRS\_ULBM\_IDLE:  DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) has registered a SRS BM UE context and is waiting for the first valid instantaneous CoMa. The variable rrmUlNumOfCoMa which counts the number of continuous valid received instantaneous covariance matrices is initialized to 0.
* state SRS\_ULBM\_COMA: for each SRS BM UE context, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) has received at least one valid instantaneous CoMa and :
* shall update a Long Term CoMa (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and shall store it.
* shall updates the variable rrmUlNumOfCoMa when the instantaneous CoMa averaged over all the SRS ports is valid (see [13331610](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3PiwQdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
* shall wait for the receipt of an event from upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fmd_tauaapvfee-aqvopbp1qhq&oslc_config.context=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2fgc%2fconf")) in order to start the determination of the UL best beams (see [13327327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_16kKkdRPEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) or [13327328](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_84nh0NRPEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

---

###### 2.4.5.4.1.1.0-3 SRS BM UE Context and State Machine for UL BM Events-Triggered actions (ID: 13413759)

**2.4.5.4.1.1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `13413761`)

SRS BM UE Context and State Machine for UL BM
NOTE: the common part area of this artifact applicable for both subfeatures CB015122-A and CB015122-C, depending on which one is implemented first.

List of Events triggered actions:

* Event (1): First valid CoMa Reception (in SRS\_ULBM\_IDLE state)
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) receives at least one valid instantaneous CoMa (see [13367271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_R9b-0fbTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) or [11107209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall update the variable rrmUlNumOfCoMa when the instantaneous CoMa averaged over all the SRS ports is valid (see [13331610](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3PiwQdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), and shall update and store the Long Term CoMa (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw), Note:  since in UL only codebook SRS is supported, the computation is expected to be done with one SRS report).
* On receipt of invalid instantaneous CoMa, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall not update the variable rrmUlNumOfCoMa, and keep the previously computed Long Term CoMa.
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall report the receipt of an instantaneous CoMa to the upper layers with its validity status.
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall wait for an event from upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) in order to start the UL best beams determination.
* Event (2): valid (or invalid) CoMa Reception (in SRS\_ULBM\_COMA state)
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) receives (see [13367271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_R9b-0fbTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) or see [11107209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) an instantaneous CoMa for this existing SRS BM UE context.
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall update the variable rrmUlNumOfCoMa when the instantaneous CoMa averaged over all the SRS ports is valid (see [13331610](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3PiwQdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), and shall update and store the Long Term CoMa (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)). Note:  since in UL only codebook SRS is supported, the computation is expected to be done with one SRS report).
* on receipt of invalid instantaneous CoMa (that is for all the SRS ports) and when rrmUlNumOfCoMa = MaxNumOfCoMa (see [13331610](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3PiwQdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall discard the invalid instantaneous CoMa, shall not update the variable rrmUlNumOfCoMa and shall keep the Long Term CoMa unchanged.
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall report the receipt of an instantaneous CoMa to the upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) with its valid status.
* **Event (3): UL best beam determination Trigger (in SRS\_ULBM\_COMA state)**
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) receives an event from upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall start UL best beams determination (see [13327327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_16kKkdRPEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) if NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming = 4 [CB015122-C] or [13327328](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_84nh0NRPEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) if NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming = 8 [End CB015122-C][CB015122-E] or 16 [End CB015122-E]), and shall complete the determination of all the UL best beams,
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall provide to upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) an ordered list of UL best beams and for each beam, an index and a pattern id [CB015122-J] and LOS/NLOS channel result for [CB015122-I] 8RX and [End CB015122-I] 16RX receiver (see [13455365](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_p6SPVizSEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and if UL MU MIMO is activated, beamforming Gain Tables for tapered and non tapered beams (see [13454892](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Je1eoyw4EfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) [End CB015122-J].
* Event (4):  Reset Reception (in SRS\_ULBM\_COMA state)
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) receives a reset event from upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall reset the variable rrmUlNumOfCoMa, purge the Long Term CoMa and go back to SRS\_ULBM\_IDLE state for this SRS BM UE context.
* Event (5):  invalid CoMa Reception (in SRS\_ULBM\_COMA state)
* On receipt of an invalid instantaneous CoMa (that is for all the SRS ports) and when rrmUlNumOfCoMa < MaxNumOfCoMa (see [13331610](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3PiwQdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall reset the variable rrmUlNumOfCoMa, and shall purge the previous Long Term CoMa and go back to SRS\_ULBM\_IDLE state for this SRS BM UE context.

---

##### 2.4.5.4.1.2 SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) for UL BM

###### 2.4.5.4.1.2.0-1 SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) for UL BM steps overview for LT CoMa averaging and filtering (ID: 13331606)

**2.4.5.4.1.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13333088`)

SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) for UL BM
Inputs:

- [CB015122-E] NRCELL.actEcpri72e [End CB015122-E]

* instantaneous CoMa averaged over the polarizations per SRS port per direction (H and V) for a SRS BM UE context:
* [CB015122-E] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false: [End CB015122-E] see [13367271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_R9b-0fbTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
* [CB015122-E] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true: see [11107209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) [End CB015122-E]

Algorithm:

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall process LT CoMa averaging according to below steps. See artifact [13328734](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-30ziNTeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) about the state machine for UL BM and SRS BM UE context.

step 1: DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall read instantaneous CoMa per subband (RBG see [11107130](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_koco0vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and find related SRS BM UE context (s) according to the SRS configuration (see [11154174](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)):

* The number of instantaneous CoMas per direction (H and V), per SRS port and per SRS BM UE context is defined in artifact [13331608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dlyH0dWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
* The size of instantaneous CoMa is defined in artifact [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

step 2: DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall validate instantaneous CoMas per SRS BM UE context (see artifact [13331610](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3PiwQdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

step 3:  DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall average instantaneous valid CoMa over all the SRS ports per SRS BM UE context (see artifact [13331609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhV4tWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

step 4: If instantaneous CoMa averaged over all the SRS ports and per direction (H and V) is valid:

* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall update the Long Term CoMa via the IIR filter defined in artifact [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall store Long Term CoMa in SRS BM UE context. (see artifact [13328734](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-30ziNTeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) about the state machine for UL BM and SRS BM UE context).

step 5: If instantaneous CoMas are invalid for all the SRS ports, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall discard the instantaneous CoMas for this UE

Output:

* the averaged Long Term CoMa  (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

---

###### 2.4.5.4.1.2.0-2 SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) for UL BM Size of CoMa (ID: 13331607)

**2.4.5.4.1.2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13331621`)

SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) for UL BM
Inputs:

- rrmTrxColumn and rrmTrxRow (see [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Algorithm:

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall determine the size of horizontal and vertical CoMa according to layout of radio unit according to the below layout table:

The horizontal CoMa is a square matrix in size of rrmTrxColumn.

The vertical CoMa is a square matrix in size of rrmTrxRow.

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Number of TRXs | Number of columns (rrmTrxColumn) | Number of rows (rrmTrxRow) | First Feature |
| 16 | 4 | 2 | 5GC001086-C |
| 16 | 8 | 1 | 5GC001086-C |
| 32 | 8 | 2 | 5GC001086-C |
| 32 | 4 | 4 | 5GC001086-C |
| 64 | 8 | 4 | 5GC001086-A |

Note: The number of TRXs in the table refers to the TRX available in the dedicated cell. The Radio Unit itself can contain more TRXs in case of split panel operation, i.e. if the Radio Unit is shared amongst multiple cells (see [11293672](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ThGeoPvYEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

output:

* the size of horizontal and vertical CoMa

---

###### 2.4.5.4.1.2.0-3 SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) for UL BM instantaneous CoMas averaged over polarizations per UE (ID: 13331608)

**2.4.5.4.1.2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `13331826`)

SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) for UL BM
**Inputs:**

- [CB015122-E] NRCELL.actEcpri72e [End CB015122-E]

* instantaneous CoMas averaged over polarizations per SRS port per direction (H and V):
* [CB015122-E] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false: [End CB015122-E] see [13367271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_R9b-0fbTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
* [CB015122-E] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true: see [11107209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) [End CB015122-E]

- the SRS configuration provided by upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and refer to [11154174](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Algorithm (additional information):

Note: This artifact only provides description, clarification and additional information about the instantaneous CoMas averaged over polarizations per SRS port per direction (H and V) (see Inputs previously).

Notes:

* The averaging of instantaneous CoMas over polarizations is located [CB015122-E] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false, [End CB015122-E] in L1(BB) component (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) [CB015122-E] or if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true in Radio component (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)). [End CB015122-E]
* [CB015122-E] If NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false, [End CB015122-E] DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) generates 2 instantaneous CoMas per sub-band per comb per cyclic shift (that is one per direction) (see [13367271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_R9b-0fbTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* [CB015122-E] If NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true, Radio (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) reports 2 instantaneous CoMas per sub-band per comb per cyclic shift (that is one per direction) (see [11107209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)). [End CB015122-E]

- The size of horizontal and vertical covariance matrices is defined in artifact [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

* if UE is configured with single SRS port,
* [CB015122-E] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false,  [End CB015122-E] DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) generates 2 instantaneous CoMas for this UE.
* [CB015122-E] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true, Radio (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) reports 2 instantaneous CoMas for this UE.  [End CB015122-E]
* If UE is configured with two SRS ports,
* [CB015122-E] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false, [End CB015122-E] DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) generates 2 instantaneous CoMas per SRS port for this UE.
* [CB015122-E] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true, Radio (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) reports 2 instantaneous CoMas per SRS port for this UE to upper layer. [End CB015122-E]

Example: for instance, the Instantaneous CoMas per UE are listed in the below table:

Note: this table assumes transmissionComb = n2 and cyclicShift-n2 = 0 on SRS

|  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| SRS configuration | SRS port | Cyclic shifts | Directions | Covariance matrix |
| Single port | 1000 (p0) | CS0 | H | Cov(H, p0) |
| CS0 | V | Cov(V, p0) |  |  |
| Two ports | 1000 (p0) | CS0 | H | Cov(H, p0) |
| CS0 | V | Cov(V, p0) |  |  |
| 1001 (p1) | CS4 | H | Cov(H, p1) |  |
| CS4 | V | Cov(V, p1) |  |  |

Output:

* description and clarification of the instantaneous CoMas averaged over polarizations per SRS port and per direction (H and V)

---

###### 2.4.5.4.1.2.0-4 SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) for UL BM CoMa averaging over SRS ports per UE (ID: 13331609)

**2.4.5.4.1.2.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `13331899`)

SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) for UL BM
Inputs:

* [CB015122-E] NRCELL.actEcpri72e [End CB015122-E]
* Instantaneous CoMas (see [13331608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dlyH0dWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and [13367271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_R9b-0fbTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) [CB015122-E] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false or [11107209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true [End CB015122-E])
* Number of SRS ports per UE provided by upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and refer to [11154174](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Algorithm:

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall check the validation result of the instantaneous CoMas per SRS port:

* averaged over both polarizations in artifact [13367271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_R9b-0fbTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) with a validation (DTX/non-DTX) result (see artifact [13367270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Lj97U_bTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))  [CB015122-E] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false [End CB015122-E]
* [CB015122-E] averaged over both polarizations in artifact [11107209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) with a validation (DTX/non-DTX) feedback (see artifact [11107200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) reported by Radio component (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))   if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true [End CB015122-E]

Only if the instantaneous CoMa per SRS port (averaged over both polarizations) is valid at least  for one SRS port, then DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall perform the averaging over the SRS ports:

a) if the number of SRS ports is one, then no averaging is performed, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall use the valid instantaneous CoMa for this SRS port.

b) if the number of SRS ports is two:

* If for one SRS port the instantaneous CoMa is invalid, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall not average the instantaneous CoMa over the SRS ports, discard the invalid instantaneous CoMa and use only the valid instantaneous CoMa, otherwise DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall perform the averaging over the SRS ports, that is
* Cov(H) = (Cov(H, p0) + Cov(H, p1)) / 2
* Cov(V) = (Cov(V, p0) + Cov(V, p1)) / 2

Note: if the number of SRS port is one, there is no averaging since [CB015122-E] Radio (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) or [End CB015122-E] DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) has already averaged the received CoMa (see artifacts [13331608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dlyH0dWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and  [13367271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_R9b-0fbTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) [CB015122-E] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false   or [11107209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) otherwise [End CB015122-E]).

Output:

* instantaneous averaged CoMas which are averaged over all the polarizations and the SRS ports per direction (H and V)

---

###### 2.4.5.4.1.2.0-5 SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) for UL BM CoMa validation (ID: 13331610)

**2.4.5.4.1.2.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `13332120`)

SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) for UL BM
Inputs:

* instantaneous CoMas Cov(H) and Cov(V) averaged over all the polarizations per SRS port per direction (H and V) (see [13331608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dlyH0dWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* [CB015122-E] NRCELL.actEcpri72e [End CB015122-E]
* Validation result (see [13367270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Lj97U_bTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)  or [11107200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* rrmMaxNumOfCoMa (the default value is equal to 3).

Algorithm:

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall check DTX/non-DTX result (see [13367270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Lj97U_bTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)  [CB015122-E] when NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false and see [11107200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) when NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true [End CB015122-E]) and validate accordingly the instantaneous CoMas Cov(H) and Cov(V) per SRS port in the artifact [13331609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhV4tWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

If the instantaneous CoMas Cov(H) and Cov(V) are valid, for at least one SRS port, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall increment the variable rrmUlNumOfCoMa, except if it is equal to rrmMaxNumOfCoMa.

If the instantaneous CoMas Cov(H) and Cov(V) are invalid, (that is for all the SRS ports), DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall discard the invalid instantaneous CoMa and

* when rrmUlNumOfCoMa < rrmMaxNumOfCoMa, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall reset the variable rrmUlNumOfCoMa, to 0 and purge any existing Long Term CoMa (previously filtered in artifact [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) .
* otherwise DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall not update the variable rrmUlNumOfCoMa and shall keep the Long Term CoMa unchanged.

Note: In case of invalid instantaneous CoMas (for all the SRS ports), DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall not perform the following steps "CoMa averaging over SRS port per UE" (see [13331609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhV4tWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and "Filter CoMa per UE in time domain" (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))  shall discard an invalid instantaneous CoMa if for the same UE for one SRS port, an instantaneous CoMa is already valid.

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall report to upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)):

* that the variable rrmUlNumOfCoMa has reached the value rrmMaxNumOfCoMa (see [11154054](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqadvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

- the final validation result for the instantaneous CoMa averaged over all the polarizations and all the SRS ports to upper layer (see [11154089](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqafPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) or [11154118](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBgvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Output:

* final averaged validation result for the instantaneous CoMas Cov(H) and Cov(V) averaged over all the polarizations and all the SRS ports reported to upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
* when the variable rrmUlNumOfCoMa reaches the value rrmMaxNumOfCoMa, reports this information to upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

---

###### 2.4.5.4.1.2.0-6 SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) for UL BM Filter CoMa per UE in time domain (ID: 13331611)

**2.4.5.4.1.2.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `13332303`)

SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) for UL BM
Inputs:

* instantaneous averaged CoMas (Cov(H) and Cov(V) which are averaged over all the polarizations and the SRS ports (see artifact [13331609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhV4tWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* SRS periodicity (see [11154174](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* rdUlBeamSelectTimer (see [13378910](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_KtvcY_3CEfCPDo8cGBoqIw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* the variables rrmUlNumOfCoMa (see artifact [13331610](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3PiwQdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

Algorithm:

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall filter in time domain the averaged CoMas Cov(H) and Cov(V) (see artifact [13331609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhV4tWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) if they are valid (see artifact [13331610](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3PiwQdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

If the number of valid instantaneous CoMas rrmUlNumOfCoMa is less or equal than rrmMaxNumOfCoMa (see artifact [13331610](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3PiwQdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), DU shall compute the Long Term CoMa rrmUlAvgCov as an arithmetic average, otherwise DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall update the Long Term CoMa rrmUlAvgCov according to above IIR filter equation. DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall store the new averaged CoMa according to artifact [13328734](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-30ziNTeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

The IIR filter is defined as below:

rrmUlAvgCov = (1 - rrmUlCoMaFilterCoefficient) \* rrmUlAvgCov + rrmUlCoMaFilterCoefficient \* rrmInstCov

where:

* rrmUlAvgCov is the current Long Term averaged CoMa with IIR filter.
* rrmInstCov is the instantaneous averaged CoMa (Cov(H) and Cov(V)) over all the polarizations and the SRS ports (see [13331609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhV4tWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
* rrmUlCoMaFilterCoefficient is the filter coefficient. DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall compute as the value of (SRS periodicity/rdUlBeamSelectTimer). The rdUlBeamSelectTimer is the timer duration provided by upper layers (see [13378910](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_KtvcY_3CEfCPDo8cGBoqIw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) for UL beam selection. The SRS periodicity is from the periodicityAndOffset in SRS configuration (see [11154174](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) ). Note: rrmUlCoMaFilterCoefficient is expected to be less than or equal to 1.0

Output:

* the updated Long Term CoMa rrmUlAvgCov.

---

| Number of UL 2D-DFT beams [13390973](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_frX-gAQFEfGozuGzRUXHpg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | supported | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-E] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| Simplified approach with 2D-DFT beams (informative) [13336809](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Rfh419mdEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | supported | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-E] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| Beamforming Gain Tables for UL MIMO [13454892](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Je1eoyw4EfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | [CB015122-I] supported [End CB015122-I] | [CB015122-I] supported for eCPRI 7-2a [End CB015122-I]  [CB015122-J] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-J] |
| Beamforming weights of UL beams and Determination of the best UL beam [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | supported | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-E] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| Calculate the best 2D-DFT UL beam [13337124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wfJIodm-EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | supported | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-E] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| Determine the second-best UL beam [13337173](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_iNG0INnDEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | supported | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-E] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| Determine the second-best 2D-DFT UL beam [13337175](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ogBjttnDEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | supported | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-E] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |

###### 2.4.5.4.1.3.0-2 Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver and common with 8RX and 16RX receivers Number of UL 2D-DFT beams (ID: 13390973)

**2.4.5.4.1.3.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13390974`)

Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver and common with 8RX and 16RX receivers
Inputs:

* NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming
* 2D-DFT beamset  from upper layer (see [11294527](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqEQkPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ), and [11294877](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqE3pPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* the number of UL best beams from upper layer (see [11154681](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kss2vfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Algorithm:

If the configured UL beamset is 2D-DFT beams, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall select N best beams for SU-MIMO UE, which is provided by upper layer (see [11154681](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kss2vfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Notes:

* when NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming is equal to 4, N is expected to be 2.

- DFT beams may comprise oversampled DFT beams (see [11294877](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqE3pPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Output:

* none

Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver
This is an informative requirement to explain how to simplify the calculation of wkH . RSRS . wk .

For each 2D-DFT beam, its beam weights are the Kronecker product of DFT beams in vertical and horizontal directions. The 2D-DFT beam weight  wk can be represented as  wv.i⮾wh,j where wv.i is DFT beam in vertical direction, wh,j is DFT beam in horizontal direction. In below equation, wk , wv.i and wh.j are column vectors which comprise all the weights of a given beam.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical derivation. The derivation starts with the expression $w\_k^H \cdot R\_{SRS} \cdot w\_k$ and proceeds through several steps involving matrix operations such as Kronecker product ($\otimes$) and conjugate transpose ($H$).
Here is the extracted text:
$w\_k^H \cdot R\_{SRS} \cdot w\_k$
$= (w\_{v,i} \otimes w\_{h,j})^H \cdot (R\_{SRS,v} \otimes R\_{SRS,h}) \cdot (w\_{v,i} \otimes w\_{h,j})$
$= (w\_{v,i}^H \otimes w\_{h,j}^H) (R\_{SRS,v} \cdot w\_{v,i}) \otimes (R\_{SRS,h} \cdot w\_{h,j})$
$= (w\_{v,i}^H \cdot R\_{SRS,v} \cdot w\_{v,i}) \otimes (w\_{h,j}^H \cdot R\_{SRS,h} \cdot w\_{h,j})$
$= (w\_{v,i}^H \cdot R\_{SRS,v} \cdot w\_{v,i}) \cdot (w\_{h,j}^H \cdot R\_{SRS,h} \cdot w\_{h,j})$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-12151109.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

###### 2.4.5.4.1.3.0-4 Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver and common with 8RX and 16RX receivers Beamforming Gain Tables for UL MIMO (ID: 13454892)

**2.4.5.4.1.3.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `13454893`)

Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver and common with 8RX and 16RX receivers
Input:

- NRCELL.actUlMuMimo

* tapered and no tapered weight vectors in UL beamset (see [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

- RSRS,h and  RSRS,v Long Term CoMa in horizontal and vertical direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)))

* rrmTrxColumn and rrmTrxRow (see [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)).

Algorithm:

If NRCELL.actUlMuMimo is set to true,

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall go through all horizontal DFT beams (over the index j) and shall store all the Kronecker product results of (Nh /(Trace(RSRS,h)) \*  wh,jH . RSRS,h . wh,jin gain tables rrmUlBfGainTable (for without tapering and with tapering)

- If UL tapering is disabled, wh,j  is a column vector compiled of weights of a horizontal oversampled DFT beam without tapering.

- If UL tapering is enabled, wh,j  is a column vector compiled of weights of a horizontal oversampled DFT beam with tapering.

- Nh equals to rrmTrxColumn (see [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)).

- RSRS,h is the Long Term CoMa related to the horizontal direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall go through all vertical DFT beams (over the index i) and shall store all the Kronecker product results of (Nv /(Trace(RSRS,v)) \*   wv,iH . RSRS,v . wv,I in gain tables rrmUlBfGainTable (for without tapering and with tapering)

- If UL tapering is disabled, wv,i is a column vector compiled of weights of a vertical oversampled DFT beam without tapering.

- If UL tapering is enabled, wv,i is a column vector compiled of weights of a vertical oversampled DFT beam with tapering.

- Nv equals to rrmTrxRow (see [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)).

- RSRS,v is the Long Term CoMa related to the vertical direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))

Note:

* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall receive the set of horizontal and vertical oversampled DFT beams without and with tapering from upper layer during cell setup procedure (see [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
* The tapered beam and non-tapered beam shall be one-to-one mapping.

Output:

* beamforming Gain Tables for tapered and non tapered beams in horizontal and vertical direction.

---

###### 2.4.5.4.1.3.0-5 Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver and common with 8RX and 16RX receivers Beamforming weights of UL beams and Determination of the best UL beam (ID: 13337075)

**2.4.5.4.1.3.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `13337076`)

Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver and common with 8RX and 16RX receivers
Inputs:

* 2D-DFT or GoB beamset and mapping table between 2D-DFT beams and GoB beams from upper layer (see [11294527](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqEQkPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ), and more specifically [11294877](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqE3pPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) and [13393567](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_JR8dMAZcEfGozuGzRUXHpg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* [CB015122-J] if NRCELL.actUlMuMimo is set to true, tapered and not tapered UL beamset from upper layer (see [11294527](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqEQkPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ), and more specifically [11294877](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqE3pPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) and [13393567](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_JR8dMAZcEfGozuGzRUXHpg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) [End CB015122-J]
* Long Term CoMa (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))

Algorithm:

When DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) receives an event from upper layers in the state SRS\_ULBM\_COMA in order to start the determination of the UL best beams (event (3) see [13328734](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-30ziNTeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall find the best horizontal and vertical DFT beams (identified with indexes hBest and vBest) according to [13337124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wfJIodm-EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9): If the configured UL beamset is 2D-DFT beams, the best UL beam is the Kronecker product of DFT beams (indentified with indexes vBest and hBest) (see [13336809](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Rfh419mdEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA)).

If the configured UL beamset is NOT 2D-DFT beams (GOB beamset see [11296797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqFeufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) expects to receive the mapping table between 2D-DFT beams and beams in beamset from upper layer (see [11296797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqFeufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) during the cell setup procedure (see [11154681](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kss2vfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and shall map the selected 2D-DFT beam to a UL beam according to this mapping table (see [13393567](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_JR8dMAZcEfGozuGzRUXHpg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and [11296797](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqFeufvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

[CB015122-J] if NRCELL.actUlMuMimo is set to true, on receipt of the event(3) from the upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA) and [13337134](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_I5P1INnBEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall use horizontal and vertical DFT beams which belong to tapered and non tapered beamset in the UL beam selection for [CB015122-I] 4RX (see [13327327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_16kKkdRPEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), 8RX or [End CB015122-I] 16RX (see [13327328](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_84nh0NRPEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).  [End CB015122-J]

Notes:

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) expects to receive sets of weight vectors of horizontal and vertical DFT beams (as well as a mapping table of pairs of such horizontal and vertical beams to a patternID) from upper layer (see [11294527](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqEQkPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ), and [11294877](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqE3pPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))  during the cell setup procedure. The 2D-DFT beams are kronecker products of horizontal and vertical DFT beams .

- some horizontal and vertical DFT beams may be excluded by upper layer (L3(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) for performance reason.

* the 2D-DFT beamset contains the oversampled DFT weights generated by upper layer (L3(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

-[CB015122-J] non tapered beams may be part of 2D-DFT beamset or GOB beamset. [End CB015122-J]

Output:

- the best UL beam

---

###### 2.4.5.4.1.3.0-6 Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver and common with 8RX and 16RX receivers Determine the best 2D-DFT UL beam (ID: 13337124)

**2.4.5.4.1.3.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `13337126`)

Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver and common with 8RX and 16RX receivers
13337126:
Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver and common with 8RX and 16RX receivers
13337126:
Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver and common with 8RX and 16RX receivers
13337126:
Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver and common with 8RX and 16RX receivers
13337126:

13337126:
Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver
13337126:
Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver
13337126:
Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver
13337126:
Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver
Inputs:
\* 2D-DFT beamset (see [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
\* Long Term CoMa (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))
Algorithm:
This requirement defines the algorithm for finding the best 2D-DFT UL beam. For further information, please refer to artifact [13336809](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Rfh419mdEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
1.  DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall go through all horizontal DFT beams (over the index j) and find one oversampled DFT beam, identified with the index hBest, which maximizes the following term:
     wh,jH . RSRS,h . wh,j
where:
 [image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in black text on a white background. The equation is:
hBest = argmax(wHh,j · RSRS,h · wh,j)
{j}
The text "hBest" is underlined with a red wavy line. The equation involves mathematical notation such as subscripts, superscripts, and matrix multiplication.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03131720.png[/image\_path][/image-0]
-  wh,j  is a column vector compiled of weights of a horizontal oversampled DFT beam. DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall receive the set of horizontal oversampled DFT beams from upper layers during cell setup procedure (see [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
-  RSRS,h is the Long Term CoMa related to the horizontal direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)).
2. DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall go through all vertical DFT beams (over the index i) and find one oversampled DFT beam, identified wth the index vBest, which maximized the following term:
   wv,iH . RSRS,v . wv,i
   where
[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is: vBest = argmax{i}(w\_{v,i}^H \cdot R\_{SRS,v} \cdot w\_{v,i}). The text "vBest" is underlined with a red wavy line.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03131721.png[/image\_path][/image-1]
-  wv,i is a column vector compiled of weights of a vertical oversampled DFT beam. DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall receive the set of vertical oversampled DFT beams from upper layer during cell setup procedure (see [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) ).
-  RSRS,v is the Long Term CoMa related to the vertical direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))
3.The best 2D-DFT UL beam is the Kronecker product of oversampled DFT beams identified with the indexes vBest and hBest (see [13336809](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Rfh419mdEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA))
Output:
  - the best 2D-DFT UL beam

---

###### 2.4.5.4.1.3.0-7 Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver and common with 8RX and 16RX receivers Determine the second-best UL beam (ID: 13337173)

**2.4.5.4.1.3.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `13337232`)

Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver and common with 8RX and 16RX receivers
NOTE: the common part area of this artifact applicable for both subfeatures CB015122-A and CB015122-C, depending on which one is implemented first.

Inputs:

- NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming

* Long Term CoMa (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

- 2D-DFT or GoB beamset and mapping table between 2D-DFT beams and GoB beams (see [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

Algorithm:

This algorithm defines how to find the second-best UL beam.

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall execute this algorithm when NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming =  4 (the UL subcell type is C4) [CB015122-C] or NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming =  8 (the UL subcell is C8) [End CB015122-C][CB015122-E] or NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming =  16 (       the UL subcell is C8´2, C8´4 or C8´8) [End CB015122-E] (see ([11094176](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kmaBffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

1 . DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall find the second-best horizontal and vertical DFT beams (vSecondBest, hSecondBest ) where the components of the tuple are DFT beams in vertical and horizontal direction, respectively according to artifact [13337175](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ogBjttnDEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

1. If the configured UL beamset is 2D-DFT beams, the second-best UL beam is the Kronecker product of vSecondBest and hSecondBest (see [13336809](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Rfh419mdEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA)).
2. If the configured UL beamset is NOT 2D-DFT beams, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall map the selected 2D-DFT beam to an UL beam according to the mapping table between 2D-DFT beams and GoB beams  defined in artifact [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

Output:

* second best horizontal and vertical DFT beams

---

###### 2.4.5.4.1.3.0-8 Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver and common with 8RX and 16RX receivers Determine the second-best 2D-DFT UL beam (with 2D-DFT or GoB beamset) (ID: 13337175)

**2.4.5.4.1.3.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `13337204`)

Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver and common with 8RX and 16RX receivers
13337204:

Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver

13337204:
Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver
13337204:
Beam Selection for UL 4RX receiver
Inputs:

* 2D-DFT or GoB beamset and mapping table (see [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* Long Term CoMa (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* parameters rrmTrxColumn, rrmTrxRow (see [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* 2D-DFT best beam (see [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* R&D parameter rd2ndBeamCorrThreshold (see [13423328](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_F_z6MhiIEfGFMKAOrP5qqw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

Algorithm:

This requirement defines the algorithm for finding the second-best 2D-DFT UL beam.

After DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) has selected the best 2D-DFT beam (see [13337124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wfJIodm-EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall find the second-best 2D-DFT UL beam which meets below term:

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is:
argmax\_{{k}}(w\_k^H \* R'\_{SRS} \* w\_k)[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03131728.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

The product wkH . R´SRS . wk  is derived by the below equation if beams are 2D-DFT beams:

[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in LaTeX. The equation is spread across three lines.
The first line is:
$w\_k^H \* R'*{SRS} \* w\_k = w\_k^H \* R*{SRS} \* w\_k - \lambda\_{best} \* w\_k^H \* \frac{w\_{best}}{||w\_{best}||} \* \frac{w\_{best}^H}{||w\_{best}||} \* w\_k$
The second line is:
$= (w\_{i,v}^H \* R\_{SRS,v} \* w\_{i,v}) \* (w\_{j,h}^H \* R\_{SRS,h} \* w\_{j,h}) - \lambda\_{best} \* \frac{1}{N}$
The third line is:
$|w\_{i,v}^H \* w\_{vBest,v}|^2 \* |w\_{j,h}^H \* w\_{hBest,h}|^2$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03132117.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

where:

-  wi,v and  wj,h are vertical and horizontal DFT beams of 2D-DFT beam wk where k corresponds to the tuple (i,j)

-  wvBest,v and whBest,h  are vertical and horizontal DFT beams of the best 2D-DFT beam wbest (see [13337124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wfJIodm-EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

-  RSRS,h is the Long Term CoMa in horizontal direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)).

-  RSRS,v is the Long Term CoMa in vertical direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))

- lambdaBest equals to[image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation:
$$ \frac{1}{N} \* (w\_{vBest,v}^H \* R\_{SRS,v} \* w\_{vBest,v}) \* (w\_{hBest,h}^H \* R\_{SRS,h} \* w\_{hBest,h}) $$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03132132.png[/image\_path][/image-2]

- N equals to rrmTrxColumn\*rrmTrxRow  where rrmTrxColumn and rrmTrxRow are defined in artifact [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

Notes: the performance can be optimized for calculating below values:

- To speed up calculation of  [image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is written in black text on a white background. The expression is: $|w\_{i,v}^H \* W\_{vBest,v}|^2$. The expression contains the following symbols:
- Vertical bars: $|...|$
- Lowercase 'w' with subscript 'i,v': $w\_{i,v}$
- Superscript 'H': $^H$
- Asterisk: \*
- Uppercase 'W' with subscript 'vBest,v': $W\_{vBest,v}$
- Superscript '2': $^2$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03132131.png[/image\_path][/image-3], a lookup table can be calculated during the cell setup which includes correlations between all vertical DFT beams.

- To speed up calculation of [image-4][image\_desc]$|w\_{j,h}^H \* W\_{hBest,h}|^2$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03132132.png[/image\_path][/image-4], a lookup table can be calculated during the cell setup which includes correlations between all horizontal DFT beams.

- Values of wv,iH . RSRS,v . wv,i , wh,jH . RSRS,h . wh,j and lamdaBest are already calculated at the stage of finding the best 2D-DFT beam in artifact [13337124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wfJIodm-EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). No need to calculate them again in this algorithm.

In order to find the second-best UL 2D-DFT beam, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall find the candidate wk which maximizes the value of wkH . R´SRS . wk  according to below steps:

1. DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall go through available combinations of horizontal and vertical DFT beams, shall sort the candidates according to the value of wkH . R´SRS . wkin decreasing order, and pick from the list the vertical DFT beam and the horizontal DFT beam identified with index secondBest = (vSecondBest, hSecondBest) that can maximize the value of wkH . R´SRS . wk .

The 2D-DFT beam identified by index secondBest (constructed as Kronecker product of weight vectors wvSecondBest and whSecondBest) is a candidate of the second-best 2D-DFT beam.

1. If the configured UL beamset is NOT 2D-DFT beams, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall find UL beam from the candidate according to the mapping table between 2D-DFT beams and GoB beams defined in artifact [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). If the UL beam is same as the best UL beam, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall go to step 1 to find a new candidate (rationale: the second best beam cannot be equal to the best beam).
2. DU shall calculate correlation between candidate and the best 2D-DFT beam. If [image-5][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical inequality. The left side of the inequality is the absolute value of the product of two terms: $|w\_{v,i}^H \cdot w\_{v,vBest}|$ and $||w\_{h,j}^H \cdot w\_{h,hBest}||$. The right side of the inequality is the product of three terms: $(rrmTrxColumn \* rrmTrxRow) \* rrm2ndBeamCorrThreshold$.
   The inequality can be transcribed as:
   $|w\_{v,i}^H \cdot w\_{v,vBest}| \cdot ||w\_{h,j}^H \cdot w\_{h,hBest}|| \geq (rrmTrxColumn \* rrmTrxRow) \* rrm2ndBeamCorrThreshold$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-12151630.png[/image\_path][/image-5]

where:

- rrmTrxColumn and rrmTrxRow are defined in artifact [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

* the parameter rrm2ndBeamCorrThreshold is set to the R&D parameter rd2ndBeamCorrThreshold (see [13423328](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_F_z6MhiIEfGFMKAOrP5qqw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and its default value is 0.5.

If the candidate does not meet this condition, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall select the candidate as the second-best 2D-DFT beam

otherwise DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall save this candidate as nonOptimalCandidate, go to step 1 and pick the next one in order to find a new candidate.

Note:  DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) does not need to save another nonOptimalCandidate than the first one (already saved) since the candidates are sorted according to the value of wkH . R´SRS . wkin decreasing order.

1. If no candidate, which is not marked as nonOptimalCandidate, can be found, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall use the first nonOptimalCandidate with the highest value of  wkH . R´SRS . wkas the second-best 2D-DFT beam.

Note: in future evolution and optimization, the additional correlation check used in the step 3 may be skipped since this check could be proven to be obsolete.

Output:

* second best UL 2D-DFT beam or GoB beam if the configured UL beamset is NOT 2D-DFT beams.

---

###### 2.4.5.4.1.4 DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver

###### 2.4.5.4.1.4.0-1 DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver Supported algorithms for best beam selection for UL 8RX and 16RX receiver (ID: 13372409)

**2.4.5.4.1.4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13372411`)

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
The following L1 HW shall support the below algorithms for Best beam Selection for UL 8RX [CB015122-E] and 16RX [End CB015122-E]  receiver:

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Algorithm | Thor |
| Beam selection for 8RX/16RX receiver Overview and Number of UL osDFT beams [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-E] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| Beamforming Gain Tables for UL MIMO [13455525](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_qrlXISzXEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | [CB015122-I] supported for eCPRI 7-2a [End CB015122-I]  [CB015122-J] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-J] |
| Find best beams with Kronecker V\*H CoMa [13338299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_VkUN8dqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-E] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| \* Determine the best and the second-best UL beam [13338440](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ja8a0NqvEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-E] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| \* overview of determination of the 3rd ~ Nth UL beam [13338441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Q3tHUNqvEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-E] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| \* Determination of the 3rd ~ Nth best 2D-DFT UL beam (wit 2D-DFT or GoB beamset) [13338444](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_m_HqYNqvEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-E] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| Find best beams with H/V CoMa [13338300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_bajBhdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-E] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| \* Determine the best 2D-DFT UL horizontal and best 2D-DFT UL vertical beam [13338460](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_RhXuYdq6EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-E] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| \* Determine the m-th (m >1) best UL horizontal beam [13338461](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_b36rcNq6EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-E] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| \* Determine the m-th (m>1) best UL vertical beam [13338462](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_h1pOIdq6EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-E] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| \* Determine N best beams [13338463](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_mnrZwtq6EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-E] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| Find best beams with hybrid split panel beams [13338301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_iF44INqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | [CB015122-E] supported for eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| Find best beams with UD split panel beams [13338302](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_mYG7RNqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | [CB015122-E] supported for eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| Split panel mode [13338303](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_qoytUdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | [CB015122-E] supported for eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-E] |
| LOS and NLOS for UEs identity [13455365](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_p6SPVizSEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | [CB015122-I] supported for eCPRI 7-2a [End CB015122-I]  [CB015122-J] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-J] |
| First feature | CB015122-C |
