###### 2.4.5.4.1.4.0-2 DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver Beam selection for 8RX/16RX receiver Overview and Number of UL osDFT beams **** (ID: 13338298)

**2.4.5.4.1.4.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13338438`)

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
Inputs:

* NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming
* rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor8RX (see [13371621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_64hwIPnwEfCPDo8cGBoqIw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* [CB015122-E] rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor16RX (see [13371622](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__mq6QPnwEfCPDo8cGBoqIw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX (see [13390971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IImtMAQEEfGozuGzRUXHpg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) [End CB015122-E]
* N: the number of UL best 2D-DFT beams from upper layer (see [11154947](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksuE2PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
* beamset configuration (see [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ))

Algorithm:

If NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming = 8 (beam selection for 8RX IRC receiver),

* if rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor8RX is equal to 1, refer to the artifact [13338300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_bajBhdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) (H/V CoMa algorithm).
* if rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor8RX is equal to 0, refer to the artifact [13338299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_VkUN8dqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) (Kronecker V\*H CoMa algorithm).

Note:

* Kronecker V\*H CoMa algorithm is the new naming for combined HV CoMa algorithm.
* H/V CoMa algorithm is the new naming for separated HV CoMa algorithm.

[CB015122-E] If NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming = 16 (beam selection for 16RX IRC receiver),

* If rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX  is "none",
* If rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor16RX is equal to 0, refer to the artifact [13338299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_VkUN8dqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) (Kronecker V\*H CoMa algorithm).
* If rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor16RX is equal to 1, refer to the artifact [13338300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_bajBhdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) (H/V CoMa algorithm).
* else if rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX is "hybrid split mode",
* refer to the artifact [13338301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_iF44INqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
* else if rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX is "UD split mode",
* refer to the artifact [13338302](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_mYG7RNqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). [End CB015122-E]

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall select N best 2D-DFT beams for UEs, where N is provided by upper layer (see [11154947](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksuE2PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Notes:

* when NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming is equal to 8, N is expected to be 4.

- DFT beams may comprise oversampled DFT beams (see [11294877](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqE3pPvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

* [CB015122-E] when NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming is equal to 16, N may be equal to 4 or 8. [End CB015122-E]

If NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming = 8  and if rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor8RX is 1 and if N equals to 4, the number of horizontal (Mh) and vertical (Mv) beams is 2 each.

[CB015122-E] If NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming = 16  and if rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX  is "none" and if rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor16RX is 1 and if N equals to 4, the number of horizontal (Mh) and vertical (Mv) beams is 2 each.

If NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming = 16  and if rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX  is "none" and if rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor16RX is 1 and if N equals to 8, the number of horizontal (Mh) and vertical (Mv) beams is four and two respectively. [End CB015122-E]

[CB015122-E] If NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming = 16,

* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall update a variable rrmPanelSplitMode
* when rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX  is "none" with FULL\_PANEL value
* otherwise with other values (see the description how the UL beams are built and split in artifact [13338301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_iF44INqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ) when rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX is "hybrid split mode" and artifact [13338302](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_mYG7RNqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ) when rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX is "UD split mode")
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall report a panelMode parameter (equals to the variable rrmPanelSplitMode) to upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)). [End CB015122-E]

Output:

* the selection of the best beam determination algorithm (combined or separated HV COMA [CB015122-E] or split panel (hybrid or UD split mode) [End CB015122-E] beam selection)
* the number of horizontal (Mh) and vertical (Mv) beams (for separated HV CoMa algorithm)

---

###### 2.4.5.4.1.4.0-3 DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver Beamforming Gain Tables for UL MIMO (ID: 13455525)

**2.4.5.4.1.4.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `13455528`)

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall compute for [CB015122-I] 8RX and [End CB015122-I]16RX receiver the beamforming Gain Tables in the same way as it is described in the artifact [13454892](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Je1eoyw4EfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver

**2.4.5.4.1.4.0-4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13338445`)

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
DU shall find the best and second-best 2D-DFT UL beam according to artifacts [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and [13337173](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_iNG0INnDEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

**2.4.5.4.1.4.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `13338441`)

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
**overview of determination of the 3rd ~ Nth UL beam**

---

**2.4.5.4.1.4.0-4.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13338448`)

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
Inputs:

* NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming
* Long Term CoMa (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))
* best and 2nd best UL 2D-DFT beams (see [13338440](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ja8a0NqvEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* beamset configuration and mapping table (see [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ))
* N: the number of UL best beams (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Algorithm:

This algorithm defines how to find the 3rd, 4th.. Nth best UL beam, where N is the number of UL best beams (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

1. DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall find the m-th (m >2) best horizontal and vertical DFT beams .
2. If the configured UL beamset is 2D-DFT beams, the m-th (m >2) best UL beam is the Kronecker product (see [13336809](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Rfh419mdEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA)) of DFT beams identified with indexes horizontalmBestand verticalmBest (see next artifact [13338444](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_m_HqYNqvEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) ).
3. If the configured UL beamset is NOT 2D-DFT beams, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall map the selected 2D-DFT beam to a UL beam according to the mapping table defined in artifact [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

Note: Any horizontal or vertical DFT beam may appear in multiple of the best UL beams but any combination of horizontal and vertical DFT beams shall be unique in the list of the UL best beams.

Output:

* from the 3rd, 4th to Nth best UL beams.

---

**2.4.5.4.1.4.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `13338444`)

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
**Determination of the 3rd ~ Mth best 2D-DFT UL beams (with 2D-DFT or GoB beamset)**

Inputs:
\* Long Term CoMa  RSRS,h  and  RSRS,v (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))
\* 2D-DFT beamset or GoB beamset and mapping table (see [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ))
\* R&D parameter:
+ rd3rdBeamCorrThreshold (see [13371630](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_jP6t0vn1EfCPDo8cGBoqIw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
+ rd4thBeamCorrThreshold (see [13371631](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_nw_sUvn1EfCPDo8cGBoqIw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
+ rdDefaultBeamCorrThd (see [13428200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_rN1fcBxLEfGX7t-UNMeXGQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
\* rrmTrxColumn and rrmTrxRow (see [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
\* 2D-DFT best and second-best beam (see [13338440](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ja8a0NqvEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
\* M the number of UL best beams (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
Algorithm:
DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall find the m-th ( m >=3 and m<= M, where M is the number of UL best beams (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))) best 2D-DFT UL beam which meets below term:
[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is:
argmax$*{ {k} }$ ($w\_k^H \* R'*{SRS} \* w\_k$)
Here's a breakdown of the components:
- **argmax**: This is an operator that denotes "the argument of the maximum". It indicates that we are looking for the value of a variable (or set of variables) that maximizes a given function.
- **${k}$**: This subscript below "argmax" indicates that the maximization is performed over the set of possible values for the index $k$.
- **$w\_k^H$**: This represents the conjugate transpose (or Hermitian transpose) of a vector $w\_k$. The superscript 'H' typically denotes this operation in linear algebra.
- **$*$**: This symbol likely represents matrix multiplication or a similar operation between the vectors and the matrix.
-** $R'\_{SRS}$**: This appears to be a matrix, possibly related to some form of covariance or correlation matrix, with a prime (') indicating a modified or related version of $R\_{SRS}$.
-** $w\_k$**: This is a vector, likely the same vector as in $w\_k^H$.
-** (...)**: The parentheses enclose the function that is being maximized.
In essence, the expression describes finding the vector $w\_k$ (from a set of possible $k$ values) that maximizes the quadratic form $w\_k^H R'*{SRS} w\_k$. This type of expression is common in areas like signal processing, machine learning, and optimization, often related to finding optimal weights or directions.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03141406.png[/image\_path][/image-0]
When DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) decides the m-th (m >2)  best beam, the wkH  R´SRS  wk can be derived by the below equation if beams are 2D-DFT beams:
[image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in LaTeX. The equation is spread across three lines.
The first line is:
$w\_k^H \* R'*{SRS} \* w\_k = w\_k^H \* R\_{SRS} \* w\_k - \sum\_{u \in {mBest}} \lambda\_{u} \* w\_k^H \* \frac{w\_u}{||w\_u||} \* \frac{w\_u^H}{||w\_u||} \* w\_k$
The second line is:
$= (w\_{i,v}^H \* R\_{SRS,v} \* w\_{i,v}) \* (w\_{j,h}^H \* R\_{SRS,h} \* w\_{j,h}) - \sum\_{u \in {mBest}} \lambda\_{u} *$
The third line is:
$\frac{1}{N} \* |w\_{i,v}^H \* w\_{uv,v}|^2 \* |w\_{j,h}^H \* w\_{uh,h}|^2$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03161429.png[/image\_path][/image-1]
where:
- {mBest} is the set of indices corresponding from the first to the (m-1) best beams.
- u is a tuple (uv,uh), where uv is the vertical index of beam and uh is the horizontal index of the beam.
-  wi,v  and wj,h   are vertical and horizontal DFT beams of 2D-DFT beam wk  where k corresponds to the tuple (i,j) . [image-2][image\_desc]The image is a solid white rectangle. There is no discernible content within the image.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/image\_a6cacd03828ca0a3a5cfad14bc90f977.gif[/image\_path][/image-2]
-  wuv,v  and  wuh,h  are vertical and horizontal DFT beams of the uth best 2D-DFT beam wu (for the first and second-best beam, see [13338440](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ja8a0NqvEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
-  RSRS,h is the Long Term CoMa in horizontal direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)).
-  RSRS,v is the Long Term CoMa in vertical direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))
-  lambdaBestu = [image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical formula. The formula is:
$$ \frac{1}{N} \* (w\_{uv,v}^H \* R\_{SRS,v} \* w\_{uv,v}) \* (w\_{uh,h}^H \* R\_{SRS,h} \* w\_{uh,h}) $$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03161430.png[/image\_path][/image-3]
- N equals to rrmTrxColumn*rrmTrxRow  (see [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
In order to find the m-th (m >2) UL 2D-DFT beam, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall find a value for the index k for the candidate wk such that the value of wkH . R´SRS . wk  is maximum according to below steps:
1. DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall loop through all potential combinations of horizontal and vertical DFT beams, shall sort the candidates according to the value of wkH . R´SRS . wkin decreasing order, shall pick from the list the vertical DFT beam and the horizontal DFT beam identified with index mBest = (verticalmBest, horizontalmBest) that can maximize the value of wkH  R´SRS  wk .
Note: when DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) has to look for the next m-th (m >2) 2D-DFT beam, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall re-evaluate the product wkH  R´SRS  wk with the correlations coming from the first m-1 first beams.
The 2D-DFT beam identified by index mBest (constructed as Kronecker product of weight vectors wverticalmBest and whorizontalmBest) is a candidate of the second-best 2D-DFT beam.
2.  If the configured UL beamset is NOT 2D-DFT beams, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall find the UL beam from the candidate according to the mapping table between 2D-DFT beams and GoB beams defined in artifact [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). If the UL beam is already in the set of the first m-1 best beams, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall go to step 1 to find a new candidate (rationale: the second best beam cannot be equal to one of the first m-1 best beam).
3. DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall  calculate the correlation between the candidate and the first m-1 best 2D-DFT beams. If 
[image-4][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is:
max
u ∈ {mBest}
( |w^H\_{v,i} \* w\_{uv,v}| \* |w^H\_{h,j} \* w\_{uh,h}| ) >= (rrmTrxColumn \* rrmTrxRow) \* rdBeamCorrThd
The expression involves maximization over a variable 'u' belonging to a set {mBest}. It then compares the product of absolute values of two complex number products with another product. The terms w\_{v,i}, w\_{uv,v}, w\_{h,j}, w\_{uh,h} are likely complex numbers or vectors, and the superscript 'H' denotes the conjugate transpose. The terms rrmTrxColumn, rrmTrxRow, and rdBeamCorrThd are likely scalar values. The red wavy underline under "rrmTrxColumn*rrmTrxRow)*rdBeamCorrThd" might indicate a specific region of interest or a threshold value.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03161431.png[/image\_path][/image-4]
where:
\* rrmTrxColumn and rrmTrxRow are defined in artifact [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw).
\* the parameter rdBeamCorrThd is defined as:
+ rd3rdBeamCorrThreshold for the 3rd best beam correlation check.
+ rd4thBeamCorrThreshold for the 4th best beam correlation check.
+ rdDefaultBeamCorrThd for the 5th best beam ~ Nth best beam correlation check (its default value is 0.5).
If the candidate does not meet this condition, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall select the candidate as the m-th 2D-DFT beam,
otherwise DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall save this candidate as nonOptimalCandidate and go to step 1 and pick the next one in order to find a new candidate. 
Note:  DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) does not need to save another nonOptimalCandidate than the first one (already saved) since the candidates are sorted according to the value of wkH . R´SRS . wkin decreasing order.
​​​​4. If no candidate, which is not marked as nonOptimalCandidate, can be found, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall use the first**nonOptimalCandidate with the highest value of****w**kH**. R´**SRS**. w**k**as the m-th best 2D-DFT beam.****\*******\****\*\*\*
Note: in future evolution and optimization, the additional correlation check used in the step 3 may be skipped since this check could be proven to be obsolete.
- 3rd to Mth best UL 2D- DFT beams or GoB beams if the configured UL beamset is NOT 2D-DFT beams

###### 2.4.5.4.1.4.0-5 DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver Find best beams with H/V CoMa algorithm (ID: 13338300)

**2.4.5.4.1.4.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `13338460`)

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
**Determine the best DFT UL horizontal and best DFT UL vertical beam**

---

**2.4.5.4.1.4.0-5.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13338469`)

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
13338469:
DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver

13338469:

13338469:
DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
13338469:
DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
Inputs:
- DFT beamsets for horizontal and vertical direction respectively (see [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ))
- Long Term CoMas for horizontal and vertical direction respectively (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))
Algorithm:
This requirement defines the algorithm for finding the best UL horizontal beam and the best UL vertical beam.
1. DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall go through all horizontal DFT beams (over the index j) and find one DFT beam, identified with the index hBest, which maximizes the following term: wj,hH . RSRS,h . wj,h
where
[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation. The equation is:
hBest = argmax(wHj,h ⋅ RSRS,h ⋅ wj,h)
{j}
The text "hBest" is underlined with a red wavy line.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03171856.png[/image\_path][/image-0]
-  wj,h  is a column vector which is compiled by the weights of the j-th horizontal DFT beam. DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall receive the set of horizontal DFT beams from upper layer (L3(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) during cell setup procedure (see [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
-  RSRS,h is the Long Term CoMa related to the horizontal direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
When DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) finds the best horizontal DFT beam (identified with the index j = jBest, then DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall compute the beam power lambdaBest1,h = [image-1][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is:
$$ \frac{1}{N\_h} \* (w\_{jBest,h}^H \* R\_{SRS,h} \* w\_{jBest.h}) $$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03191638.png[/image\_path][/image-1]
where:
- Nh equals to rrmTrxColumn.
-  RSRS,h is the Long Term CoMa related to the horizontal direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
-  wjBest,h  is a column vector which is compiled by the weights of the UL best horizontal DFT beam identified with the index jBest. 
2) DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall go through all vertical DFT beams (over the index i) and find one DFT beam, identified with the index vBest, which maximizes the following term: wi,vH . RSRS,v . wi,v
 
where
[image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical equation written in black text on a white background. The equation is:
vBest = argmax\_{{i}}(w\_{i,v}^H R\_{SRS,v} \cdot w\_{i,v})
The text "vBest" is underlined with a red wavy line.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03171858.png[/image\_path][/image-2]
-  wi,v is a column vector which is compiled by the weights of the i-th vertical DFT beam. DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall receive the set of vertical DFT beams from upper layers during cell setup procedure (see [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
-  RSRS,v is the Long term CoMa related to the vertical direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
When DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) finds the best vertical DFT beam (identified with the index i = iBest, then DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall compute the beam power lambdaBest1,v = [image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is:
$$ \frac{1}{N\_v} \* (w\_{iBest,v}^H \* R\_{SRS,v} \* w\_{iBest.v}) $$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03191643.png[/image\_path][/image-3]
where:
- Nv equals to rrmTrxRow (see [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
-  RSRS,v is the Long Term CoMa related to the vertical direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
-  wiBest,v  is a column vector which is compiled by the weights of the UL best vertical DFT beam identified with the index iBest. 
Output:
- best DFT UL honrizontal and vertical beam
- beam powers lambdaBest1,h and lambdaBest1,v

---

**2.4.5.4.1.4.0-5.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13338473`)

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
13338473:
DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver

13338473:
DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
13338473:

13338473:
DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
13338473:
DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
13338473:
DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
13338473:
DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
Inputs:
- rdHBeamCorrThreshold (see [13421298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_iI9lBRe-EfGFMKAOrP5qqw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
- DFT beamsets for horizontal direction (see [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ))
- Long Term CoMa for horizontal direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))
- Mh the number of UL horizontal best beams (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
- rrmTrxColumn (see [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)).
Algorithm
This requirement defines the algorithm for finding the m-th best horizontal UL beam, where 11) best UL horizontal beam, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall find a value for the index j for the candidate wj,h  such that the value of  wj,hH . R´SRS,h . wj,h is maximum according to below steps: 
1) DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall loop through the set of available horizontal DFT beams, shall sort the candidates according to the value of wj,hH . R´SRS,h . wj,h  in decreasing order.and shall pick from the list the horizontal DFT beam that maximizes the value of wj,hH . R´SRS,h . wj,h .
2) DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall compute the correlation between candidate and the first m-1 best horizontal 2D-DFT beams.
If [image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is:
max
uh ∈ {mhBest}
(|w^H\_{j,h} \* w\_{uh,h}|) >= rrmTrxColumn*rdHBeamCorrThreshold
The text is in black and the wavy underline under "rrmTrxColumn*rdHBeamCorrThreshold" is in red.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03171924.png[/image\_path][/image-3],
where:
\* rrmTrxColumn is defined in artifact [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw).
\* the default value for rdHBeamCorrThreshold (see [13421298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_iI9lBRe-EfGFMKAOrP5qqw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) is 0.7.
If the candidate does not meet this condition, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall select the candidate as the m-th best horizontal DFT beam,
otherwise DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall save this candidate as nonOptimalCandidate , shall go to step 1 and shall pick the next one in order to find a new candidate. 
Note:  DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) does not need to save another nonOptimalCandidate than the first one (already saved) since the candidates are sorted according to the value of wj,hH . R´SRS,h . wj,hin decreasing order.
3) If no candidate, which is not marked as nonOptimalCandidate, can be found, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall use the first nonOptimalCandidate with the highest value of  wj,hH . R´SRS,h . wj,has the m-th best horizontal DFT beam.
Output:
- (2, ..., Mh) best DFT UL horizontal beams
- (2, ..., Mh) beam powers lambdaBestm,h

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
