DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
13338479:
DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
13338479:
DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
13338479:
DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
Inputs:
- rdVBeamCorrThreshold (see [13421295](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dC8GYxe-EfGFMKAOrP5qqw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
- DFT beamsets for vertical direction (see [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ))
- Long Term CoMa for vertical direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))
- Mv the number of UL vertical best beams (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
- rrmTrxRow (see [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)).
Algorithm:
This requirement defines the algorithm for finding the m-th best vertical UL beam. where 11) best UL vertical beam, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall find a value for the index i for the candidate wi,v  such that the value of wi,vH . R´SRS,v . wi,v  is maximum according to below steps:
1) DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall loop through the set of available vertical DFT beams, shall sort the candidates according to the value of wi,vH . R´SRS,v . wi,v  in decreasing order and shall pick from the list the vertical DFT beam that maximizes the value of wi,vH . R´SRS,v . wi,v   .
2) Calculate correlation between candidate and the previous-best vertical beam.
If [image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression. The expression is:
max
uv ∈ {mvBest}
(|wHi,v \* wuv,v|) >= rrmTrxRow*rdVBeamCorrThreshold
The text "rrmTrxRow*rdVBeamCorrThreshold" is underlined with a red wavy line.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03171926.png[/image\_path][/image-3],
where:
\* rrmTrxRow is defined in artifact [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw).
\* the default value for rdVBeamCorrThreshold (see [13421298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_iI9lBRe-EfGFMKAOrP5qqw)) is 0.7.
If the candidate does not meet this condition, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall select the candidate as the m-th best vertical DFT beam,
otherwise DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall save this candidate as nonOptimalCandidate, shall go to step 1 and shall pick the next one in order to to find a new candidate. 
Note:  DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) does not need to save another nonOptimalCandidate than the first one (already saved) since the candidates are sorted according to the value of wi,vH . R´SRS,v . wi,vin decreasing order.
3. If no candidate, which is not marked as nonOptimalCandidate, can be found, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall use the first nonOptimalCandidate with the highest value of  wi,vH . R´SRS,v . wi,vas the m-th best vertical DFT beam.
Output:
- (2, ..., Mv) best DFT UL vertical beams 
- (2, ..., Mv) beam powers lambdaBestm,v

---

**2.4.5.4.1.4.0-5.0-4**  (ID: `13338463`)

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
**Determine N best beams**

---

**2.4.5.4.1.4.0-5.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `13338489`)

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
Inputs:

* Mh the number of UL horizontal best beams (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* Mv the number of UL vertical best beams (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* Mh best UL horizontal lambdaBestm ,h (see [13338461](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_b36rcNq6EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), where 1<= m <= Mh

- Mv best UL vertical beam, lambdaBestm,v  (see [13338462](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_h1pOIdq6EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) where 1<= m <= Mh

* N is the number of UL best 2D-DFT beams (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Algorithm:

If the configured UL beamset is 2D-DFT beams, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall select N best beams, where N is the number of UL best beams (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Step 1: For the number of best horizontal beams and number of vertical DFT beams (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) , DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall calculate the beam power as:

For horizontal beam i, Ph,i =  lambdaBesti,h   where 1<= i <= Mh

For vertical beam j, Pv,j =  lambdaBestj,v  , where 1<= j <= Mv

where

- Mh is the number of horizontal best beams (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

- Mv is the number of vertical best beams (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

- lambdaBesti,h  is the scalar defined in the artifact [13338461](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_b36rcNq6EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for the i-th horizontal best beam.

- lambdaBestj,h  is the scalar defined in the artifact [13338462](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_h1pOIdq6EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for the j-th vertical best beam.

Step 2: For each 2D-DFT beam k = (i,j), the beam power is the product of horizontal beam power and vertical beam power:

Pk = lambdaBesti,h  \* lambdaBestj,v

Step 3: DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall sort beam power Pk of all the 2D-DFT beams from step 2 in descending order from highest to the lowest and shall select the top four 2D-DFT beams.

Note: DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) selects the mth best beam which is the Kronecker product (see [13336809](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Rfh419mdEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Fcm%2Fstream%2F_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA)) of the vertical beam j and horizontal beam i corresponding to the mth highest power in Step 2.

2. If the configured UL beamset is NOT 2D-DFT beams, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall map the selected 2D-DFT beam to a UL beam according to the mapping table defined in artifact [13337075](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZK_mUdm2EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

Output:

* first to N best 2D-DFT beams

---

###### 2.4.5.4.1.4.0-6 DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver Find best beams with hybrid split panel beams**** (ID: 13338301)

**2.4.5.4.1.4.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `13338837`)

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
Inputs:

* NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming
* rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor8RX (see [13371621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_64hwIPnwEfCPDo8cGBoqIw))
* rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor16RX (see [13371622](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__mq6QPnwEfCPDo8cGBoqIw))
* rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX (see [13390971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IImtMAQEEfGozuGzRUXHpg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* number of UL beams (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* rdUlBeamsSigPowerDiff (see [13378825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uZ9CMf23EfCPDo8cGBoqIw))
* lambdaBestith,best  (see [13338299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_VkUN8dqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) or [13338300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_bajBhdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* rrmTrxColumn and rrmTrxRow (see [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))

Algorithm:

This requirement is only applied when the following conditions are satisfied.

* NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming = 16RX AND rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX = "hybrid split mode" AND the number of UL beams = 8.
* SU-MIMO UEs.

[CB015122-J] Note, for MU-MIMO UEs, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall always use full panel beams after re-ordering in Step1. [End CB015122-J]

Step1: After DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) found all five beams in artifacts [13338299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_VkUN8dqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) or [13338300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_bajBhdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) according to rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor16RX value, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall re-order beams according to their power from highest to lowest, where the power of  ith best beam   [image-0][image\_desc]The image contains the mathematical expression "lambdaBest$\_{ith,best}^{dB}$". The text is in a cursive font. The word "lambdaBest" is written in italics, followed by a superscript "dB" and a subscript "ith,best".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03181422.png[/image\_path][/image-0]  is equal to 10\*log10(lambdaBestith,best ), the unit is dB.

Note: DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall compute the beam power lambdaBestith,best  in the same way as in Kronecker V\*H CoMa algorithm (see [13338444](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_m_HqYNqvEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) when it selects the ith best beams in artifacts [13338299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_VkUN8dqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) or [13338300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_bajBhdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) according to rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor16RX value.

The lambdaBestith,best  for the best 2D-DFT beam is equal to:

lambdaBestiBest = [image-1][image\_desc]$\frac{1}{N} \* (w\_{iv,v}^H \* R\_{SRS,v} \* w\_{iv,v}) \* (w\_{ih,h}^H \* R\_{SRS,h} \* w\_{ih,h})$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03231311.png[/image\_path][/image-1]

where:

-  a tuple (iv,ih) belongs to a set of indices corresponding from the first to the M best beams, where

* M is the number of UL beams
* iv is the vertical index of beam
* ih is the horizontal index of the beam.

-  wiv,v  and  wih,h  are vertical and horizontal DFT beams of the ith best 2D-DFT beam wi

-  RSRS,h is the Long Term CoMa in horizontal direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)).

-  RSRS,v is the Long Term CoMa in vertical direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))

- N equals to rrmTrxColumn\*rrmTrxRow  (see [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)).

Step2:

If [image-2][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression written in a slanted font. The expression is: $abs(\lambda Best\_{4th,best}^{dB} - \lambda Best\_{1st,best}^{dB})$.[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-04131327.png[/image\_path][/image-2] < rdUlBeamsSigPowerDiff ,

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall select the 1st best, 2nd best, 3rd best and 4th best beams after re-ordering in Step1 as the first four best beams.

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall select the 5th, 6th, 7th and 8th best beam by splitting the 5th best beam in Step1 with 2x2 split mode (see [11354596](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucJSWfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall set the variable rrmPanelSplitMode (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) to  FULL4\_2X2\_MODE.

Else if  [image-3][image\_desc]The image contains a mathematical expression written in black text on a white background. The expression is:
`abs(lambdaBest_3rd,best^dB - lambdaBest_1st,best^dB)`[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-04131327.png[/image\_path][/image-3]< rdUlBeamsSigPowerDiff ,

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall select the 1st, 2nd and 3rd best beams after re-ordering in Step1 as the first three best beams.

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall select the 4th, 5th and 6th best beam by splitting the 4th best beam in Step1 with hybrid split mode (see [11354596](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucJSWfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall select the 7th and 8th best beam by splitting the 5th best beam in Step1 with LR split mode (see [11354596](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucJSWfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall set the variable rrmPanelSplitMode (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) to  FULL3\_HYBRID\_LR\_MODE.

Else

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall select the 1st and 2nd best beams after re-ordering in Step1 as the first two best beams.

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall select the 3rd, 4th, 5th and 6th best beam by splitting the 3rd best beam in Step1 with 2x2 split mode (see [11354596](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucJSWfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall select the 7th and 8th best beam by splitting the 4th best beam in Step1 with LR split mode (see [11354596](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucJSWfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall set the variable rrmPanelSplitMode (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) to  FULL2\_2X2\_LR\_MODE .

End

Output:

* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall provide to upper layer (L2(DU) (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)):
* an ordered list of UL best beams
* for each beam, an index and a pattern id
* panelMode parameter (equals to the variable rrmPanelSplitMode)

---

###### 2.4.5.4.1.4.0-7 DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver Find best beams with UD split panel beams**** (ID: 13338302)

**2.4.5.4.1.4.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `13338880`)

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
Inputs:

* NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming
* rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor8RX (see [13371621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_64hwIPnwEfCPDo8cGBoqIw))
* rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor16RX (see [13371622](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__mq6QPnwEfCPDo8cGBoqIw))
* rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX (see [13390971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_IImtMAQEEfGozuGzRUXHpg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* number of UL beams (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* rdUlBeamsSigPowerDiff (see [13378825](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uZ9CMf23EfCPDo8cGBoqIw))

Algorithm:

This requirement is only applied when the following conditions are satisfied:

* NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming = 16RX AND the number of UL beams = 8 AND rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX = " UD split mode ".
* SU-MIMO UEs.

[CB015122-J] Note, for MU-MIMO UEs, always full panel beams used in artifacts [13338299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_VkUN8dqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) or [13338300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_bajBhdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) according to rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor16RX value. [End CB015122-J]

After DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) found all of four beams in artifacts [13338299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_VkUN8dqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) or [13338300](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_bajBhdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) according to rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor16RX value,

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall select the 1st and 2nd best beam by splitting the 1st best beam in artifact [13338299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_VkUN8dqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) with UD split mode (see [11354596](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucJSWfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall select the 3rd and 4th best beam by splitting the 2nd best beam in artifact [13338299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_VkUN8dqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) with UD split mode (see [11354596](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucJSWfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall select the 5th and 6th best beam by splitting the 3rd best beam in artifact [13338299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_VkUN8dqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) with UD split mode (see [11354596](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucJSWfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall select the 7th and 8th best beam by splitting the 4th best beam in in artifact [13338299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_VkUN8dqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) with UD split mode (see [11354596](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ucJSWfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

- DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall set the variable rrmPanelSplitMode (see [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) to  UD\_MODE.

Output:

* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall provide to upper layer (L2(DU) (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)):
* an ordered list of UL best beams
* for each beam, an index and a pattern id
* panelMode parameter (equals to the variable rrmPanelSplitMode)

---

###### 2.4.5.4.1.4.0-8 DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver LOS and NLOS for UEs identity (ID: 13455365)

**2.4.5.4.1.4.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `13455367`)

DFT Beam Selection for UL 8RX/16RX receiver
Inputs:

- NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming

- RSRS,h and  RSRS,v Long Term CoMa in horizontal and vertical direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)))

* wbest,h and wbest,v the horizontal and vertical DFT beam of the best 2D-DFT beam (see  [13338440](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ja8a0NqvEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) or [13338460](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_RhXuYdq6EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* R&D parameter rdUlPowerRatio (see [13455352](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_73TrAizREfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))

Algorithm:

When NRBTS/NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming is equal to [CB015122-I] 8 or [End CB015122-I] 16,

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall  compute the following terms for any UE within beam selection for [CB015122-I] 8RX or [End CB015122-I]  16RX receiver:

Rsrph = ( wHbest,h \* RSRS,h \* wbest,h ) / ( wHbest,h \* wbest,h  ) in horizontal direction,

Rsrpv = ( wHbest,v \* RSRS,v \* wbest,v ) / ( wHbest,v \* wbest,v  ) in vertical direction,

powerRatio = sqrt( (Rsrph  \*  Rsrpv) / (Trace(RSRS,h) \* Trace(RSRS,v) ) )

where,

-  RSRS,h is the Long Term CoMa related to the horizontal direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))

-  RSRS,v is the Long Term CoMa related to the vertical direction (see [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))

- wbest,h is the horizontal DFT beam of the best 2D-DFT beam with Kronecker V\*H CoMa algorithm (see  [13338440](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ja8a0NqvEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))  or  H/V CoMa algorithm  (see[13338460](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_RhXuYdq6EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) according to artifact [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

- wbest,v is the vertical DFT beam of the best 2D-DFT beam with Kronecker V\*H CoMa algorithm (see  [13338440](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Ja8a0NqvEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))  or  H/V CoMa algorithm  (see[13338460](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_RhXuYdq6EfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) according to artifact [13338298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_NKTPBdqPEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

If powerRatio > rdUlPowerRatio (see [13455352](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_73TrAizREfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), then DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall assume that UE is located in LOS channel; otherwise, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall assume that UE is located in NLOS channel.

Output:

* LOS or NLOS channel result for beam selection for [CB015122-I] 8RX/[End CB015122-I] 16RX receiver

---

#### 2.4.5.4.2 Periodic antenna switching SRS for DL WB BF

##### 2.4.5.4.2.1 Context and State Machine for DL BM

###### 2.4.5.4.2.1.0-1 Context and State Machine for DL BM (ID: 13337134)

**2.4.5.4.2.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13332984`)

Context and State Machine for DL BM
13332984:
Context and State Machine for DL BM
13332984:
Context and State Machine for DL BM
13332984:
Context and State Machine for DL BM
13332984:
Context and State Machine for DL BM
13332984:
Context and State Machine for DL BM
13332984:
Context and State Machine for DL BM
13332984:
Context and State Machine for DL BM
13332984:
Context and State Machine for DL BM
Rationale:

See [13336532](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_smL_F9mHEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). Moreover, with DL TAS SRS configuration, several SRS reports may be needed in order to update a Long Term CoMa and then DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA))  shall store intermediate instantaneous CoMa (till all the SRS ports are received), which adds another reason why DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall handle a state machine.

Algorithm:

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA))  shall create a SRS BM UE context for UEs which are configured with codebook usage and antenna switching usage periodic SRS in the state SRS\_DLBM\_IDLE and shall wait for a first valid instantaneous covariance matrix.

Note: The instantaneous CoMas

* are provided and averaged over polarizations for each SRS port
* either by LT beam computer (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) [CB015122-F] when NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false [End CB015122-F] (see [13367271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_R9b-0fbTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ))
* or by Radio component (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) [CB015122-F] when NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true [End CB015122-F] (see [11107209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* and are validated
* either in LT beam computer (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA))  [CB015122-F] when NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false [End CB015122-F]  (see [13367270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Lj97U_bTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ)).
* [CB015122-F] or in Radio component  when NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true [End CB015122-F] (see [11107200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) ).

For any SRS BM UE context, the overall state machine is defined in the below diagram:

[image-0][image\_desc]The image is a diagram illustrating a state machine with two states: "SRS\_DLBM\_IDLE" and "SRS\_DLBM\_COMA". The states are represented by large circles. There are five transitions between these states, labeled with numbers 1 through 5.
Transition 1: An arrow points from "SRS\_DLBM\_IDLE" to "SRS\_DLBM\_COMA".
Transition 2: A self-looping arrow originates from and points back to "SRS\_DLBM\_COMA".
Transition 3: Another self-looping arrow originates from and points back to "SRS\_DLBM\_COMA".
Transition 4: An arrow curves from "SRS\_DLBM\_COMA" back to "SRS\_DLBM\_IDLE".
Transition 5: An arrow curves from "SRS\_DLBM\_COMA" back to "SRS\_DLBM\_IDLE".
At the bottom of the image, there is a small icon resembling a clipboard with a downward-pointing arrow, followed by the text "(Ctrl)".[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-03061026.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

Where the states are defined in the artifact [13415095](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_DkorIRNMEfG3gf_qmG8Vww?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and the events are defined in the artifact [13415096](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Mu6pYBNMEfG3gf_qmG8Vww?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

Note: These figures may be found under this link:

[RAN A&S - 5GCx Spec. Repository - RAN A&S - 5GCxx Specifications - UL - SRS Reception - Tree\_View](https://nokia.sharepoint.com/sites/5Gdoc/AS_Tech_Spec/Forms/Tree_View.aspx?csf=1&web=1&e=roJEom&cid=933d18ee%2Df570%2D40b2%2D916c%2D3db2886f5b4d&FolderCTID=0x012000F0A0A3BA325F7648AD307E6959BA7376&id=%2Fsites%2F5Gdoc%2FAS%5FTech%5FSpec%2FDrawings%20and%20diagrams%20for%205G%2FUser%20Plane%2F5G%20UP%20Algorithms%2F2%20L1%20Algorithms%20and%20Configurations%2FUL%20%2D%20SRS%20Reception&viewid=967508b3%2D8e81%2D461c%2Db99d%2D145065cf0c1c)

---

###### 2.4.5.4.2.1.0-2 Context and State Machine for DL BM List of the states for DL BM (ID: 13415095)

**2.4.5.4.2.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13415109`)

Context and State Machine for DL BM
List of the states for DL BM:

* state SRS\_DLBM\_IDLE:  DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) has registered a SRS BM UE context and is waiting for the first valid instantaneous CoMa. The variable rrmDlNumOfCoMa which counts the number of continuous valid received instantaneous covariance matrices is initialized to 0.
* state SRS\_DLBM\_COMA: for each SRS BM UE context, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) has received at least one valid instantaneous CoMa and :
* shall compute a Long Term CoMa (see [13332439](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_J59cotXOEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and shall store it.
* shall updates the variable rrmDlNumOfCoMa when the instantaneous CoMa averaged over all the SRS ports is valid (see [13332435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9S7quNXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
* shall wait for the receipt of an event from upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showartifactpage&artifacturi=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2frm%2fresources%2fmd_tauaapvfee-aqvopbp1qhq&oslc_config.context=https%3a%2f%2fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2fgc%2fconf")) in order to start the determination of the DL best beams (see [13327330](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_LzBroNRQEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

Note: if TAS SRS is configured for the DL BM, the Long Term CoMa update may need several SRS reports for the SRS port averaging.

---

###### 2.4.5.4.2.1.0-3 Context and State Machine for DL BM Events-Triggered actions (ID: 13415096)

**2.4.5.4.2.1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `13415111`)

Context and State Machine for DL BM
List of Events triggered actions:

* Event (1): First valid CoMa Reception (in SRS\_DLBM\_IDLE state)
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) receives at least one valid instantaneous CoMa (see [13367271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_R9b-0fbTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ) or [11107209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall update the variable rrmDlNumOfCoMa when the instantaneous CoMa averaged over all the SRS ports is valid (see [13332435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9S7quNXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), and shall update and store the Long Term CoMa (see [13332439](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_J59cotXOEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw), Note:  since in DL TAS SRS and codebook SRS are supported, the computation may be done with several SRS reports).
* On receipt of invalid instantaneous CoMa, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall not update the variable rrmDlNumOfCoMa , and keep the previous Long Term CoMa computed.
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall report the receipt of an instantaneous CoMa to the upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) with its validity status.
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall wait for an event from upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) in order to start the DL best beams determination.
* Event (2): valid (or invalid) CoMa Reception (in SRS\_DLBM\_COMA state)
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) receives (see [13367271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_R9b-0fbTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ) or see [11107209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) an instantaneous CoMa for this existing SRS BM UE context.
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall update the variable rrmDlNumOfCoMa when the instantaneous CoMa averaged over all the SRS ports is valid (see [13332435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9S7quNXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), and shall update and store the Long Term CoMa (see [13332439](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_J59cotXOEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)). Note:  since in DL TAS SRS and codebook SRS are supported, the computation may be done with several SRS reports).
* on receipt of invalid instantaneous CoMa (that is for all the SRS ports) and when rrmDlNumOfCoMa = MaxNumOfCoMa (see [13332435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9S7quNXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall discard the invalid instantaneous CoMa, shall not update the variable rrmDlNumOfCoMa and shall keep the Long Term CoMa unchanged.
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall report the receipt of an instantaneous CoMa to the upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) with its valid status.
* [CB015122-H] On request from the upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)), DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall compute  instantaneous SB CoMa correlation metrics per SRS port per direction (horizontal and vertical) and provide the valid ones to the upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)). [End CB015122-H].
* Event (3): DL best beam determination Trigger (in SRS\_DLBM\_COMA state)
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) receives an event from upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)).
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall start and complete all the DL best beams determination (see [13327330](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_LzBroNRQEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall provide to upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) an ordered list of DL best beams and for each beam, an index and a pattern id [CB015122-J] and if DL MU MIMO is activated, beamforming Gain Tables for tapered and non tapered beams (see [13454898](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Vl6Isyw5EfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) [End CB015122-J].
* Event (4):  Reset Reception (in SRS\_DLBM\_COMA state)
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) receives a reset event from upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA))
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall reset the variable rrmDlNumOfCoMa, purge the Long Term CoMa and go back to SRS\_DLBM\_IDLE state for this SRS BM UE context.
* Event (5):  invalid CoMa Reception (in SRS\_DLBM\_COMA state)
* On receipt of an invalid instantaneous CoMa (that is for all the SRS ports, see [13332435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9S7quNXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and when rrmDlNumOfCoMa < MaxNumOfCoMa (see [13332435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9S7quNXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), , DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall reset the variable rrmDlNumOfCoMa, and shall purge the previous Long Term CoMa and go back to SRS\_DLBM\_IDLE state for this SRS BM UE context.

---

##### 2.4.5.4.2.2 SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)

###### 2.4.5.4.2.2.0-1 SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) steps overview for LT CoMa averaging and filtering (ID: 13332428)

**2.4.5.4.2.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13333126`)

SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)
Inputs:

* [CB015122-F] NRCELL.actEcpri72e [End CB015122-F]
* instantaneous CoMa averaged over the polarizations per SRS port per direction (H and V) for a SRS BM UE context:
* [CB015122-F] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false: [End CB015122-F]  see [13367271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_R9b-0fbTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ)
* [CB015122-F] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true: see [11107209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [End CB015122-F]

Algorithm:

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall process LT CoMa averaging according to below steps. See artifact [13328736](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_EyQxpdTfEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) about the state machine for DL BM and SRS BM UE context.

1) step 1: DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall read instantaneous CoMa related to SRS BM UE context (s):

* The number of instantaneous CoMas per direction (H and V), per SRS port and per SRS BM UE context is defined in artifact [13332434](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_4zK60NXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
* The size of instantaneous CoMa is defined in artifact [13332433](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_z34FhNXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

2) step 2: DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall validate instantaneous CoMas per SRS BM UE context (see artifact [13332435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9S7quNXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

3) step 3:  DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall average instantaneous valid CoMa over all the SRS ports per SRS BM UE context (see artifact [13332437](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_DVMIENXOEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

4) step 4: If instantaneous CoMa averaged over all the SRS ports and per direction (H and V) is valid:

* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall update the Long Term CoMa via the IIR filter defined in artifact [13332439](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_J59cotXOEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).
* DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall store Long Term CoMa in SRS BM UE context. (see artifact [13328736](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_EyQxpdTfEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) about the state machine for DL BM and SRS BM UE context).
* step 5: If instantaneous CoMas are invalid for all the SRS ports, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall discard the instantaneous CoMas for this UE

Output:

* the updated Long Term CoMa  (see [13332439](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_J59cotXOEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

---

###### 2.4.5.4.2.2.0-2 SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) Size of CoMa (ID: 13332433)

**2.4.5.4.2.2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13332441`)

SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)
The size of horizontal and vertical covariance matrix is determined in the same way as covariance matrix from codebook SRS, see artifact [13331607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_UX1xktWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

---

###### 2.4.5.4.2.2.0-3 SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) instantaneous CoMas averaged over polarizations per UE (ID: 13332434)

**2.4.5.4.2.2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `13332533`)

SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)
Inputs:

* [CB015122-F] NRCELL.actEcpri72e [End CB015122-F]
* instantaneous CoMas averaged over polarizations per SRS port per direction (H and V):
* [CB015122-F] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false: [End CB015122-F] see [13367271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_R9b-0fbTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ)
* [CB015122-F] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true: see [11107209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [End CB015122-F]
* the SRS configuration provided by upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA) and refer to [11154174](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Notes:

* The averaging of instantaneous CoMas over polarizations is located [CB015122-F] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false, [End CB015122-F] in L1(BB) component (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) [CB015122-F] or if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true in Radio component (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)). [End CB015122-F]
* [CB015122-F] If NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false, [End CB015122-F] DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) generates 2 instantaneous CoMas per sub-band per comb per cyclic shift (that is one per direction) (see [13367271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_R9b-0fbTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ))
* [CB015122-F] If NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true, Radio (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) reports 2 instantaneous CoMas per sub-band per comb per cyclic shift (that is one per direction) (see [11107209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CB015122-F]

Algorithm:

The size of horizontal and vertical covariance matrices is defined in artifact [13332433](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_z34FhNXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

If UE is configured with overall P ports' SRS,

* [CB015122-F] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false, [End CB015122-F] DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) generates 2 instantaneous CoMas per SRS port for this UE.
* [CB015122-F] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true, [End CB015122-F] Radio (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) generates 2 instantaneous CoMas per SRS port for this UE.

Output:

* description and clarification of the instantaneous CoMas averaged over polarizations per SRS port and per direction (H and V)

---

###### 2.4.5.4.2.2.0-4 SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) CoMa validation (ID: 13332435)

**2.4.5.4.2.2.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `13332539`)

SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)
Inputs:

* [CB015122-F] NRCELL.actEcpri72e [End CB015122-F]
* instantaneous CoMas Cov(H) and Cov(V) averaged over all the polarizations per SRS port per direction (H and V) (see [13332434](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_4zK60NXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9))
* Validation result (see [13367270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Lj97U_bTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ)  or [11107200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* rrmMaxNumOfCoMa (the default value is equal to 3).

Algorithm:

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall check DTX/non-DTX feedback and validate the instantaneous CoMas Cov(H) and Cov(V) per SRS port in the artifact [13332437](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_DVMIENXOEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) with the validation result reported (see [13367270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Lj97U_bTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ)  [CB015122-F] when NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false and see [11107200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) when NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true [End CB015122-F]).

If the instantaneous CoMas Cov(H) and Cov(V) are valid, for at least one SRS port, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall increment the variable rrmDlNumOfCoMa, except if it is equal to rrmMaxNumOfCoMa.

If the instantaneous CoMas Cov(H) and Cov(V) are invalid, (that is for all the SRS ports), DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall discard the invalid instantaneous CoMa and

* when rrmDlNumOfCoMa < rrmMaxNumOfCoMa, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall reset the variable rrmDlNumOfCoMa, to 0 and purge any existing Long Term CoMa (previously filtered in artifact [13332439](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_J59cotXOEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) [13331611](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-DV_UdWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) .
* otherwise DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall not update the variable rrmDlNumOfCoMa and shall keep the Long Term CoMa unchanged.

Notes:

* in TAS SRS configuration, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall wait for the receipt of all the SRS ports (which can be shared in several SRS symbols) in order to state about an invalid instantaneous CoMa.
* in case of invalid instantaneous CoMas (for all the SRS ports), DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall not perform the following steps "CoMa averaging over SRS port per UE" (see [13332437](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_DVMIENXOEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and "Filter CoMa per UE in time domain" (see [13332439](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_J59cotXOEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA))  shall discard an invalid instantaneous CoMa if for the same UE for one SRS port, an instantaneous CoMa is already valid.

[CB015122-H] Note: In order to compute covariance matrix validation for SB CoMa correlation metric (see [13482384](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_lYjjJD7yEfG0jPRAdLhzvA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)),  DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall valid the instantaneous CoMas averaged over polarizations per SRS port. [End CB015122-H]

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall report to upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)):

* that the variable rrmDlNumOfCoMa has reached the value rrmMaxNumOfCoMa (see [11155684](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksxII_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

- the final validation feedback when the CoMa averaged over all the SRS ports is valid to upper layer (see [11155701](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksxIJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Output:

* final averaged validation result for the instantaneous CoMas Cov(H) and Cov(V) averaged over all the polarizations and all the SRS ports reported to upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)).
* when the variable rrmDlNumOfCoMa reaches the value rrmMaxNumOfCoMa, reports the information to upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)).

---

###### 2.4.5.4.2.2.0-5 SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) CoMa averaging over SRS ports per UE (ID: 13332437)

**2.4.5.4.2.2.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `13332551`)

SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)
13332551:
SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)
13332551:
SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)
13332551:
SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)
13332551:
SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)
13332551:
SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)
13332551:
SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)
13332551:
SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)
13332551:
SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)
**Inputs:**

* [CB015122-F] NRCELL.actEcpri72e [End CB015122-F]
* instantaneous CoMas (see [13331608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dlyH0dWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw) and [13367271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_R9b-0fbTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ) [CB015122-F] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false or [11107209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true [End CB015122-F])
* Number of SRS ports received from upper layer  (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA) and refer to [11154174](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Algorithm:

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall check the validation of the instantaneous CoMas per SRS port:

* averaged over both polarizations in artifact [13367271](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_R9b-0fbTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ) with a validation (DTX/non-DTX) result (see artifact [13367270](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Lj97U_bTEfC0Z6kKit-MzQ))  [CB015122-F] if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to false [End CB015122-F]
* [CB015122-F] averaged over both polarizations in artifact [11107209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) with a validation (DTX/non-DTX) feedback (see artifact [11107200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kodP4fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) reported by Radio component (see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA))  if NRCELL.actEcpri72e is set to true [End CB015122-F]

Only if the instantaneous CoMa per SRS port (averaged over both polarizations) is valid at least for one SRS port, then DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall perform the averaging of the valid instantaneous CoMas Cov(H,pi) and Cov(V,pi) over the SRS ports per SRS resource set.

[image-0][image\_desc]The image contains two mathematical equations.
The first equation is:
$Cov(H) = \sum\_{pi} \frac{Cov(H, pi)}{NumP}$
The second equation is:
$Cov(V) = \sum\_{pi} \frac{Cov(V, pi)}{NumP}$[/image\_desc][image\_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng\_files/images/img-12101648.png[/image\_path][/image-0]

Where

* Cov(H,pi) (resp, Cov(V,pi)) is the instantaneous CoMa for the direction H (resp. V) per SRS port for the SRS resource set, with pi  indicates a SRS port index (see [13331608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_dlyH0dWeEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)).
* NumP  is the number ports for received valid CoMas

Note: with TAS SRS configuration, multiple SRS resources for one UE may be located at different slots. DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall average the instantaneous CoMa averaging when all the SRS ports are received.

Output:

* instantaneous averaged CoMas (Cov(H) and Cov(V)) which area averaged over all the polarizations and the SRS ports per direction (H and V)

---

###### 2.4.5.4.2.2.0-6 SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) Filter CoMa per UE in time domain (ID: 13332439)

**2.4.5.4.2.2.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `13332614`)

SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)
Inputs:

* instantaneous averaged CoMas (Cov(H) and Cov(V) which are averaged over all the polarizations and the SRS ports (see artifact [13332437](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_DVMIENXOEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))
* SRS periodicity (see [11155756](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksxvM_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))
* rdDlBeamSelectTimer (see [13378891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_0hm4w_2-EfCPDo8cGBoqIw))
* the variables rrmDlNumOfCoMa (see artifact [13332435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9S7quNXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))

Algorithm:

DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall filter in time domain the averaged CoMas Cov(H) and Cov(V) over all the polarizations and the SRS ports (see artifact [13332437](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_DVMIENXOEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)) (see artifact [13332437](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_DVMIENXOEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)) if they are valid (see artifact [13332435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9S7quNXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)).

If the number of valid instantaneous CoMas rrmDlNumOfCoMa is less than or equal to rrmMaxNumOfCoMa (see artifact [13332435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9S7quNXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)), DU shall compute the Long Term CoMa rrmDlAvgCov as an arithmetic average, otherwise DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall update the Long Term CoMa rrmDlAvgCov according to above IIR filter equation. DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall store the new filtered CoMa according to artifact [13328736](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_EyQxpdTfEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw).

The IIR filter is defined as below:

rrmDlAvgCov = (1 - rrmDlCoMaFilterCoefficient) \* rrmDlAvgCov + rrmDlCoMaFilterCoefficient \* rrmDlInstCov

where:

* rrmDlAvgCov is the current Long Term averaged CoMa with IIR filter.
* rrmDlInstCov is the instantaneous averaged CoMa (Cov(H) and Cov(V)) over all the polarizations and the SRS ports (see artifact [13332437](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_DVMIENXOEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw)).
* rrmDlCoMaFilterCoefficient is the filter coefficient. DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA)) shall compute it as the value of (SRS periodicity/rdDlBeamSelectTimer). The rdDlBeamSelectTimer is the timer duration provided by upper layer (see [13378891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_0hm4w_2-EfCPDo8cGBoqIw)) in unit of slot, for DL beam selection. The SRS periodicity is from the periodicityAndOffset in SRS configuration (see [11155756](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksxvM_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Note: rrmDlCoMaFilterCoefficient is expected to be less than or equal to 1.0

Output:

* the filtered Long Term CoMa rrmDlAvgCov.

---

###### 2.4.5.4.2.2.0-7 SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) Subband CoMa correlation metric estimation (ID: 13482384)

**2.4.5.4.2.2.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `13482385`)

SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)
Inputs:

* NRCELL.actDlSrsSubbandBm
* SRS subband s\_id provided by upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA) and refer to [11157178](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks6SFvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).
* instantaneous CoMas Cov(H) and Cov(V) averaged over all the polarizations per SRS port per direction (H and V) (see [13332434](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_4zK60NXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw))
* the SRS configuration provided by upper layer (L2(DU) see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA) and refer to [11154174](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Algorithm:

If NRCELL.actDlSrsSubbandBm is true, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall compute the instantaneous SB CoMa correlation metric for SRS port (pi) corresponding to selected SRS subband s\_id for CoMas (see [13332434](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_4zK60NXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) averaged over all the polarizations per SRS port per direction (horizontal and vertical) as below:

rrmSbHCoMaCorrMetric(pi,s\_id,n) = (1/NormH) \* | (Vect\_H\_CoMa(pi,s\_id,n-1) \* (Vect\_H\_CoMa(pi,s\_id,n)H |

rrmSbVCoMaCorrMetric(pi,s\_id,n) = (1/NormH) \* | (Vect\_V\_CoMa(pi,s\_id,n-1) \* (Vect\_V\_CoMa(pi,s\_id,n)H |

where:

* NormH = || Vect\_H\_CoMa(pi,s\_id,n-1) ||2 \* || Vect\_H\_CoMa(pi,s\_id,n) ||2
* NormV = || Vect\_V\_CoMa(pi,s\_id,n-1) ||2 \* || Vect\_V\_CoMa(pi,s\_id,n) ||2
* Vec\_H\_CoMa(pi,s\_id,n) is equal to Vec(H\_CoMa(pi,s\_id,n)). )).
* H\_CoMa(pi,s\_id,n) is the instantaneous CoMa (see [13332434](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_4zK60NXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) averaged over polarizations per SRS port (pi) for horizontal direction (H) corresponding to the SRS subband s\_id at the time index n.
* Vec\_V\_CoMa(pi,s\_id,n) is equal to Vec(V\_CoMa(pi,s\_id,n)).
* V\_CoMa(pi,s\_id,n) is the instantaneous CoMa (see [13332434](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_4zK60NXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) averaged over polarizations per SRS port for vertical direction (V) corresponding to the SRS subband s\_id at the time index n.
* Vec(A) is the vectorization function whose output is a row vector which is computed by vectorizing the element of matrix A (that is by stacking the columns/rows of the matrix A on top of one another).
* pi represents SRS port allocated to UE for periodic SRS, pi=0,…,Pi-1.
* Pi is the number of SRS ports allocated to the UE for periodic srs (Note: Pi = 2 for codebook SRS configuration, Pi = 4 for TAS SRS configuration).
* |.| means Absolute value
* ||.||2 means Euclidean norm.

Notes:

* the time indexes n and (n-1) refer to 2 consecutive CoMas (per direction H and V) corresponding to 2 consecutive SRS reports.
* when NRCELL.actDlSrsSubbandBm is true, DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall store both instantaneous CoMas averaged over all the polarizations for each SRS port and for each direction at time indexes n and (n-1) corresponding to the selected SRS subband s\_id.
* If instantaneous CoMas averaged over all the polarizations for a SRS port (pi) are not valid at time indexes n and (n-1), then DU (LT beam computer see [13397952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1qdpoQizEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall discard invalid values for the rrmSbHCoMaCorrMetric(pi) and rrmSbVCoMaCorrMetric(pi) metrics.

Output:

* the instantaneous SB CoMa correlation metrics per SRS port per direction (horizontal and vertical)
* the number of valid instantaneous SB CoMa correlation metrics

---

###### 2.4.5.4.2.2.0-8 SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) Supported algorithms  for Long Term COMA filtering for DL BM (ID: 13371579)

**2.4.5.4.2.2.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `13371580`)

SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa)
The following L1 HW shall support the below algorithms for Long Term COMA filtering for DL BM:

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Algorithm | Loki | Thor |
| SRS Covariance Matrix (CoMa) for DL BM [13327329](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_GUhbk9RQEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw) | supported | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-F] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-F] |
| \* steps overview for LT CoMa averaging and filtering [13332428](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_oECEAtXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw) | supported | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-F] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-F] |
| \* Size of CoMa [13332433](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_z34FhNXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw) | supported | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-F] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-F] |
| \* instantaneous CoMas averaged over polarizations per UE [13332434](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_4zK60NXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw) | supported | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-F] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-F] |
| \* CoMa validation [13332435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9S7quNXNEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw) | supported | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-F] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-F] |
| \* CoMa averaging over SRS port per UE [13332437](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_DVMIENXOEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw) | supported | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-F] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-F] |
| \* Filter CoMa per UE in time domain [13332439](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_J59cotXOEfCnq6aYkXj8Pw) | supported | supported for eCPRI 7-2a [CB015122-F] and eCPRI 7-2e [End CB015122-F] |
| \* Subband CoMa correlation metric estimation [13482384](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_lYjjJD7yEfG0jPRAdLhzvA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | [CB015122-G]  supported [End CB015122-G] | [CB015122-H]  supported [End CB015122-H] |
| First feature | CB015122-B | CB015122-D |
